RELATED_OBJECTS.description: Displays related object information for the captured abstract SQL plan.

ABSTRACT_SQL_PLAN_VERSION.description: Displays the abstract SQL plan version with applied migration information.

IS_ENABLED.description: Displays whether the abstract SQL plan will be used (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

IS_VALID.description: Displays whether the abstract SQL plan is valid (TRUE) or invalid (FALSE).

DETAILS.description:
Displays additional information on the abstract SQL plan, including invalidation
reasons.

LAST_ENABLE_TIME.description: Displays the timestamp when the abstract SQL plan was added or last enabled.

LAST_ENABLE_USER.description: Displays the ID of the user who added or last enabled the abstract SQL plan.

LAST_DISABLE_TIME.description: Displays the timestamp when the abstract SQL plan was last disabled.

LAST_DISABLE_USER.description: Displays the ID of the user who last disabled the abstract SQL plan.

CAPTURE_TIME.description: Displays the timestamp when the abstract SQL plan was captured.

CAPTURE_USER.description: Displays the ID of the user who captured the abstract SQL plan.

ACCESSIBLE_VIEWS.description: Provides information about accessible views for a given user.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the user who is authorized to access the view.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the view.

VIEW_NAME.description: Displays the name of the view.

ANALYTICAL_PRIVILEGE_NEEDED.description:
Displays whether this view is secured by means of analytical
privileges.

ADAPTERS.description: Displays adapters available in the SAP HANA system.

PROPERTIES.description:
Displays the optional properties of the adapter such as display_name and
description.

CONFIGURATION.description:
Displays the UI properties that must be displayed when configuring remote data
source.

IS_SYSTEM_ADAPTER.description: Displays whether the adapter is a system adapter: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_ESS_DEFINITION_SUPPORTED.description:
Displays whether the procedure GET_REMOTE_SOURCE_TABLE_ESS_DEFINITIONS is enabled for
remote sources created using this adapter: TRUE/FALSE.

ADAPTER_CAPABILITIES.description: Displays supported capabilities for each adapter.

SOURCE_VERSION.description: Displays the source versions that are supported by the adapter.

DESCRIPTION.description: Displays the description of the capability.

IS_SDA_SUPPORTED.description: Displays whether the SDA capability is supported: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_CDC_SUPPORTED.description: Displays whether the CDC capability is supported: TRUE/FALSE.

LOCATION.description:
Displays the location of the adapter: 'indexserver', 'dpserver',
'agent'.

CONFIGURATION.description: Displays the configuration of the adapter.

PROPERTIES.description: Displays the properties of the adapter.

AGENTS.description: Lists active data provisioning agents in the system.

Displays the protocol for communication with SAP HANA database:
TCP/HTTP.

Displays whether the agent listening on the TCP port uses SSL:

belongs.

UNDERLYING_SUBTYPE_ID_NAME.description: Displays the object subtype name of the underlying object.

UNDERLYING_OBJECT_ID.description: Displays the object ID of the underlying object.

UNDERLYING_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name the underlying object belongs to.

UNDERLYING_OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name of the underlying object.

UNDERLYING_OWNER_OID.description: Displays the ID of the user owning the underlying object.

UNDERLYING_OWNER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the user owning the underlying object.

UNDERLYING_READONLY.description: Displays the read-only property of the underlying object.

DEPENDENCY_USER_OID.description:
Displays the ID of the user required to have a certain privilege on the
underlying object in order to validate the dependent object.

DEPENDENCY_USER_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the user required to have a certain privilege on the
underlying object in order to validate the dependent object.

DEPENDENCY_TYPE.description:
Displays the type of dependency that determines the validation semantics
for dependencies sharing the same dependent objects.

PRIVILEGE_ID.description:
Displays the ID of the privilege the dependency user is required to have
on the underlying object.

PRIVILEGE_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the privilege the dependency user is required to
have on the underlying object.

IS_VALID.description:
Displays the current state of the dependency (as integer). It is set by
the object validation logic and reflects missing privileges or
invalidated objects: 0 - 3.

DEPENDENCY_STATUS.description:
Displays the current state of a privilege for the dependent object:
INVALID, NOT AUTHORIZED, AUTHORIZED NON GRANTABLE, or AUTHORIZED
GRANTABLE.

AVAILABLE_PRIVILEGES.description:
Displays the current state of a privilege on upper node (dependent
object): INVALID, NOT GRANTABLE, or GRANTABLE.

TYPE_ID.description: Displays the ID of the authorization object.

SUBTYPE_ID.description: Displays the ID of the authorization object subtype.

OBJECT_ID.description: Displays the ID of the object.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the name of the schema.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the name of the object.

OWNER_OID.description: Displays the owner of the object ID.

OWNER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the object owner.

READONLY.description: Displays whether or not the object is read only.

AUTHORIZATION_TYPES.description: Provides information about object types and subtypes used by authorization object IDs.

TYPE_ID.description: Displays the ID of the authorization object type.

TYPE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the authorization object type.

SUBTYPE_ID.description: Displays the ID of the authorization object subtype.

SUBTYPE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the authorization object subtype.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

FORMAT.description: Displays the format of the annotation value.

VALIDATION_RESULT.description: Displays the validation result of the annotation value.

DEFINITION_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the annotation definition.

DEFINITION_NAME.description: Displays the name of the annotation definition.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

VALUE.description: Displays the value of the annotation.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

ARTIFACT_KIND.description:
Displays the kind of artifact: ANNOTATION, ARRAY_TYPE, ASSOCIATION, CONTEXT,
DERIVED_TYPE, ENTITY, ENUM, STRUCTURED_TYPE, or VIEW.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

ASSOCIATION_KIND.description:
Displays the kind of association: FOREIGN KEY EXPLICIT, FOREIGN KEY IMPLICIT, or
UNMANAGED.

TARGET_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the associated CDS artifact.

TARGET_ARTIFACT_NAME.description: Displays the name of the associated CDS artifact.

TARGET_CARDINALITY_MIN.description:
Displays the minimum cardinality of the association target. The default is 0. -1
represents unlimited.

TARGET_CARDINALITY_MAX.description: Displays the maximum cardinality of the association target. The default is 1.

JOIN_CONDITION.description:
Displays the join condition for unmanaged associations (ASSOCIATION_KIND =
UNMANAGED).

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

SERIES_KIND.description:
Displays the kind of series: NO_SERIES, NOT_EQUIDISTANT, EQUIDISTANT, or
EQUIDISTANT_PIECEWISE.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

DEFINITION.description:
Displays the original definition of the view, similar to how it is found in the CDS
resource file, but with the relative names resolved to absolute
names, and constant expressions resolved to concrete values.

CERTIFICATES.description: Provides information about certificates useable in PSEs.

CERTIFICATE_NAME.description: Displays the unique name of the certificate.

CERTIFICATE_ID.description: Displays the unique identification of the certificate.

SUBJECT_COMMON_NAME.description: Displays the distinguished name of the X.509 certificate subject.

ISSUER_COMMON_NAME.description: Displays the common name of the X.509 certificate issuer.

VALID_FROM.description: Displays the start time of certificate's validity.

VALID_UNTIL.description: Displays the end time of certificate's validity.

COMMENT.description: Displays the description for the certificate.

SUBJECT_DISTINGUISHED_NAME.description: Displays the distinguished name of the X.509 certificate subject.

ISSUER_DISTINGUISHED_NAME.description: Displays the distinguished name of the X.509 certificate issuer.

SUBJECT_ALT_NAME.description:
Displays the comma-separated list of alternative names of the X.509 certificate
subject.

KEY_USAGE.description: Displays the comma-separated list of key usage strings as specified in RFC 5280.

VERSION.description: Displays the version of the certificate format.

SERIAL_NUMBER.description: Displays the serial number as assigned from the certificate issuer.

FINGERPRINT.description:
Displays the hash of the entire certificate. It is used as a unique identifier in the
certificate store.

CERTIFICATE.description: Displays the certificate as given during SQL.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the name of the schema.

COLUMN_KEY_NAME.description: Displays the name of the column encryption key.

COLUMN_KEY_ID.description: Displays the UUID of the key.

ENCRYPTED_WITH_KEYPAIR_ID.description: Displays the UUID of the public key that this key is encrypted with.

ENCRYPTED_COLUMN_KEYVALUE.description:
Displays the value of the key encrypted with the public key referenced by the
ENCRYPTED_WITH_KEYPAIR_ID column.

ENCRYPTION_ALGORITHM.description:
Displays the algorithm that this key uses to encrypt data. Possible values: AES-256-CBC
and ARIA-256-CBC.

CREATE_TIME.description: Displays the time that the key was created.

CREATOR.description: Displays the name of the user who created this key.

CREATED_FOR_COLUMN_KEY_ADMIN.description: Displays whether created for administrator key copy: TRUE/FALSE.

COLUMN_KEY_VERSION.description: Displays the version of the column encryption key.

ALTER_TABLE_IN_PROGRESS.description: Displays whether an ALTER TABLE operation is in process using the CEK: TRUE/FALSE.

CLIENTSIDE_ENCRYPTION_KEYPAIRS.description: Provides information about client public keys in the SAP HANA database.

KEYPAIR_NAME.description: Displays the name of the client public key.

ENCODED_PUBLIC_KEYVALUE.description: Displays the PEM-encoded x509 value of the key.

ENCRYPTION_ALGORITHM.description:
Displays the algorithm the key uses to encrypt column keys. Possible values are:
RSA-OAEP-2048.

CREATE_TIME.description: Displays the time the key was created.

CREATOR.description: Displays the name of the user who created the key.

KEYPAIR_VERSION.description: Displays the version of the key.

COLLATIONS.description: Provides the list of collations that can be specified in an ORDER BY clause.

DESCRIPTION.description: Displays the language and region description for the collation.

CONFIGURATION_PARAMETER_PROPERTIES.description: Displays metadata and properties of the public configuration parameters for SAP HANA.

SECTION.description: Displays the section of the parameter to configure.

HAS_KEY_INDEX.description: Displays whether or not the parameter is indexed: NO, OPTIONAL, or MANDATORY.

DESCRIPTION.description: Displays a description of the parameter.

DATA_TYPE_NAME.description: Displays the data type of the parameter.

VALUE_LIST_SEPARATOR.description:
Displays the element separator character for value lists. Returns NULL for simple
values.

DEFAULT_VALUE.description: Displays the default value of the parameter.

RESTART_REQUIRED.description:
Displays whether or not a restart is required. The values are: TRUE, FALSE, or CUSTOM.
CUSTOM indicates a custom function or callback to decide whether
a restart is required or not depending on the new value to be
set.

INIFILE_NAMES.description:
Displays the .ini files that can contain the parameter value, for
example:service.ini,<service>.ini, global.ini

UNIT.description:
Displays the unit that the value is measured in, for example, megabytes, kilobytes,
seconds, and so on.

VALUE_RESTRICTIONS.description: Displays the restrictions for the supported values.

CUSTOM_RESTRICTIONS.description: Displays the description of the custom restriction, if one is defined.

LAYER_RESTRICTIONS.description:
Displays the layer name if a parameter can only be set on specific layers: SYSTEM, HOST,
or READONLY.

IS_READ_ONLY.description: Displays if the parameter is set to read only.

IS_SYSTEM_MANAGED.description: Displays if a parameter is managed internally by the system.

IS_TEMPLATE.description:
Displays whether the configuration parameter templates or regular parameters are used:
TRUE/FALSE.

CONSTRAINTS.description: Provides information about defined constraints for tables.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

POSITION.description: Displays the column position in this constraint.

IS_PRIMARY_KEY.description:
Displays whether the constraint is a primary key constraint:
TRUE/FALSE.

IS_UNIQUE_KEY.description: Displays whether the constraint is a unique constraint: TRUE/FALSE.

CHECK_CONDITION.description: Displays the check condition of the check constraint.

CREDENTIALS.description: Provides information about credentials for users and components.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the user the credential belongs to.

COMPONENT.description: Displays the name of the component the credential is valid for.

PURPOSE.description:
Displays the purpose, for example remote machine, that the credential is
valid for.

CREDENTIAL_TYPE.description: Displays the type of the credential, for example, password or X509.

CS_ALL_COLUMNS.description: Provides information from all columns of column tables, including internal ones.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

POSITION.description: Displays the ordinal position of the parameter.

GENERATION_TYPE.description:
Displays the generation type of the column. ALWAYS AS appears if the column is a
generation column. ALWAYS AS IDENTITY or BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY
appears if the column is an identity column whose values are
always generated or generated by default. If the column is
neither generation nor identify, NULL appears.

GENERATED_ALWAYS_AS.description: Displays the expression of the column created by GENERATED ALWAYS AS.

INTERNAL_ATTRIBUTE_TYPE.description: Displays the attribute type for internal columns, otherwise NULL.

INTERNAL_COLUMN_ID.description: Displays the ID of the internal column.

CS_BO_VIEWS.description: Provides information about business object views for column store join views.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

BO_VIEW_NAME.description: Displays the business object view name.

CS_CONCAT_COLUMNS.description: Provides information on concat columns in the database.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the table.

TABLE_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the table.

POSITION.description: Displays the position of the column.

CS_FREESTYLE_COLUMNS.description: Provides freestyle search columns for column store join views.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

IS_ALPHANUM_SEACH.description: Displays whether the freestyle search type lis alphanumeric: TRUE/FALSE.

CS_JOIN_CONDITIONS.description: Provides join conditions for column store join views.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

TABLE_SCHEMA_NAME1.description: Displays the schema name of column 1.

TABLE_NAME1.description: Displays the table name of COLUMN_NAME1.

ALIAS_NUMBER1.description: Displays the alias number of TABLE_NAME1.

TABLE_SCHEMA_NAME2.description: Displays the schema name of TABEL_NAME2.

TABLE_NAME2.description: Displays the table name of COLUMN_NAME2.

ALIAS_NUMBER2.description: Displays the alias number of TABLE_NAME2.

JOIN_TYPE.description: Displays the join type: INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL.

CARDINALITY.description: Displays the join cardinality: 1:1, 1:n, n:1, n:n.

CS_JOIN_CONSTRAINTS.description: Provides join constraints for column store join views.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

CONSTRAINT_TYPE.description: Displays the type of constraint owner.

LOCATION.description: Displays the name of constraint owner.

TABLE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the table.

TABLE_NAME.description: Displays the table name of the column.

CS_JOIN_PATHS.description: Provides join paths for column store join views.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

JOIN_CONDITIONS.description: Displays the comma separated list of join conditions.

JOIN_CONSTRAINTS.description: Displays the comma separated list of join constraints.

CS_JOIN_TABLES.description: Provides information about the physical tables referred to by column store join views.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

TABLE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the physical table.

TABLE_TYPE.description:
Displays the type of table: FACT_TABLE, D_TABLE, X_TABLE, Y_TABLE,
TEMP_TABLE, S_TABLE, EXTERNAL_OBJECT, CONVERSION_TABLE, OLAP_TEXT_TABLE,
or AUTHORIZATION_TABLE, HIERARCHY.

CS_KEY_FIGURES.description: Provides information about the key figures defined for column store join views.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

DEFAULT_AGGREGATION_TYPE.description: Displays the aggregation type: SUM, COUNT, MIN, MAX, and so on.

UNIT_CONVERSION_NAME.description: Displays the name of the unit conversion.

TABLE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the table.

CS_VIEW_COLUMNS.description: Provides information about the columns defined for column store join views.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

TABLE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of table.

TABLE_NAME.description: Displays the table name of column.

CS_TYPE.description: Displays the column store data type.

IS_TEXT_SEARCHABLE..description: Displays whether the column is text searchable: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_FUZZY_SEARCHABLE..description: Displays whether the column is fuzzy searchable: TRUE/FALSE

CS_VIEW_PARAMETERS.description: Provides a list of parameters of the objects in the SAP HANA database. Only calculation views are considered. The parameters of a view are parsed from the definition of the underlying scenario.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema in which the object is deployed.

OBJECT_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the object. Only the calculation views are
listed. The calculation views are not shown if the underlying
calculation scenario has no parameter.

PARAMETER_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the parameter. If a parameter is referenced
by different views, then the parameters are listed for each view
separately. Normally, the parameters in a calculation views
begins and ends with “$$” character. For example:$$VAR$$.

IS_MANDATORY.description:
Displays whether a parameter is mandatory or not: TRUE/FALSE. If TRUE, the value of the
parameter should be provided either by setting the default value
or through the SQL query. If FALSE, setting the value of the
parameter is optional.

DEFAULT_VALUE.description:
Displays the default value of the parameter. This column is set
to an empty string when the parameter has no default value.

EVALUATED_DEFAULT_VALUE.description:
Displays the result of the evaluation of the expression in the
DEFAULT_VALUE column.

IS_DEFAULT_VALUE_VOLATILE.description: Displays whether or not the default value is volatile: TRUE/FALSE.

DATA_STATISTICS.description: Provides an overview of data statistics objects.

DATA_STATISTICS_OID.description: Displays the data statistics object ID.

DATA_STATISTICS_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the data statistics object schema.

DATA_SOURCE_OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the data source object type, for example, TABLE.

DATA_SOURCE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the data source.

DATA_SOURCE_OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name of the data source.

DATA_SOURCE_COLUMN_NAMES.description: Displays the column names of the data source.

DATA_SOURCE_STORAGE_TYPE.description: Displays the storage type of the data source: DEFAULT/EXTENDED.

DATA_SOURCE_PART_ID.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

CREATE_TIME.description: Displays the time when the data statistics object was created.

CONSTRAINT.description:
Displays the constraint for the build algorithm for the data statistics
object.

IS_PERSISTENT.description:
Displays whether the content of the data statistics object is persistent
or not: TRUE/FALSE.

REFRESH_TYPE.description: Displays the refresh type for the data statistics object.

IS_ENABLED.description: Displays whether the data statistics object is enabled: TRUE/FALSE.

LAST_REFRESH_TIME.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

LAST_REFRESH_REASON.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

MINVALUE_NUMERIC.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

MINVALUE_STRING.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

MAXVALUE_NUMERIC.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

MAXVALUE_STRING.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

COUNT.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

DISTINCT_COUNT.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

NULL_COUNT.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

CREATE_MEMORY.description:
Displays the memory size that the data statistics object uses in bytes.
This value is set in the CREATE STATISTICS statement.

LAST_REFRESH_MEMORY.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

CREATE_MEMORY_PERCENT.description:
Displays the memory size, as a percentage of the data source size, to be
used by the data statistics object specified in the CREATE STATISTICS
statement

LAST_REFRESH_MEMORY_PERCENT.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

CREATE_BUCKETS.description:
Displays the number of buckets specified in the CREATE STATISTICS
statement

LAST_REFRESH_BUCKETS.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

CREATE_QERROR.description:
Displays the parameter qerror for the data statistics object of type
HISTOGRAM as specified in the CREATE STATISTICS statement

LAST_REFRESH_QERROR.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

CREATE_QTHETA.description:
Displays the parameter qtheta for the data statistics object of type
HISTOGRAM as specified at the CREATE STATISTICS statement

LAST_REFRESH_QTHETA.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

CREATE_ACCURACY.description:
Displays the parameter accuracy for the data statistics object of type
SKETCH as specified in the CREATE STATISTICS statement

LAST_REFRESH_ACCURACY.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

CREATE_PREFIX_BITS.description:
Displays the parameter prefix bits for the data statistics object of type
SKETCH as specified at the CREATE STATISTICS statement.

LAST_REFRESH_PREFIX_BITS.description:
Deprecated. See the M_DATA_STATISTICS view for more information about
this column.

CREATE_SAMPLE_SIZE.description:
Displays the sample size, in bytes, to be used by the data statistics
object of type SAMPLE specified in the CREATE STATISTICS statement.

CREATE_SAMPLE_SIZE_PERCENT.description:
Displays the sample size, as a percentage of the data source size, to be
used by the data statistics object of type SAMPLE specified in the CREATE
STATISTICS statement.

VALID_FOR.description:
Displays how the data statistics object may be used: ESTIMATION/DATA
DEPENDENCY.

INVALIDATION_REASON.description:
Displays the reason for invalidating a data statistics object:NULLThe object is valid.USER ACTIONThe data statistics object is invalid because a user has
disabled it.ALTER TABLE MOVEThe data statistics object is disabled because a user relocated
the table to a different storage space.ALTER COLUMN DATA TYPEThe data statistics object is disabled because the data type of
the underlying column(s) no longer supports the statistics
type.

DATA_TYPES.description: Provides information about available SQL data types.

COLUMN_SIZE.description:
Displays the maximum size, in bytes, of the data type that this system
can support.

LITERAL_PREFIX.description:
Displays the ODBC 2.0 SQLGetTypeInfo VARCHAR. Character or characters
used to prefix a literal, for example, a single quotation mark (') for
character data types or 0x for binary data types; NULL is returned for
data types where a literal prefix is not applicable.

LITERAL_SUFFIX.description:
Displays the ODBC 2.0 SQLGetTypeInfo VARCHAR. Character or characters
used to terminate a literal, for example, a single quotation mark (') for
character data types; NULL is returned for data types where a literal
suffix is not applicable.

CREATE_PARAMS.description:
Displays the ODBC 2.0 SQLGetTypeInfo VARCHAR. A list of keywords,
separated by commas, corresponding to each parameter that the application
may specify in parentheses when using the name that is returned in the
TYPE_NAME field.

NULLABLE.description: Displays whether the data type can accept NULL or not.

CASE_SENSITIVE.description:
Displays the ODBC 2.0 SQLGetTypeInfo SMALLINT. Whether a character data
type is case-sensitive in collations and comparisons.

SEARCHABLE.description: Displays the how the data type can be used in the WHERE clause.

UNSIGNED_ATTRIBUTE.description: Displays whether the attribute is signed or unsigned.

FIXED_PREC_SCALE.description:
Displays the whether the data type has predefined fixed precision and
scale (ODBC).

AUTO_UNIQUE_VALUE.description: Displays whether the data type is auto incrementing (ODBC).

LOCAL_TYPE_NAME.description:
Displays the ODBC 2.0 SQLGetTypeInfo VARCHAR. Localized version of the
data source-dependent name of the data type.

MINIMUM_SCALE.description:
Displays the ODBC 2.0 SQLGetTypeInfo SMALLINT. The minimum scale of the
data type on the data source.

MAXIMUM_SCALE.description:
Displays the ODBC 2.0 SQLGetTypeInfo SMALLINT. The maximum scale of the
data type on the data source.

SQL_DATA_TYPE.description:
Displays the ODBC 3.0 SQLGetTypeInfo SMALLINT. The value of the SQL data
type as it appears in the SQL_DESC_TYPE field of the descriptor. This
column is the same as the DATATYPE column, except for interval and
DATETIME data types.

SQL_DATETIME_SUB.description:
Displays the ODBC 3.0 SQLGetTypeInfo SMALLINT. When the value of
SQL_DATATYPE is SQL_DATETIME or SQL_INTERVAL, this column contains the
DATETIME/interval subcode.

NUM_PREC_RADIX.description:
Displays the ODBC 3.0 SQLGetTypeInfo INTEGER. In case of an approximate
numeric data type, value is 2 to indicate that COLUMN_SIZE specifies the
number of bits. For exact numeric data types value 10 indicates that
COLUMN_SIZE specifies the number of decimal digits.

INTERVAL_PRECISION.description:
Displays the ODBC 3.0 SQLGetTypeInfo SMALLINT. If the data type is an
interval data type, then this column contains the value of the interval
leading precision. Otherwise, this column is NULL.

DEPENDENCY_RULES.description: For internal use only. Provides a list of dependency rules in the system.

DEPENDENCY_RULE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of dependency rule.

DEPENDENCY_RULE_NAME.description: Displays the name of dependency rule.

DEPENDENCY_RULE_TYPE.description: Displays the type of dependency rule.

DEPENDENCY_RULE_COLUMNS.description: For internal use only. Provides a list dependency rule columns in the system.

DEPENDENCY_RULE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the dependency rule.

DEPENDENCY_RULE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the dependency rule.

OBJECT_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the table that contains the column.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the name of the table that contains the column

DYNAMIC_RESULT_CACHE.description: Provides information about metadata objects that are enabled for a dynamic result cache.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name.

CACHE_TYPE.description:
Displays which type of cache is enabled for the object: FULL, PARTIAL (SELECTED COLUMNS),
PARTIAL (FILTERED), PARTIAL (SELECTED COLUMNS, FILTERED).

CACHE_FILTER.description:
Displays the filter condition specified to reduce the cache
size.

DYNAMIC_RESULT_CACHE_INDEX_COLUMNS.description: Provides information about the indexes of dynamic result caches.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name.

COLUMN_NAME.description: Displays the name of the indexed column.

EFFECTIVE_APPLICATION_PRIVILEGES.description: Provides information about the application privileges of the specified user.

USER_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the user for whom effective privileges are
shown.

GRANTEE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the name of the schema of the grantee

GRANTEE.description: Displays the user or role that has the privilege.

GRANTEE_TYPE.description: Displays the type of grant: USER/ROLE.

GRANTOR_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the role that provided the privilege.

GRANTOR.description: Displays the user or role that provided the privilege.

IS_GRANTABLE.description:
Displays whether the privilege was granted with WITH GRANT OPTION or WITH
ADMIN OPTION: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_VALID.description:
Displays whether the privilege is valid or has become invalid due to of
implicit revoking: TRUE/FALSE.

EFFECTIVE_MASK_EXPRESSIONS.description: Provides information as to how data is exposed to certain users in terms of data masking.

ROOT_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name. An equal predicate is required.

ROOT_OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the name of the object. An equal predicate is required.

ROOT_COLUMN_NAME.description: Displays the column name. An equal predicate is required.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the user name. An equal predicate is required.

EFFECTIVE_USER_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the effective user whom the mask expression enforced on the
underlying object it applies to.

DEPENDENT_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the dependent object.

DEPENDENT_OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name of the dependent object.

DEPENDENT_OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the type name of the dependent object.

DEPENDENT_COLUMN_NAME.description: Displays the name of the dependent column.

UNDERLYING_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the object at its current level.

UNDERLYING_OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name of the object at its current level.

UNDERLYING_OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the type name of the object at its current level.

UNDERLYING_COLUMN_NAME.description: Displays the name of the column at its current level.

MASK_EXPRESSION_STATUS.description:
Displays the status of the applied masking: NULL, APPLIED, NOT
APPLIED, SESSION USER APPLIED, or SESSION USER NOT APPLIED. The
status is NOT APPLIED if the effective user has an UNMASKED
privilege. The status is NULL if the specified column does not
have a mask definition.

EFFECTIVE_PRIVILEGES.description: Provides the privileges of the specified user.

USER_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the user for whom effective privileges are
shown.

GRANTEE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the name of the schema of the grantee

GRANTEE.description: Displays the user or role that has the privilege.

GRANTOR_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the role that provided the privilege.

GRANTOR.description: Displays the user or role that provided the privilege.

OBJECT_TYPE.description:
Displays the type of the granted object, for example, TABLE, SCHEMA, and
so on.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name the object belongs to.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name of granted object.

IS_GRANTABLE.description:
Displays whether the privilege was granted with WITH GRANT OPTION, WITH
ADMIN OPTION: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_VALID.description:
Displays whether the privilege is valid or has become invalid due to
implicit revoking: TRUE/FALSE.

EFFECTIVE_PRIVILEGE_GRANTEES.description: Provides information about who was granted (explicitly or implicitly via roles) a specified privilege.

GRANTEE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of role that has the privilege.

GRANTEE.description: Displays the user or role that has the privilege.

GRANTOR_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of role that provided the privilege.

GRANTOR.description: Displays the user or role that provided the privilege.

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the type of the granted object, for example, TABLE, SCHEMA, and so on.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name the object belongs to.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name of granted object.

IS_GRANTABLE.description:
Displays whether the privilege was granted with WITH GRANT OPTION or WITH ADMIN OPTION:
TRUE/FALSE.

EFFECTIVE_ROLES.description: Provides the roles of the current user.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the user for whom effective roles are shown.

GRANTEE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the name of the schema of the grantee.

GRANTEE.description: Displays the user or role that has the role.

GRANTOR.description: Displays the user who granted the role.

ROLE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the name of the schema of the role granted.

IS_GRANTABLE.description:
Displays whether the role was granted with WITH ADMIN OPTION:
TRUE/FALSE.

EFFECTIVE_ROLE_GRANTEES.description: Provides information regarding the users and roles that the role is granted to.

ROLE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the role for whom effective grantees are shown.

ROLE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the role for whom effective grantees are shown.

GRANTEE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of grantee that has the role.

GRANTEE.description: Displays the user or role that has the role.

GRANTOR.description: Displays the user that granted the role.

GRANTED_ROLE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of granted role.

IS_GRANTABLE.description: Displays whether the role was granted with WITH ADMIN OPTION: TRUE/FALSE.

EFFECTIVE_STRUCTURED_PRIVILEGES.description: Displays the structured privileges applied to an object.

ROOT_OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the name of the object.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the user name.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the name of the object.

EFFECTIVE_FILTER.description: Displays the filter condition applied from all structured privileges.

STRUCTURED_PRIVILEGE_SCHEMA_NAME.description:
Displays the schema name of a structured privilege created for an
object.

STRUCTURED_PRIVILEGE_NAME.description: Displays the name of a structured privilege created for an object.

STRUCTURED_PRIVILEGE_ID.description: Displays the ID of the structured privilege.

STRUCTURED_PRIVILEGE_FILTER.description: Displays the filter condition provided by the structured privilege.

STRUCTURED_PRIVILEGE_DEFAULT_SCHEMA_NAME.description:
Displays the default schema name of the structured privilege. This schema
name is used for unqualified tables and views in a complex filter.

STRUCTURED_PRIVILEGE_STATUS.description:
Displays the status of a particular structured privilege: APPLIED, NOT
GRANTED, NO MATCHING ATTRIBUTE, or NO FILTER VALUES FOUND.

ELEMENT_TYPES.description: Provides information about available multivalued types.

SCHEMA_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the schema containing the object defining or using
the collection type.

OBJECT_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the table, view, or procedure that defines or uses
the collection type.

OBJECT_OID.description:
Displays the identifier of the table, view, or procedure that defines or
uses the collection type.

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the object type: TABLE, VIEW, or FUNCTION.

ELEMENT_NAME.description: Displays the name of the table or view column or procedure parameter.

DATA_TYPE_ID.description: Displays the identifier of the element type.

DATA_TYPE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the element type.

LENGTH.description:
Displays the length for a character string type or the precision for a
numeric type in bytes.

SCALE.description: Displays the scale for a numeric type.

MIN_CARDINALITY.description: Displays the lower bound of the array.

MAX_CARDINALITY.description: Displays the upper bound of the array.

ALLOW_DUPLICATES.description: Indicates if duplicates are allowed within one column: TRUE/FALSE.

ROOT_KEY_TYPE.description:
Displays the usage type of the root key: PERSISTENCE, DPAPI, LOG,
BACKUP.

ROOT_KEY_VERSION.description: Deprecated: The version of the root key.

CREATE_TIMESTAMP.description: Displays the creation time of the root key (UTC).

IS_CONSISTENT.description:
Displays whether the key is consistent between persistence and
the SSFS file: TRUE/FALSE.

RESET_COUNT.description: Displays the number of consistency resets.

IS_USED.description:
Displays whether key version is the version used for encryption:
TRUE/FALSE.

ROOT_KEY_STATUS.description:
Displays the state of the root key: ACTIVE, PREACTIVE, or
DEACTIVATED.

ROOT_KEY_HASH.description: Displays the root key hash value.

IN_BACKUP.description:
Displays whether root key has been previously backed up:
TRUE/FALSE.

EPM_MODELS.description: Provides information about available EPM Models.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the EPM Model.

MODEL_NAME.description: Displays the name of the EPM Model.

COMMENTS.description: Displays the description of the EPM Model.

CDATA.description:
Displays the definition of the EPM Model with JSON representation.NoteThe CDATA column contains the underlying EPM
model in unescaped JSON format. It is not valid SQL and cannot be used
directly. Please ensure the content is properly JSON-escaped before
use.

EPM_QUERY_SOURCES.description: Provides information about available EPM query source.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the EPM query source.

QUERY_SOURCE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the EPM query source.

COMMENTS.description: Displays the description of the EPM query source.

CDATA.description:
Displays the definition of the EPM query source with JSON
representation.

EXPLAIN_CALL_PLANS.description: Provides information about the compiled plan of a given procedure.

OPERATOR_NAME.description: Displays the name of logical operator.

OPERATOR_STRING.description:
Displays the statement string or code (llvm, expression, ce) string, or se plan/operation in text
format.

RETURN_TYPES.description: Displays the list of return types.

INPUT_VALUES.description: Displays the list of values of input parameters.

OUTPUT_VALUES.description: Displays the list of values of output parameters.

EXECUTION_ENGINE.description: Displays the list of all involved execution frameworks.

DEFAULT_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the default schema of each operator.

PROCEDURE_DATABASE_NAME.description: Displays the name of database where procedure is defined.

PROCEDURE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the name of schema where procedure is defined.

PROCEDURE_NAME.description: Displays the name of outermost procedure.

SQLSCRIPT_OPERATOR_NAME.description: Displays the internal name used in SQLScript.

NESTED_STATEMENT_IDS.description: Displays the concatenated statement position with respect to SQL inlining.

SQLSCRIPT_OPERATOR_COST.description: Displays the estimated cost from the SQLScript optimizer.

OPERATOR_DETAILS.description: Displays additional information on the operator.

OPERATOR_ID.description: Displays the unique ID of an operator.

PARENT_OPERATOR_ID.description: Displays the operator ID of the parent of an operator.

LEVEL.description: Displays the level from the root operator.

POSITION.description: Displays the position in the parent operator.

STATEMENT_NAME.description: Displays the internal EXPLAIN PLAN command.

HOST.description:
Displays the target node where the execution is expected to take place in a distributed
system.

PORT.description:
Displays the target node where the execution is expected to take place in a distributed
system.

TIMESTAMP.description: Displays the date and time when the EXPLAIN PLAN command was executed.

EXPLAIN_PLAN_TABLE.description: Provides information about SQL query plan explanation results.

STATEMENT_NAME.description:
Displays the string specified as STATEMENT_NAME when executing the
EXPLAIN PLAN command. This is used to distinguish plans from each other
when there are multiple plans in EXPLAIN_PLAN_TABLE view.

OPERATOR_NAME.description:
Displays a column engine or row engine operator. See the Additional
Information section within this topic for more information about the
possible values in this column.

OPERATOR_DETAILS.description:
Displays details of an operator including predicates and expressions used
by the operator.

OPERATOR_PROPERTIES..description: Displays the internal properties of an operator.

EXECUTION_ENGINE.description: Displays the execution engine where the plan operator is executed: COLUMN, ROW, HEX or SQLScript.

DATABASE_NAME.description: Displays the database name that the object belongs to.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name the dependent object belongs to.

TABLE_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the database tables and views accessed by an
operator.

TABLE_TYPE.description: Displays the table stored type: COLUMN or ROW.

TABLE_SIZE.description:
Displays the estimated input row count of an operator. This is available
only for operators accessing tables and views directly.

OUTPUT_SIZE.description: Estimated output row count of an operator.

SUBTREE_COST.description:
Displays the estimated cost based on estimated cardinality information.
This value is used for the cost-based optimizer to choose the best plan.
The value can also be a possible indicator to compare two different plans
for the same query; the smaller the subtree cost, typically the better
the performance.

OPERATOR_ID.description:
Displays the unique ID of an operator. IDs are integers starting from
1.

PARENT_OPERATOR_ID.description:
Displays the operator ID of the parent of an operator. The shape of a
query plan is a tree and the topology of the tree can be reconstructed
using OPERATOR_ID and PARENT_OPERATOR_ID. The PARENT_OPERATOR_ID of the
root operator appears as NULL.

LEVEL.description:
Displays the level from the root operator. The level of the root operator
is 1, the level of a child of the root operator is 2, and so on. This can
be utilized for output indentation.

POSITION.description:
Displays the position in the parent operator. The position of the first
child is 1, the position of the second child is 2, and so on.

HOST.description: Displays the host where the plan operator is generated.

PORT.description: Displays the port where the plan operator is generated.

TIMESTAMP.description:
Displays the date and time when the EXPLAIN PLAN command was
executed.

FLEXIBLE_TABLES.description: Provides information about available flexible tables.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the table.

TABLE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the table.

TABLE_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the table.

IS_RECLAIMABLE.description: Displays whether the garbage collection is enabled: TRUE/FALSE.

DEFAULT_DATA_TYPE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the default data type.

DEFAULT_LENGTH.description: Displays the length of the default data type.

DEFAULT_SCALE.description: Displays the scale of the default data type.

HAS_AUTO_DATA_TYPE_PROMOTION.description: Displays whether the automatic type promotion is enabled: TRUE/FALSE.

FULLTEXT_INDEXES.description: Provides information about fulltext indexes on table columns.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

TABLE_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the table.

INDEX_NAME.description: Displays the name of the fulltext index.

INDEX_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the fulltext index.

LANGUAGE_COLUMN.description:
Displays the column name of the indexed table containing language
indicators for the indexed documents.

MIME_TYPE_COLUMN.description:
Displays the column name of the indexed table containing MIME type
indicators for the indexed documents.

LANGUAGE_DETECTION.description:
Displays the set of languages to be considered for automatic language
detection.

FAST_PREPROCESS.description:
Displays whether or not preprocessing is done with reduced functionality
(for example, linguistic search is not available), which speeds up the
indexing: TRUE/FALSE.

FUZZY_SEARCH_INDEX.description:
Displays whether or not a fuzzy search is performed with an additional
index (faster search, but higher memory consumption): TRUE/FALSE.

SEARCH_ONLY.description:
Displays whether or not the text-attributes do not store any DAFs (it is
not possible to retrieve the HTML-converted or original data from the
text-attribute): TRUE/FALSE. If the text-attribute is a shadow attribute
(created via CREATE FULLTEXT INDEX), the source-attribute containing the
original data is not affected by this flag.

IS_EXPLICIT.description:
Displays whether or not the index is an explicit fulltext index (created
by CREATE FULLTEXT INDEX): TRUE/FALSE.

FLUSH_AFTER_DOCUMENTS.description:
Displays the used to store change-tracking behavior of the fulltext
index.

FLUSH_EVERY_MINUTES.description:
Displays the data used to store the change-tracking behavior of the
fulltext index in minutes.

CONFIGURATION.description:
Displays that an explicit configuration file can be specified, for
example, to enable named entity extraction.

INTERNAL_COLUMN_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the internal text-attribute. This value is only set
if the fulltext index was not created using the TEXT data type.

PHRASE_INDEX_RATIO.description:
Displays the float between 0.0 and 1.0 which indicates how much memory
the phrase index may use as a percentage of the memory size of the
fulltext index.

TEXT_MINING.description:
Displays whether or not the text mining capabilities are enabled on the
indexed column: TRUE/FALSE.

TEXT_ANALYSIS.description:
Displays whether or not an additional table is created that stores text
analysis results: TRUE/FALSE. Normally, this parameter should be set to
FALSE.

MIME_TYPE.description: Displays the MIME type indicator for the indexed documents.

TOKEN_SEPARATORS.description: Displays the characters used as token separators.

TEXT_MINING_CONFIGURATION.description: Displays the configuration that is used for text mining.

TEXT_MINING_CONFIGURATION_OVERLAY.description:
Displays the data used to override certain parameters from the
configuration specified in TEXT_MINING_CONFIGURATION without changing the
configuration itself.

COMPRESSION_LEVEL.description:
Displays whether additional compression is applied to the fulltext index.
A value of 0 means no compression and a value of 1 or larger means that
compression is applied. The larger the value, the higher the
compression.

FULL_SYSTEM_INFO_DUMPS.description: Provides the FSIDs for the current database/tenant.

FILE_NAME.description: Displays the file name of the collection.

FILE_SIZE.description: Displays the file size in bytes.

FILE_MTIME.description: Displays the date the file was modified.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the function.

FUNCTION_NAME.description: Displays the name of the function.

FUNCTION_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the function.

SQL_SECURITY.description: Displays the SQL security setting of the function: DEFINER/INVOKER.

DEFAULT_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the unqualified objects in the function.

INPUT_PARAMETER_COUNT.description: Displays the input type parameter count.

RETURN_VALUE_COUNT.description: Displays the return value type parameter count.

IS_UNICODE.description: Displays whether the function contains Unicode: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_ENCRYPTED.description: Displays whether the function is encrypted: TRUE/FALSE.

DEFINITION.description: Displays the query string of the function.

FUNCTION_USAGE_TYPE.description:
Displays the usage type of the function: SCALAR, TABLE, AGGREGATE, or
WINDOW.

IS_VALID.description:
Displays whether the function is valid or not. This value becomes FALSE
when its base objects are changed or dropped: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_HEADER_ONLY..description: Displays whether the function is a header-only function: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_DETERMINISTIC.description: Displays whether the function is deterministic: TRUE/FALSE.

OWNER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the owner of the function.

CREATE_TIME.description: Displays the creation time of the function.

FUNCTION_PARAMETERS.description: Provides information about parameters for functions.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the function.

FUNCTION_NAME.description: Displays the name of the function.

FUNCTION_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the function.

SCALE.description: Displays the scale of the parameter.

POSITION.description: Displays the ordinal position of the parameter.

TABLE_TYPE_SCHEMA.description:
Displays the schema name of the table type if the DATA_TYPE_NAME is
TABLE_TYPE.

TABLE_TYPE_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the table type if the DATA_TYPE_NAME is
TABLE_TYPE.

IS_INPLACE_TYPE.description: Displays whether the parameter type is an inplace type: TRUE/FALSE.

PARAMETER_TYPE.description: Displays the parameter mode: IN, OUT, or INOUT.

HAS_DEFAULT_VALUE.description: Displays whether the parameter has a default value: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_NULLABLE.description: Displays whether the parameter accepts a NULL value: TRUE/FALSE.

FUNCTION_PARAMETER_COLUMNS.description: Provides information about columns that are available for function table parameters.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the function.

FUNCTION_NAME.description: Displays the name of the function.

FUNCTION_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the function.

PARAMETER_POSITION.description: Displays the ordinal position of the parameter.

COLUMN_NAME.description: Displays the name of the column in the table parameter.

POSITION.description: Displays the ordinal position of the column in the table parameter.

DATA_TYPE_NAME.description: Displays the SQL data type name of the column.

LENGTH.description: Depending on the data type:Displays the number of characters for characters typesDisplays the maximum number of digits for numeric typesDisplays the number of characters for datetime typesDisplays the number of bytes for LOB types

SCALE.description:
For numeric data types, displays the maximum number of digits to the right of the
decimal point. For time and timestamp data types, Displays
the decimal digits, which are defined as the number of
digits to the right of the decimal point in the second's
component of the data.

IS_NULLABLE.description: Displays whether the column can accept NULL values: TRUE/FALSE.

GEOCODE_INDEXES.description: Provides information about geocode indexes on tables.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

TABLE_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the table.

INDEX_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the index.

FLUSH_AFTER_ROWS.description: Used to store change-tracking behavior of the index.

FLUSH_EVERY_MINUTES.description: Used to store change-tracking behavior of the index.

GRANTED_PRIVILEGES.description: Provides information about privileges and roles granted to users.

GRANTEE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the name of the schema of the grantee.

GRANTEE.description: Displays the user or role the privilege is granted to.

GRANTOR.description: Displays the user who granted the privilege.

OBJECT_TYPE.description:
Displays the type of the granted object like: TABLE, SCHEMA, and so
on.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name the object belongs to.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name of granted object.

IS_GRANTABLE.description:
Displays whether the privilege was granted with WITH GRANT OPTION or
WITH ADMIN OPTION: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_VALID.description:
Displays whether the privilege is valid or has become invalid because of
implicit revoking: TRUE/FALSE.

GRANTED_ROLES.description: Provides information about roles granted to users or other roles.

GRANTEE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the name of the schema of the grantee.

GRANTEE.description: Displays the user or role the role is granted to.

ROLE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the name of the schema of the role granted.

ROLE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the granted role.

GRANTOR.description: Displays the user who granted the role.

IS_GRANTABLE.description:
Displays whether the role was granted wotj WITH ADMIN OPTION:
TRUE/FALSE.

IS_GRANTED_BY_LDAP.description: Displays whether the role is granted by LDAP: TRUE/FALSE.

GRAPH_WORKSPACES.description: Provides information about graph workspaces in the database.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the name of the schema the workspace resides in.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the workspace creator user name.

EDGE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of workspace edge table.

EDGE_TABLE_NAME.description: Displays the workspace edge table name.

EDGE_SOURCE_COLUMN_NAME.description: Displays the workspace source column name in the edge table.

EDGE_TARGET_COLUMN_NAME.description: Displays the workspace target column name in the edge table.

EDGE_KEY_COLUMN_NAME.description: Displays the workspace key column name in the edge table.

VERTEX_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the workspace vertex table.

VERTEX_TABLE_NAME.description: Displays the workspace vertex table name.

VERTEX_KEY_COLUMN_NAME.description: Displays the workspace key column name in the vertex table.

IS_VALID.description: Displays whether this workspace is valid: TRUE/FALSE.

HIERARCHY_OBJECTS.description: Provides the list of objects that hierarchy navigation functions can be run on.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name for the hierarchy.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the name of the hierarchy.

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the object type of the hierarchy: TABLE, VIEW, or FUNCTION.

OBJECT_OID.description: Dispalys the object ID of the hierarchy.

HINTS.description: Provides all available hints to be used in WITH HINT clauses.

HINT_NAME.description:
Displays the hint name that can be used inside the WITH HINT()
syntax.

DESCRIPTION.description: Displays a description of the hint.

INDEXES.description: Provides information about indexes on tables.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

TABLE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the table that the index is on.

TABLE_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the table that the index is on.

INDEX_NAME.description: Displays the name of the index.

INDEX_OID.description: Displays the object ID for the index.

INDEX_TYPE.description:
Displays the index type.Row store index types: BTREE, BTREE_UNIQUE, CPBTREE, or
CPBTREE_UNIQUE.Column store index types: INVERTED VALUE, INVERTED VALUE UNIQUE, INVERTED
HASH, INVERTED INDIVIDUAL, FULLTEXT
TEXT ANALYSIS, or GEOCODE.

CONSTRAINT.description:
Displays the constraint on the index: UNIQUE, NOT_NULL_UNIQUE, or
PRIMARY_KEY.

KEY_LENGTH.description: Displays the length of the key.

BTREE_FILL_FACTOR.description: Displays the B-tree fill factor from 50-100.

BTREE_SPLIT_TYPE.description: Displays the B-tree split type: SPLIT_PERCENT/SPLIT_INVOKER.

BTREE_SPLIT_POSITION.description: Displays the B-tree split position from 0-100.

CREATE_TIME.description: Displays the time that the index was created.

STORAGE_TYPE.description:
Displays the partial index storage type. NULL is returned if it is not a
partial index. For multistore partial index, the value can be a string of
DEFAULT|EXTENDED.

LOAD_UNIT.description: Displays the load unit for the index. Valid values are: COLUMN, PAGE, DEFAULT, or NULL.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

TABLE_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the table.

INDEX_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the index.

CONSTRAINT.description:
Displays the type of constraint on the index: UNIQUE, NOT_NULL_UNIQUE,
PRIMARY_KEY; Geocode type of the column: GEOCODE COUNTRY, GEOCODE STATE,
GEOCODE COUNTY, GEOCODE CITY, GEOCODE POSTAL_CODE, GEOCODE DISTRICT,
GEOCODE STREET, GEOCODE HOUSE_NUMBER, GEOCODE ADDRESS_LINE, or
GEOCODE.

COLUMN_NAME.description: Displays the name of the indexed column.

POSITION.description: Displays the ordinal position of the indexed column.

ASCENDING_ORDER.description:
Displays whether the indexed column is in ascending order:
TRUE/FALSE.

INVALID_CONNECT_ATTEMPTS.description: Provides the number of invalid connection attempts for a user between two successful connections.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the user.

SUCCESSFUL_CONNECT_TIME.description: Displays the time the valid connection was attempted.

INVALID_CONNECT_ATTEMPTS.description:
Displays the number of invalid connection attempts for this user since the last
successful connection.

JWT_PROVIDERS.description: Lists all of the JWT providers configured in the SAP HANA database.

JWT_PROVIDER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the JWT provider.

ISSUER_NAME.description:
Displays the name in the iss claim of the JWT tokens provided by
this provider.

EXTERNAL_IDENTITY_CLAIM.description:
Displays the claim provided in the JWT tokens to use when mapping
the SAP HANA user to an external user name.

IS_CASE_SENSITIVE.description:
Displays whether the user mapping is checked case sensitive:
TRUE/FALSE.

PRIORITY.description:
Displays the priority of the provider compared to other JWT
providers with an identical issuer.

IS_USER_CREATION_ENABLED.description:
Displays whether the provider is allowed to create a user
implicitly: TRUE/FALSE.

USER_CREATION_USER_TYPE.description:
Displays the type of user to create when user creation is
enabled: STANDARD, RESTRICTED

USER_CREATION_USERGROUP.description: Displays the user group a created user will be a member of.

USER_CREATION_AUTHORIZATION_MODE.description:
Displays the authorization mode of the automatic user creation.
Possible values are:NULL (automatic user creation is off)LDAP

JWT_PROVIDER_CLAIMS.description: Lists the additional claims with its values for the JWT provider.

JWT_PROVIDER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the JWT provider.

CLAIM.description: Displays the name of the claim.

OPERATION.description:
Specifies how the claim is used. Operation include: EQUALS, HAS
MEMBER, SET APPLICATION USER.

VALUE.description: Display the expected value of the claim in a JWT token.

JWT_USER_MAPPINGS.description: Lists all of the user-JWT mappings configured in the SAP HANA database.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the SAP HANA user name.

JWT_PROVIDER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the JWT provider.

EXTERNAL_IDENTITY.description: Displays the name of the user known to the JWT provider.

KEY_MANAGEMENT_CONFIGURATIONS.description: Displays information about the existing key management configurations.

CONFIGURATION_NAME.description: Displays the name of the key management configuration.

IS_ACTIVE.description:
Indicates whether this configuration is used by LSS to define access to SAP HANA's
sensitive information.

TYPE.description: Displays the type of external key management.

CLIENT_VERSION.description: Displays the version of the driver software.

PROPERTIES.description:
Displays a reduced version of the properties section of the<settings>JSON (the "credentials" object is
omitted).

CONFIGURATION_ID.description:
Displays the ID that uniquely identifies a key management
configuration.

LCM_PRODUCTS.description: Provides information about all installed product versions.

VENDOR_NAME.description: Dispalys the vendor name, for example, sap.com.

PRODUCT_NAME.description: Displays the technical name of the product.

VERSION.description: Displays the version number of the PPMS product version, for example, 1.0.

PPMS_ID.description:
Displays the technical ID of the product version, for example, the version one
identifying it in PPMS.

PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION.description: Displays the human-readable name of the product.

SP_STACK_ID.description: Displays the SP stack ID of the PPMS product version.

SP_STACK_DESCRIPTION.description: Displasy the human-readable name or description of the SP stack.

LCM_PRODUCT_INSTANCES.description: Provides information about all installed product instances.

VENDOR_NAME.description: Displays the name of the vendor. For example, sap.com.

PRODUCT_NAME.description: Displays the technical name of the product.

INSTANCE_DESCRIPTION.description: Displays the human-readable name of the product instance.

LCM_PRODUCT_INSTANCES_INCLUDED.description: Provides information about all installed included product instances.

VENDOR_NAME.description: Displays the name of the vendor. For example, sap.com.

PRODUCT_NAME.description: Displays the technical name of the product.

INSTANCE_DESCRIPTION.description: Displays the human-readable name of the product instance.

MASTER_PRODUCT_NAME.description: Displays the technical name of the including product.

MASTER_INSTANCE_ID.description: Displays the instance key of the including product instance.

LCM_SOFTWARE_COMPONENTS.description: Provides all installed software component versions.

VENDOR_NAME.description: Displays the name of the vendor, for example, sap.com.

COMPONENT_NAME.description: Displays the technical name of the software component version.

VERSION.description: Displays the version of the delivery unit (=SWC), for example, 1.

VERSION_SP.description: Displays the number of the SP, for example, 3.

VERSION_PATCH.description: Displays the number of the patch, for example, 37.

PPMS_ID.description:
Displays the technical ID of the software component version, for example, the one
identifying it in PPMS.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION.description: Displays the human-readable name of the software component version.

SP_NAME.description:
Displays the technical name of the support package, for example, SAPK-10000INATEST2 or
SP000.

SP_DESCRIPTION.description: Displays the human-readable name of the support package.

SP_PPMS_ID.description: Displays the 20-digit PPMS number of the installed support package.

LCM_SWID.description: Provides all software ID tags for installed software.

ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED.description:
Displays whether the SWID for the PV is available with tag entitlementDataRequired:
TRUE/FALSE (default).

PRODUCT_NAME.description: Displays the link to technical name of the product (LCM_PRODUCTS).

LDAP_PROVIDER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the LDAP provider.

LDAP_PROVIDER_ID.description: Displays the ID of the LDAP provider.

CREATE_TIME.description: Displays the creation time.

IS_DEFAULT.description: Displays whether the the LDAP provider is the default provider: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_SSL_USED.description:
Displays whether the connection to the configured LDAP Server uses SSL: TRUE/FALSE. If
SSL ON is specified for the provider, or if USER LOOKUP URL or
NESTED GROUP LOOKUP URL use 'ldaps://', the value is TRUE.
Otherwise, the value is FALSE.

IS_PROVIDER_ENABLED.description: Displays whether the LDAP provider is enabled for use: TRUE/FALSE.

ATTRIBUTE_DN.description: Displays the LDAP attribute to provide the LDAP distinguished name of a user.

ATTRIBUTE_MEMBER_OF.description:
Displays the LDAP attribute that provides the list of LDAP groups that the user is a
member of.

USER_TYPE_FOR_LDAP_USER_CREATION.description:
Displays the type of user to create when LDAP user creation is enabled. NULL if LDAP user
creation is not enabled: STANDARD, RESTRICTED, NULL

LDAP_PROVIDER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the LDAP provider.

URL TYPE.description: Displays the LDAP provider URL type.

URL.description: Displays the URL for the LDAP provider.

LDAP_USERS.description: Shows information about the users using LDAP authorization.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the user.

DN.description: Displays the distinguished name of the user in the LDAP server.

LAST_AUTHORIZATION_REFRESH_TIME.description: Displays the time of the last successful LDAP authorization refresh.

LIBRARIES.description: Provides information about available public language libraries.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the library.

LIBRARY_NAME.description: Displays the name of the library.

LIBRARY_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the library.

DEFAULT_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the unqualified objects in the library.

DEFINITION.description: Displays the query string for the library.

LIBRARY_TYPE.description: Displays the language of the library: SQLSCRIPT, BUILTIN.

IS_VALID.description:
Displays whether the library is valid: TRUE when base objects are valid and the
definition is valid. FALSE when the base objects for the library
are changed or dropped.

CREATE_TIME.description: Displays the creation time for the library.

LIBRARY_MEMBERS.description: Provides member information for SQLScript user-defined libraries.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the library.

LIBRARY_NAME.description: Displays the name of the library.

LIBRARY_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the library.

MEMBER_TYPE.description: Displays the member type: VARIABLE, PROCEDURE, or FUNCTION.

ACCESS_MODE.description:
Displays the access mode of the library member:PUBLIC when the member is accessible without
restriction.PRIVATE when the member is accessible within the
library.

DEFINITION.description: Displays the definition of the library member.

PRAGMAS.description: Displays the SQLScript user-defined test library pragmas.

COMMENTS.description: Displays the comments defined on user-defined libraries and members.

OBJECT_CATEGORY.description: Displays the object category of the object. The default is NULL.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the object.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name.

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the object type.

OBJECT_DEPENDENCIES.description: Provides information about dependencies between objects, such as which views refer to a specific table.

BASE_DATABASE_NAME.description: Displays the database name of the base objects.

BASE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the base object.

BASE_OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name of the base object.

BASE_OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the type of the base object.

DEPENDENT_DATABASE_NAME.description: Displays the database name of the dependent object.

DEPENDENT_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the dependent object.

DEPENDENT_OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name of the dependent object.

DEPENDENT_OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the type of the base dependency.

DEPENDENCY_TYPE.description:
Displays the type of dependency between the base and dependent
objects:Direct dependency (for example, the view uses a table)Indirect dependency that is referenced via direct dependency (for
example, the view references a table via another view)SAP internal (dependency to an implicit created object in
SQLScript)SAP internal (dependency to an implicit created object in
SQLScript)Dependency via a referential constraint

OBJECT_PRIVILEGES.description: Provides information about the types of objects and privileges that can be granted to those types of objects.

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the object type.

PRIVILEGE.description:
Displays the privilege that can be granted to this type of
object.

OWNERSHIP.description: Provides owner information for the objects available to the user who is querying the view.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the object.

OWNER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the object owner.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name.

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the object type.

APPLICATION_NAME.description: Displays the name of the application used for object creation.

PARTITIONED_TABLES.description: Provides general partitioning information for all partitions of a table.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

LEVEL_1_EXPRESSION.description:
Displays the partitioning expression for first-level
partitions.

LEVEL_1_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of partitions at the first level.

LEVEL_1_TYPE.description:
Displays the partitioning type at the first level: HASH, RANGE,
ROUNDROBIN, REPLICATE, or RANGE HETEROGENEOUS.

LEVEL_2_EXPRESSION.description: Displays the partitioning expression for second-level partitions.

LEVEL_2_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of partitions at the second level.

LEVEL_2_TYPE.description:
Displays the partitioning type at the second level: HASH, RANGE,
RANGE HETEROGENEOUS, or HASH HETEROGENEOUS. Heterogeneous
indicates an unbalanced partitioning scheme.

CROSS_STORAGE_UNIQUE_CONSTRAINTS.description:
Displays whether constraint checking is done across stores:
TRUE/FALSE.

PARTITIONING_ON_NON_PRIMARY_KEY_COLUMNS.description:
Displays whether partitioning is allowed on a non-primary key column: TRUE/FALSE. This
value is only relevant for tables with time-selection
partitioning.

PRIMARY_KEY_UPDATE.description:
Displays whether UPDATE statements are allowed on primary key
columns: TRUE/FALSE.

DYNAMIC_RANGE_THRESHOLD.description:
Displays the threshold after which a new partition is created
dynamically.

EXTENDED_STORAGE_ENABLE_DELTA.description:
Displays whether extended storage is enabled to use a
delta store: TRUE, FALSE, or NULL. NULL means that the system
couldn't retrieve the status from extended storage.

CHANGE_ID.description: Displays the order of database installations.

CHANGE_TIME.description:
Displays the timestamp when the database was upgraded or recovered to the current
version.

SYSTEM_ID.description: Displays the system ID of the SAP HANA instance.

HOST.description:
Displays the host name of the catalog master. Only users with INIFILE ADMIN or CATALOG
READ privileges are able to view this column.

PINNED_SQL_PLANS.description: Provides information on currently pinned SQL plans and corresponding hints.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the user who prepared the plan.

SESSION_USER_NAME.description:
Displays the session user name who prepared the plan. This is the same value as displayed in the
USER_NAME column in the M_CONNECTIONS monitored view.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name that the SQL plan belongs to.

IS_INTERNAL.description:
Displays whether the plan is executed from a database internal connection or a remote connection:
TRUE/FALSE.

ABAP_VARCHAR_MODE.description: Displays whether the value ABAP VARCHAR mode is enabled: TRUE/FALSE.

PIN_TIME.description: Displays the timestamp when the plan was pinned.

LAST_MODIFY_TIME.description: Displays the timestamp when the plan was modified.

HINT_STRING.description: Displays the text string to indicate a hint was applied.

SESSION_PROPERTIES.description: Displays the composed variables from the session context.

TYPE.description:
Displays the privilege type: SYSTEMPRIVILEGE, OBJECTPRIVILEGE,
PACKAGEPRIVILEGE, or APPLICATIONPRIVILEGE

PROCEDURES.description: Provides information about available stored procedures.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the stored procedure.

PROCEDURE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the stored procedure.

PROCEDURE_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the stored procedure.

SQL_SECURITY.description:
Displays the SQL security setting of the stored procedure:
DEFINER/INVOKER

DEFAULT_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the unqualified objects in the procedure.

INPUT_PARAMETER_COUNT.description: Displays the input type parameter count.

OUTPUT_PARAMETER_COUNT.description: Displays the output type parameter count.

INOUT_PARAMETER_COUNT.description: Displays the in/out type parameter count.

IS_UNICODE.description: Displays whether the stored procedure contains Unicode: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_ENCRYPTED.description: Displays whether the stored procedure is encrypted: TRUE/FALSE.

DEFINITION.description: Displays the query string of the stored procedure.

PROCEDURE_TYPE.description: Displays the type of the stored procedure.

READ_ONLY.description: Displays whether the procedure is read-only: TRUE/FALSE

IS_VALID.description:
Displays whether the procedure is valid: TRUE/FALSE. A procedure become
invalid when its base objects are changed or dropped.

IS_HEADER_ONLY.description:
Displays whether the procedure is a header only procedure:
TRUE/FALSE.

IS_DETERMINISTIC.description: Displays whether the stored procedure is deterministic: TRUE/FALSE.

HAS_TRANSACTION_CONTROL_STATEMENTS.description:
Displays whether the procedure has transaction control statements:
TRUE/FALSE.

AUTO_COMMIT_DDL.description:
Displays whether the stored procedure runs with autocommit DDL enabled:
TRUE/FALSE.

OWNER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the owner of the stored procedure.

CREATE_TIME.description: Displays the creation time of the procedure.

PROCEDURE_OBJECTS.description: Contains the results of the system procedure GET_PROCEDURE_OBJECTS.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the stored procedure.

PROCEDURE_NAME.description: Displays the procedure name of the stored procedure.

OBJECT_SCHEMA.description: Displays the schema name of the object in the stored procedure code.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name of the object in the stored procedure code.

OBJECT_TYPE_ID.description: Displays the type ID of the object in the stored procedure code.

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the type of the object in the stored procedure code.

START_POSITION.description:
Displays the start position of the object in the stored procedure
code.

END_POSITION.description: Displays the end position of the object in the stored procedure code.

PROCEDURE_PARAMETERS.description: Provides information about the stored procedure parameters.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the stored procedure.

PROCEDURE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the stored procedure.

PROCEDURE_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the stored procedure.

SCALE.description: Displays the scale of the parameter.

POSITION.description: Displays the ordinal position of the parameter.

TABLE_TYPE_SCHEMA.description:
Displays the schema name of the table type if DATA_TYPE_NAME is
TABLE_TYPE.

TABLE_TYPE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the table type if DATA_TYPE_NAME is TABLE_TYPE.

IS_INPLACE_TYPE.description: Displays whether the parameter type is an inplace type: TRUE/FALSE.

PARAMETER_TYPE.description: Displays the parameter mode: IN, OUT, or INOUT.

HAS_DEFAULT_VALUE.description: Displays whether the parameter has a default value: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_NULLABLE.description: Displays whether the parameter accepts a NULL value: TRUE/FALSE.

PROCEDURE_PARAMETER_COLUMNS.description: Lists available columns of table parameters of stored procedures.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the stored procedure.

PROCEDURE_NAME.description: Displays the same of the stored procedure.

PROCEDURE_OID.description: Displays the object ID of the stored procedure.

PARAMETER_POSITION.description: Displays the ordinal position of the parameter.

COLUMN_NAME.description: Displays the name of the column in the table parameter.

POSITION.description: Displays the ordinal position of the column in the table parameter.

DATA_TYPE_NAME.description: Displays the SQL data type name of the column.

LENGTH.description:
Displays the number of characters for character types, the number of max digits for
numeric types, the number of charactesr for datetime types, or
the number of bytes for LOB types,

SCALE.description:
For numeric types, displays the maximum number of digits to the right of the decimal
point. For time and timestamp types, displays the decimal digits
defined as the number of digits to the right of the decimal
point in the second's component of the data.

IS_NULLABLE.description: Displays whether the column is allowed to accept NULL values: TRUE/FALSE.

PROJECTION_VIEW_COLUMN_SOURCES.description: Provides information about available projection view columns.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

SOURCE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the source table schema name.

PSES.description: Provides information about personal security environments (PSE).

PSE_ID.description: Displays the unique ID of the PSE.

NAME.description: Displays the name of the PSE.

PURPOSE.description: Displays the purpose of the PSE.

OWNER_NAME.description: Displays the owner of the PSE.

PSE_CERTIFICATES.description: Provides information about certificates used in PSEs.

PSE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the PSE.

CERTIFICATE_ID.description: Displays the unique ID of the certificate.

SUBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the subject of the X.509 certificate.

ISSUER_NAME.description: Displays the issuer of the X.509 certificate.

VALID_FROM.description: Displays the start time of certificate's validity.

VALID_UNTIL.description: Displays the end time of certificate's validity.

CERTIFICATE_USAGE.description: Displays the certificate usage: OWN, CHAIN, or TRUST.

CERTIFICATE_NAME.description: Displays the unique name of the certificate.

PSE_PUBLIC_KEYS.description: Provides information about all public keys in a PSE store.

PSE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the PSE.

PUBLIC_KEY_NAME.description: Displays the unique name of the public key.

PSE_PURPOSE_OBJECTS.description: Provides information about all PSEs and their assigned providers or hosts, referred to as purpose objects.

PSE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the PSE store.

PURPOSE.description: Displays the purpose of the PSE store.

PURPOSE_OBJECT.description:
For JWT or SAML purposes, displays the name of the assigned provider. For the SSL
purpose, this is the assigned host name.

PUBLIC_KEYS.description: Provides information about all public keys.

PUBLIC_KEY_NAME.description: Displays a unique name of the public key

ALGORITHM.description: Displays the algorithm of this key (RSA or EC)

ALGORITHM_DETAILS.description: Displays the keysize for RSA or the used curve for EC

KEY.description: Displays the PEM representation of the key (PKCS1 or PKCS8)

KEY_ID_HINT.description:
Displays the hint ID this key has in an external key management system (e.g.
JWKS)

COMMENT.description: Displays the description for the key

CREATE_TIME.description: Displays the creation timestamp of the public key in the database

QUERY_PLANS.description: Plans how to handle query execution.

OPERATOR_DETAILS.description: Displays the detailed information on operators in the query plan.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name.

POSITION.description: Displays the position.
