Displays the nameserver configured roles: MASTER/SLAVE. During
installation, up to 3 hosts are automatically configured as MASTER
candidates. All others are SLAVE.

NAMESERVER_ACTUAL_ROLE.description:
Displays the nameserver actual roles: MASTER/SLAVE. Exactly one of the
master candidates is MASTER and all others are SLAVE.The MASTER name server and MASTER index server are both on the same
host.

INDEXSERVER_CONFIG_ROLE.description:
Displays the indexserver configured roles: WORKER/STANDBY.During SAP HANA system installation or host addition, hosts can be
assigned the SAP HANA server roles WORKER or STANDBY. The host can also
be assigned other roles.

INDEXSERVER_ACTUAL_ROLE.description:
Displays the indexserver roles: MASTER, SLAVE, or STANDBY. Exactly one
host is MASTER and all others are SLAVE or STANDBY.

HOST_CONFIG_ROLES.description:
Displays the host's configured database and SAP HANA option roles:
ETS_WORKER, ETS_STANDBY,EXTENDED_STORAGE_WORKER, EXTENDED_STORAGE_STANDBY,STANDBY,
STREAMING, WORKER, XS_WORKER, or XS_STANDBY.

HOST_ACTUAL_ROLES.description:
Displays the host's current database and SAP HANA option roles (these may
change due to host auto-failover): ETS_WORKER, ETS_STANDBY,EXTENDED_STORAGE_WORKER,
EXTENDED_STORAGE_STANDBY,STANDBY, STREAMING, WORKER, XS_WORKER,
or XS_STANDBY.

STORAGE_PARTITION.description:
Deprecated. This has been replaced by the STORAGE_CONFIG_PARTITION, and
STORAGE_ACTUAL_PARTITION columns.

STORAGE_CONFIG_PARTITION.description:
Displays the stable subpath to reassign the same storage partition after
failovers.

STORAGE_ACTUAL_PARTITION.description:
Displays the unique number of the mount sub-directory used by the host
for storing data and logs (also known as the "subpath").

WORKER_CONFIG_GROUPS.description:
Displays the stable classification values to assign hosts to logical
worker groups.

WORKER_ACTUAL_GROUPS.description:
Displays the current classification values to assign hosts to logical
worker groups.

M_LICENSE.description: Provides information on the currently valid license for the SAP HANA database that is installed on this system.

HARDWARE_KEY.description: Displays the hardware key of the SAP HANA installation.

PRODUCT_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the licensed software product, for example, SAP
HANA.

PRODUCT_LIMIT.description:
Displays the licensed amount of main memory as specified by the license
in bytes.

PRODUCT_USAGE.description:
Displays the peak memory allocation since installation, measured hourly,
in bytes.

START_DATE.description: Displays the start date of the validity period of the license.

EXPIRATION_DATE.description: Displays the expiration date of the validity period of the license.

LAST_SUCCESSFUL_CHECK.description:
Displays the latest date on which the license was successfully checked
and found valid.

PERMANENT.description:
Displays TRUE if the license is permanent and FALSE if the license is
temporary.

VALID.description: Indicates whether the license is valid or not: TRUE/FALSE.

ENFORCED.description:
Indicates whether the license is a memory-enforced license or not:
TRUE/FALSE.

LOCKED_DOWN.description:
Indicates whether the system is locked down due to license status:
TRUE/FALSE.

IS_DATABASE_LOCAL.description:
Indicates whether the license is a local database local license:
TRUE/FALSE. If FALSE, then the license is provided globally by the
SystemDB.

USAGE.description:
Displays the database license usage type: NONPRODUCTION, RUNTIME, FULL,
or ADMINISTRATION.

MEASUREMENT_XML.description:
Displays the measurement log produced for this licensed system with the
current memory consumption.

M_LICENSES.description: Provides information on all of the licenses (if any) that are installed on this system.

HARDWARE_KEY.description: Displays the hardware key of the SAP HANA installation.

GLAS_APPLICATION_ID.description: Displays the license ID for the software product.

PRODUCT_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the licensed software product, for example,
SAP HANA.

PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION.description: Displays the description of the licensed software product.

PRODUCT_LIMIT.description:
Displays the allowed product usage as specified by the license in bytes, for example,
main memory.

PRODUCT_LIMIT_DESCRIPTION.description:
Displays the description of the product usage to be measured and
its unit.

PRODUCT_USAGE.description:
Displays the peak product usage value during last 13 months, measured periodically, in
bytes.

MEASUREMENT_INTERVAL.description: Displays the interval of license measurement, in hours.

FIRST_INSTALLATION_TIME.description: Displays the date of the first installation of the license.

START_DATE.description:
Displays the start date of the validity period of the
license.

EXPIRATION_DATE.description:
Displays the expiration date of the validity period of the
license.

LAST_SUCCESSFUL_CHECK.description:
Displays the latest date on which the license was successfully
checked and found valid.

PERMANENT.description:
Displays TRUE if the license is permanent and FALSE if the
license is temporary.

VALID.description: Indicates whether the license is valid or not: TRUE/FALSE.

ENFORCED.description:
Indicates whether the license is a memory-enforced license or
not: TRUE/FALSE.

LOCKED_DOWN.description:
Indicates whether the system is locked down due to license
status: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_DATABASE_LOCAL.description:
Indicates whether the license is a local database local license:
TRUE/FALSE. If FALSE, then the license is provided globally by
the SystemDB.

GLAS_APPLICATION_ID.description: Displays the license ID for the software product.

MEASURE_TIME.description: Displays the the measurement completion time.

VALUE.description: Displays the measured value in bytes. This value is NULLwhen the measurement fails.

SUCCESSFUL.description:
Indicates whether or not the measurement was successful:
TRUE/FALSE.

M_LICENSE_MEASUREMENT_STATISTICS.description: Collects license measurement statistics from tenant databases.

GLAS_APPLICATION_ID.description: Displays the license ID for the software product.

PEAK_VALUE.description: Displays the peak value of the application for the given month and year in bytes.

M_LICENSE_USAGE_HISTORY.description: Information on the maximum resource consumption per time period, used for validity check of license installed on this system (if any).

PRODUCT_USAGE.description:
Displays the maximum utilized amount of main memory used in this period
in bytes.

PERIOD_START_TIME.description: Displays the start time of the period that the maximum was used in.

PERIOD_END_TIME.description: Displays the end time of the period the maximum was used in.

NUM_FAILED_MEASUREMENTS.description: Displays the number of failed measurements.

CLASS_SIZE.description: Displays the object class size in bytes.

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the object type: STD, KEY, or VAR.

KEY_SIZE.description: Displays the object key size in bytes.

KEY_PARTITION_PREFIX_SIZE.description: Displays the key partition prefix length in bytes.

CACHED_KEYS.description: Displays whether the cached keys are active: TRUE/FALSE.

COPY_ON_UPDATE.description: Displays whether copy on update is active: TRUE/FALSE.

PREFETCH.description: Indicates whether the prefetch is active: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_LOADED.description:
Indicates whether the statistics are loaded into the memory:
TRUE/FALSE.

OBJECT_SIZE_SUM.description: Displays the object size sum in bytes.

GC_PENDING_OBJECT_DELETE_COUNT.description:
Displays the count of objects that are deleted and not yet freed by the
garbage collection.

GC_PENDING_OBJECT_DELETE_SIZE_SUM.description:
Displays the transient size sum of the objects that are deleted and not
yet freed by the garbage collection in bytes.

HISTORY_OBJECT_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of transient history object versions that are not yet
freed by the garbage collection.

HISTORY_SIZE_SUM.description:
Displays the size sum, in bytes, of the transient history object versions
that are not yet freed by the garbage collection.

PAGE_SIZE_SUM.description: Displays the page size sum in bytes.

OBJECT_CREATE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of objects created since the last restart.

OBJECT_UPDATE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of objects updated since the last restart.

OBJECT_DELETE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of objects delete since the last restart.

HEAP_USAGE.description: Displays the memory currently used by the container in bytes.

CREATE_TIME.description: Displays the created timestamp.

M_LIVECACHE_LOCKS.description: Detailed information on the Object Management System (OMS) locks.

ID.description:
Displays the ID of the lock: OID, container ID, or schema ID, depending
on the lock class.

CONTAINER_ID.description: Displays the ID of the corresponding container.

CLASS.description: Displays the class that the lock belongs to.

GRANTED_MODE.description: Displays the mode that the lock has granted to some request(s).

MODE.description:
Displays the mode that the request is requesting on the lock: Free,
IntendShare, IntendExclusive, Share, ShareIntendExclusive, or
Exclusive.

TYPE.description:
Displays when the lock can be removed, either at transaction-end (EOT) or
if not visible anymore (Consistent).

STATE.description: Displays the state of the lock request.

TID.description: Displays the transaction ID belonging to this lock request.

TIMEOUT.description: Displays remaining timeout, if a timeout is specified.

CONTAINER_EXCLUSIVE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of exclusive lock requests on containers.

CONTAINER_SHARED_COUNT.description: Displays the number of shared lock requests on containers.

CONTAINER_COLLISION_COUNT.description: Displays the number of lock collisions on containers.

CONTAINER_TIMEOUT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of lock timeouts on containers.

SCHEMA_EXCLUSIVE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of exclusive lock requests on schemas.

SCHEMA_SHARED_COUNT.description: Displays the number of shared lock requests on schemas.

SCHEMA_COLLISION_COUNT.description: Displays the number of lock collisions on schemas.

SCHEMA_TIMEOUT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of lock timeouts on schemas.

OBJECT_EXCLUSIVE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of exclusive lock requests on objects

OBJECT_SHARED_COUNT.description: Displays the number of shared lock requests on objects.

OBJECT_COLLISION_COUNT.description: Displays the number of lock collisions on objects.

OBJECT_TIMEOUT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of timeouts on objects.

COMMITTED_REQUESTS_COUNT.description: Displays the number of committed requests.

M_LIVECACHE_OMS_VERSIONS.description: Detailed information on the OMS versions that currently exists.

VERSION_ID.description: Displays the ID of the OMS version.

CREATE_DATE.description: Displays the timestamp of the creation of the OMS version.

LAST_OPEN_DATE.description: Displays the timestamp when the OMS version was opened last.

IS_OPEN.description:
Displays the flag indicating whether the version is currently open:
TRUE/FALSE.

CONNECTION_ID.description:
Displays the ID of the connection/session that the version is bound
to.

LIVECACHE_MVCC_SNAPSHOT_TIMESTAMP.description: Displays the consistent view MVCC snapshot timestamp.

HEAP_USAGE.description: Displays the memory that is currently used by the version in bytes.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name.

CALL_COUNT.description: Displays the number of calls of the procedure.

SUM_RUN_TIME.description: Displays the total runtime of the procedure in microseconds.

MAX_RUN_TIME.description: Displays the maximum runtime of the procedure in microseconds.

MIN_RUN_TIME.description: Displays the minimum runtime of the procedure in microseconds.

AVERAGE_RUN_TIME.description: Displays the average runtime of the procedure in microseconds.

DEREF_COUNT.description: Displays the number of OID derefs.

DEREF_BASE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of OID derefs against basis.

DEREF_BASE_IN_VERSION_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of OID derefs against basis from within an OMS
version.

DEREF_KEYED_OBJECT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of key derefs.

DEREF_KEYED_OBJECT_BASE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of key derefs against basis.

DEREF_KEYED_OBJECT_BASE_IN_VERSION_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of key derefs against basis from within an OMS
version.

ITER_BASE_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of objects read via an OID-iterator from the
basis.

ITER_KEYED_OBJECT_BASE_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of objects read via a key-iterator from the
basis.

ITER_BASE_IN_VERSION_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of objects read via an OID-iterator from the basis
from within an OMS version.

ITER_IN_VERSION_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of objects, created in an OMS-version, read via an
OID-iterator .

ITER_KEYED_OBJECT_BASE_IN_VERSION_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of objects read via an OID-iterator from the basis
from within an OMS version.

ITER_KEYED_OBJECT_IN_VERSION_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of objects, created in an OMS version, read via a
key-iterator.

DEREF_VAR_OBJECT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of derefs of var objects.

DEREF_VAR_OBJECT_BASE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of derefs of var objects against basis.

DEREF_VAR_OBJECT_BASE_SIZE.description:
Displays the accumulated size of var objects read from the basis in
bytes.

DEREF_VAR_OBJECT_BASE_IN_VERSION_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of derefs of var objects against basis from within an
OMS version.

DEREF_VAR_OBJECT_BASE_IN_VERSION_SIZE.description:
Displays the accumulated size of var objects read from the basis from
within an OMS version in bytes.

NEW_OBJECT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of newly created standard objects.

NEW_KEYED_OBJECT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of newly created keyed objects.

NEW_VAR_OBJECT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of newly created var objects.

NEW_OBJECT_IN_VERSION_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of newly created standard objects in an OMS
version.

PARTITION_ID.description:
Displays the partition ID. Returns the following:For partitioned tables, the part ID is equal to the sequential number
of the partition, starting at 1.In the case of replicated tables, the part ID is 1 for the original
table and subsequent part IDs are assigned to replica tables.The part ID is 0 for tables that are not partitioned.A part ID value of -1 indicates that a modification of the table
schema is in progress.

SEGMENT_ID.description: Displays the log segment ID within the partition.

FILE_NAME.description: Displays the log segment file name.

FILE_OFFSET.description: Displays the start position of the log segment in the file.

STATE.description:
Displays the log segment state:FormattingThe log segment is being formatted and not yet used.PreallocatedThe log segment has been preallocated, but never used.WritingThe log segment is currently being written.ClosedThe log segment is closed, not backed up and is still required
for restart.TruncatedThe log segment is not required for restart, but has not been
backed up.BackedUpThe log segment has been backed up, but is still required for
restart.RetainedFreeThe log segment has been backed up and is not required for
restart, but is required to resync the system replication
sites.FreeThe log segment has been backed up, it is not required for
restart and can be reused.ClosedIncopleteThe log segment has been closed in an incomplete state on a system replication site. This is a temporary state that
persists until system replication reconnects or a takeover occurs.FreeIncompleteThe log segment has been designated as 'free' in an incomplete state, typically following scenarios like a system
replication takeover or log corruption.

MIN_POSITION.description: Displays the first position contained in the log segment.

MAX_POSITION.description:
Displays the position behind the last log record in the log segment. This
value is for closed log segments only.

HOLE_POSITION.description:
Displays the start position of the log hole before the log segment. This
value is equal to MIN_POSITION if there is no hole.

USED_SIZE.description: Displays the used log segment size in bytes.

TOTAL_SIZE.description: Displays the total log segment size in bytes.

IN_BACKUP.description:
Indicates whether or not the flag for the log segment is in the backup:
TRUE/FALSE

LAST_COMMIT_TIME.description: Displays the timestamp of the last commit in the log segment.

ENCRYPTION_KEY_HASH.description: Displays the hash of the key used for the log segment encryption.

M_MEMORY.description: Deprecated. For service-specific information related to memory, use the M_SERVICE_MEMORY System View topic and for host-specific information related to memory, use the M_HOST_RESOURCE_UTILIZATION System View topic.

VALUE.description: Displays the size of the memory in bytes.

TYPE.description: Displays the object (statistic) type.

OBJECT_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of objects currently in the memory object
container.

OBJECT_SIZE.description:
Displays the size of the objects that are currently in the memory object
container in bytes.

NON_SWAPPABLE_SIZE.description:
Displays the size of the non-swappable objects that are currently in the
memory object container in bytes.

SWAPPABLE_SIZE.description:
Displays the size of the swappable objects that are currently in the
memory object container in bytes.

PUT_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of put objects.

PUT_SIZE.description: Displays the total size of put objects in bytes.

PUT_FAILURE_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of objects not added to the memory object container,
due to key conflicts.

GET_HIT_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of successful get operations.

GET_MISS_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of get operations that failed because the
object was not found in the memory object container.

MOVE_IN_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of objects moved in from a different
statistic.

MOVE_IN_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size of objects moved in from a different statistic in
bytes.

MOVE_OUT_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of objects moved out to a different
statistic.

MOVE_OUT_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size of objects moved out to a different statistic in
bytes.

EVICT_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of evicted objects.

EVICT_SIZE.description: Displays the total size of evicted objects in bytes.

TEMP_EVICT_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of temp-evicted objects.

TEMP_EVICT_SIZE.description: Displays the total size of temp-evicted objects in bytes.

RESIZE_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of resizes of objects.

RESIZE_DELTA_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size delta changed by the resize of the objects in
bytes.

SHRINK_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of shrunken objects.

SHRINK_SIZE.description: Displays the total size of shrunken objects in bytes.

RETENTION_PERIOD_SHRINK_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of shrunken objects due to an unused retention
period.

RETENTION_PERIOD_SHRINK_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size of shrunken objects due to an unused retention
period in bytes.

PAGE_LOADABLE_COLUMNS_LIMIT_SHRINK_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of shrunken objects due to a paged attribute
limit violation.

PAGE_LOADABLE_COLUMNS_LIMIT_SHRINK_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size of shrunken objects due to paged attribute limit
violation in bytes.

FAILED_SHRINK_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of the objects that the shrink failed to
remove.

FAILED_SHRINK_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size of the objects that the shrink failed to remove
in bytes.

UPPER_LIMIT.description:
Displays the effective upper size limit (in bytes) for objects of this
memory object type. If the total memory usage for objects belonging to
this memory object type exceeds the UPPER_LIMIT, an automatic unload is
triggered.

LOWER_LIMIT.description:
Displays the effective lower size limit (in bytes) for objects of this
memory object type. If an automatic unload has been triggered because the
UPPER_LIMIT was exceeded, the unload execution stops when the total
memory usage falls below the LOWER_LIMIT.

RESOURCE_CATEGORY.description:
Displays the resource category. CACHE indicates that the object has been
used as a cache.

M_MEMORY_OBJECT_DISPOSITIONS.description: Displays the disposition-specific memory object statistics.

TYPE.description: Displays the object statistic type.

CATEGORY.description:
Displays the allocator category, the corresponding allocator, and some of
its sub-allocators that were used to allocate the memory objects.

TEMPORARY_OBJECT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of temporary objects.

PAGE_LOADABLE_COLUMNS_OBJECT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of page loadable column objects.

EARLY_UNLOAD_OBJECT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of early unload objects.

INTERNAL_SHORT_TERM_OBJECT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of internal short term objects.

SHORT_TERM_OBJECT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of short term objects.

MID_TERM_OBJECT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of mid term objects.

LONG_TERM_OBJECT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of long term objects.

NON_SWAPPABLE_OBJECT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of non-swappable objects.

TEMPORARY_OBJECT_SIZE.description: Displays the size of the temporary objects in bytes.

PAGE_LOADABLE_COLUMNS_OBJECT_SIZE.description: Displays the size of page loadable column objects in bytes.

EARLY_UNLOAD_OBJECT_SIZE.description: Displays the size of the early unload objects in bytes.

INTERNAL_SHORT_TERM_OBJECT_SIZE.description: Displays the size of the internal short term objects in bytes.

SHORT_TERM_OBJECT_SIZE.description: Displays the size of the short term objects in bytes.

MID_TERM_OBJECT_SIZE.description: Displays the size of the mid term objects in bytes.

LONG_TERM_OBJECT_SIZE.description: Displays the size of the long term objects in bytes.

NON_SWAPPABLE_OBJECT_SIZE.description: Displays the size of the non swappable objects in bytes.

SHRINKABLE_OBJECT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of shrinkable objects.

SHRINKABLE_OBJECT_SIZE.description: Displays the size of the shrinkable objects in bytes.

SERVICE_NAME.description: Displays the service name.

SAMPLING_INTERVAL.description: Displays the sampling interval in milliseconds.

START_TIME.description: Displays the start time.

REMAINING_SECONDS.description: Displays the remaining seconds until an automatic stop.

STATUS.description: Displays the status: STARTED/STOPPED.

HAS_CALLSTACKS.description:
Indicates whether or not the profiler has callstacks recorded:
TRUE/FALSE.

FILE_SIZE.description: Displays the size of the file in bytes.

M_MEMORY_RECLAIM_STATISTICS.description: Provides statistics for reclaiming memory (for example, defragmentation, unloading of memory objects, and so on).

STATISTICS_ID.description: Displays the statistics object unique ID.

MEMORY_RECLAIM_COUNT.description: Displays the number of memory reclaims.

LAST_MEMORY_RECLAIM_DURATION.description:
Displays the time needed in milliseconds to reclaim memory for the last
allocation.

MAX_MEMORY_RECLAIM_DURATION.description:
Displays the longest time needed in milliseconds to reclaim memory for
the allocation.

MIN_MEMORY_RECLAIM_DURATION.description:
Displays the shortest time needed in milliseconds to reclaim memory for
the allocation.

SUM_MEMORY_RECLAIM_DURATION.description:
Displays the total time needed in milliseconds to reclaim memory for all
allocations.

AVG_MEMORY_RECLAIM_DURATION.description:
Displays the average time needed in milliseconds to reclaim memory for
the allocation.

LAST_SYNCHRONIZATION_DURATION.description:
Displays the last wait time in milliseconds while other thread/process
reclaims memory.

MAX_SYNCHRONIZATION_DURATION.description:
Displays the longest wait time in milliseconds while other thread/process
reclaims memory.

MIN_SYNCHRONIZATION_DURATION.description:
Displays the shortest wait time in milliseconds while other
thread/process reclaims memory.

SUM_SYNCHRONIZATION_DURATION.description:
Displays the total wait time in milliseconds while other thread/process
reclaims memory.

AVG_SYNCHRONIZATION_DURATION.description:
Displays the average wait time in milliseconds while other thread/process
reclaims memory.

LAST_DEFRAGMENTATION_DURATION.description: Displays the duration in milliseconds of the last defragmentation.

MAX_DEFRAGMENTATION_DURATION.description: Displays the longest duration in milliseconds of defragmentation.

MIN_DEFRAGMENTATION_DURATION.description: Displays the shortest duration in milliseconds of defragmentation.

SUM_DEFRAGMENTATION_DURATION.description: Displays the total duration in milliseconds of defragmentation.

AVG_DEFRAGMENTATION_DURATION.description: Displays the average duration in milliseconds of defragmentation.

LAST_DEFRAGMENTATION_SIZE.description: Displays the size in bytes freed by the last defragmentation.

MAX_DEFRAGMENTATION_SIZE.description: Displays the largest size in bytes freed by defragmentation.

MIN_DEFRAGMENTATION_SIZE.description: Displays the smallest size in bytes freed by defragmentation.

SUM_DEFRAGMENTATION_SIZE.description: Displays the total size freed in bytes by defragmentation).

AVG_DEFRAGMENTATION_SIZE.description: Displays the average size in bytes freed by defragmentation.

LAST_MEMORY_OBJECT_UNLOAD_DURATION.description:
Displays the duration in milliseconds of the last unload. Also see view
M_MEMORY_OBJECTS.

MAX_MEMORY_OBJECT_UNLOAD_DURATION.description:
Displays the longest duration in milliseconds of all unloads. Also see
view M_MEMORY_OBJECTS.

MIN_MEMORY_OBJECT_UNLOAD_DURATION.description:
Displays the shortest duration in milliseconds of all unloads. Also see
view M_MEMORY_OBJECTS.

SUM_MEMORY_OBJECT_UNLOAD_DURATION.description:
Displays the total duration in milliseconds of all unloads. Also see
view M_MEMORY_OBJECTS.

AVG_MEMORY_OBJECT_UNLOAD_DURATION.description:
Displays the average duration in milliseconds of all unloads. Also see
view M_MEMORY_OBJECTS.

LAST_MEMORY_OBJECT_UNLOAD_SIZE.description:
Displays the size in bytes freed by the last unloading of memory objects.
Also see view M_MEMORY_OBJECTS.

MAX_MEMORY_OBJECT_UNLOAD_SIZE.description:
Displays the largest size in bytes freed by unloading memory objects.
Also see view M_MEMORY_OBJECTS.

MIN_MEMORY_OBJECT_UNLOAD_SIZE.description:
Displays the smallest size in bytes freed by unloading memory objects.
Also see view M_MEMORY_OBJECTS.

SUM_MEMORY_OBJECT_UNLOAD_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size in bytes freed by unloading memory objects. Also
see view M_MEMORY_OBJECTS.

AVG_MEMORY_OBJECT_UNLOAD_SIZE.description:
Displays the average size in bytes freed by unloading memory objects.
also see view M_MEMORY_OBJECTS.

M_MERGED_TRACES.description: Contains the merged content of the server trace files for all of the SAP HANA services.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the database user.

SERVICE_NAME.description: Displays the service name.

TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the transaction ID.

THREAD_ID.description: Displays the ID of thread that wrote trace entry.

TIMESTAMP.description: Displays the time when trace entry was written.

SOURCE_FILE_NAME.description: Displays the source file which contains the trace.

TRACE_FILE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the trace file containing the trace entry.

APPLICATION_NAME.description: Displays the application name.

PASSPORT_ROOTCONTEXT_ID.description:
Displays the extended passport (EPP) GUID identifying the source of
request.

PASSPORT_TRANSACTION_ID.description:
Displays the extended passport (EPP) GUID identifying the business
transaction.

PASSPORT_CONNECTION_ID.description: Displays the extended passport (EPP) GUID identifying the connection.

PASSPORT_CONNECTION_COUNTER.description: Displays the extended passport (EPP) connection counter.

PASSPORT_COMPONENT_NAME.description:
Displays the extended passport (EPP) component name of the initial/root
context.

PASSPORT_ACTION_TYPE.description: Displays the extended passport (EPP) component action type.

PASSPORT_PREVIOUS_COMPONENT_NAME.description:
Displays the extended passport (EPP) passport component name of the
previous context.

PASSPORT_USER_ID.description: Displays the extended passport (EPP) user ID.

PASSPORT_TRACE_FLAGS.description: Displays the extended passport (EPP) trace flags.

M_METADATA_CACHE_STATISTICS.description: Provides information regarding the efficiency and use of the metadata cache.

CACHE_GROUP_NAME.description: Displays the category name of the cache group.

ORIGIN_DATABASE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the original database that the cache group belongs to.

ACCESS_COUNT.description: Displays the access count of the cache group.

HIT_COUNT.description: Displays the cache hit count of the cache group.

EMPTY_HIT_COUNT.description: Displays the empty cache hit count of the cache group.

LATE_HIT_COUNT.description:
Displays the duplicated metadata request count to the master node. This count only occurs
in the race conditions of the thread.

NOT_FOUND_COUNT.description: Displays the empty result response count of the master node.

REVALIDATION_COUNT.description: Displays the revalidation count of old cache items.

MISS_COUNT.description: Displays the cache miss count of the cache group.

ENTRY_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of items in the cache group.

INVALID_ENTRY_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of invalid cache items. These items are set to invalid and removed
during the next garbage collection.

VALID_ENTRY_COUNT.description: Displays the number of valid cache items.

STALE_ENTRY_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of stale cache items. These are set as expired by default at the
expiration time. These items can be revalidated later or removed
at the next garbage collection.

USED_MEMORY_SIZE.description: Displays the size of the memory occupied by the cache group in bytes.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

VIEW_NAME.description: Displays the name of the monitoring view.

DESCRIPTION.description: Displays the short description of the monitoring view.

RESETTABLE.description:
Indicates whether or not the values of this view can be reset:
TRUE/FALSE.

M_MONITOR_COLUMNS.description: All the columns in the monitoring views.

VIEW_NAME.description: Displays the name of the monitoring view.

VIEW_COLUMN_NAME.description: Displays the name of the monitoring view column.

DATA_TYPE_ID.description: Displays the column data type ID.

DATA_TYPE_NAME.description: Displays the column data type name.

POSITION.description: Displays the ordinal position of the column in a record.

UNIT.description: Displays the unit for the value.

IS_NULLABLE.description: Indicates whether or not a NULL value is allowed: TRUE/FALSE.

DESCRIPTION.description: Displays the short description of the monitoring view column.

M_MULTIDIMENSIONAL_STATEMENT_STATISTICS.description: Displays all multidimensional statement statistics gathered since the server started. This information does not persist when you restart the server.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the user.

APPLICATION_USER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the application user.

APPLICATION_NAME.description: Displays the name of the application.

STATEMENT_TYPE.description: Displays the statement type as either INA or MDX.

LAST_CONNECTION_ID.description: Displays the last connection ID that executed the statement.

LAST_EXECUTION_TIMESTAMP.description: Displays the time of the last execution.

LAST_METADATA_READ_DURATION.description: Displays the last metadata read duration.

LAST_QUERY_PREPARATION_DURATION.description: Displays the last query preparation duration.

LAST_PLAN_EXECUTION_DURATION.description: Displays the last plan execution duration.

LAST_POST_PROCESSING_DURATION.description: Displays the last post processing duration.

LAST_CUBE_PROCESSING_DURATION.description: Displays the last cube processing duration.

LAST_PLAN_EXECUTION_RESULTSET_SIZE.description:
Displays the last size of the intermediate result returned by the plan execution, in
bytes.

LAST_RESULTSET_SIZE.description: Displays the size of the last result set, in bytes.

LAST_RESULTSET_CELL_COUNT.description: Displays the number of cells in the last result set.

LAST_HIERARCHY_COUNT.description: Displays the latest number of hierarchies.

LAST_CACHED_HIERARCHY_COUNT.description: Displays the last number of hierarchy cache hits.

LAST_CALCULATION_ENTITY_COUNT.description: Displays the last number of calculation entities.

LAST_CALCULATION_ENTITY_GROUP_COUNT.description: Displays the last number of calculation entity groups.

LAST_DRILL_DIMENSION_COUNT.description: Displays the last number of dimensions in the drill.

LAST_AGGREGATION_DIMENSION_COUNT.description: Displays the last number of aggregation dimensions.

LAST_SERIALIZED_CUBE_SIZE.description: Displays the last size of the serialized cube, in bytes.

LAST_REQUEST_QUEUE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of jobs waiting in the request queue.

LAST_EXECUTION_STATUS.description: Displays the last execution status of the statement.

TOTAL_METADATA_CACHE_HIT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of data cache hits.

TOTAL_DATA_CACHE_HIT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of data cached hits.

TOTAL_EXECUTION_TIME.description: Displays the total time of the execution.

AVG_EXECUTION_TIME.description: Displays the average time of the execution.

MIN_EXECUTION_TIME.description: Displays the minimum time of the execution.

MAX_EXECUTION_TIME.description: Displays the maximum time of the execution.

MAX_EXECUTION_MEMORY_SIZE.description: Displays the maximum memory size in bytes.

M_MUTEXES.description: Provides information about single mutex (mutual exclusion) objects or groups of mutex objects.

STATISTICS_ID.description: Displays the statistics object unique ID.

LOCK_COUNT.description: Displays the number of lock calls.

WAIT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of blocking lock calls.

SPURIOUS_WAKEUP_COUNT.description: Displays the number of spurious wakeups (collisions on futex).

OWNER_ID.description: Displays the context ID of the owner context.

LAST_WAIT_TIME.description: Displays the last time of the blocking lock calls in microseconds.

MAX_WAIT_TIME.description: Displays the maximum time of the blocking lock calls in microseconds.

MIN_WAIT_TIME.description: Displays the minimum time of the blocking lock calls in microseconds.

SUM_WAIT_TIME.description: Displays the total time of the blocking lock calls in microseconds.

AVG_WAIT_TIME.description: Displays the average time of the blocking lock calls in microseconds.

CREATE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of mutex creations (for shared statistics only).

DESTROY_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of mutex destructions (for shared statistics
only).

M_MVCC_OVERVIEW.description: Provides an overview of the row-store Multiversion Concurrency Control (MVCC) manager.

VERSION_COUNT.description: Displays the number of all versions in the host.

DATA_VERSION_COUNT.description: Displays the number of data versions per service.

METADATA_VERSION_COUNT.description: Displays the number of metadata versions per service.

MIN_MVCC_SNAPSHOT_TIMESTAMP.description:
Displays the minimum MVCC timestamp which at least one transaction
holds.

GLOBAL_MVCC_TIMESTAMP.description: Displays the current global MVCC timestamp.

MIN_READ_TRANSACTION_ID.description:
Indicates that all active transactions can see the changes of TRANSACTION
IDs less than or equal to MIN_READ_TRANSACTION_ID.

MIN_WRITE_TRANSACTION_ID.description:
Indicates that all write transactions with a TRANSACTION ID less than or
equal to MIN_WRITE_TRANSACTION_ID are closed.

NEXT_WRITE_TRANSACTION_ID.description:
Displays the maximum TRANSACTION ID which is assigned to the next write
transaction.

ACQUIRED_LOCK_COUNT.description: Displays the number of acquired records locks.

MAX_VERSIONS_PER_PARTITION.description: Displays the max number of versions per partition.

M_MVCC_SNAPSHOTS.description: Provides detailed snapshot information of the Multiversion Concurrency Control (MVCC) manager.

TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the associated transaction object ID.

MVCC_SNAPSHOT_TIMESTAMP.description: Displays the MVCC timestamp of the snapshot.

STATEMENT_ID.description: Displays the associated logical statement ID.

RELATED_TABLES.description: Displays the associated table object IDs.

M_MVCC_TABLES.description: Provides statistics for the row-store Multiversion Concurrency Control (MVCC) manager.

M_NUMA_NODES.description: Provides resource availability information on each NUMA node in the hardware topology, including inter-node distances and neighbor information.

NUMA_NODE_ID.description: Displays the physical NUMA node ID as shown by the operating system.

NUMA_NODE_INDEX.description:
Displays the logical NUMA node index. Indexes are in the range of 0 to
MAX_NUMA_NODE_COUNT.

ACTIVE_LOGICAL_CORE_COUNT.description: Displays the total active logical core count in the NUMA node.

LOGICAL_CORE_IDS.description:
Displays the range-separated list of logical core IDs in the NUMA node, for example,
(0-3,10-13).

MEMORY_SIZE.description: Displays the total memory size, in bytes, present in the NUMA node.

NUMA_NODE_DISTANCES.description:
Displays the distances from this node to all other nodes. Indexes in this list are
NUMA_NODE_INDEX and the number of entries are as many as
MAX_NUMA_NODE_COUNT.

NEIGHBOUR_NUMA_NODE_IDS.description: Displays the physical NUMA node ID of the neighboring nodes.

M_NUMA_RESOURCES.description: Provides information on overall resource availability for the system.

MAX_NUMA_NODE_COUNT.description: Displays the maximum number of NUMA nodes.

MAX_LOGICAL_CORE_COUNT.description: Displays the maximum number of logical cores.

M_OBJECT_LOCKS.description: Provides the status of currently acquired locks on objects with detailed information such as lock acquisition time and lock mode.

LOCK_OWNER_TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the transaction object ID owning the lock.

LOCK_OWNER_UPDATE_TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the write transaction ID owning the lock.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name.

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the object type.

PART_ID.description:
Displays the ID of the locked partition, or 0 for a non-partition
lock.

LOCK_MODE.description: Displays the lock mode: EXCLUSIVE/INTENTIONAL EXCLUSIVE

M_OBJECT_LOCK_STATISTICS.description: Provides lock contention statistics, including lock wait count, wait time, and failed count, for each object.

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the object type: RECORD, TABLE, VIEW, SYNONYM, or SEQUENCE.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name that the object belongs to.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name.

PART_ID.description:
Displays the partition ID. Returns the following:For partitioned tables, the part ID is equal to the sequential number
of the partition, starting at 1.In the case of replicated tables, the part ID is 1 for the original
table and subsequent part IDs are assigned to replica tables.The part ID is 0 for tables that are not partitioned.A part ID value of -1 indicates that a modification of the table
schema is in progress.

LOCK_WAIT_TIME.description: Displays the lock wait time in microseconds.

LOCK_FAILED_COUNT.description: Displays the RECORD type lock failed count.

M_OUT_OF_MEMORY_EVENTS.description: Provides a list of the last 20 out-of-memory (OOM) events.

TIME.description: Displays the time of the OOM event.

STATEMENT_HASH.description: Displays the identifier for an SQL string.

STATEMENT_STRING.description: Displays the string of the SQL statement that triggered the OOM event.

WORKLOAD_CLASS_NAME.description: Displays the name of effective workload class

HEAP_MEMORY_CATEGORY.description: Displays the allocator name in case of a heap memory failure.

MEMORY_REQUEST_SIZE.description: Displays the size, in bytes, of the failed memory allocation.

MEMORY_USED_SIZE.description:
Displays the size, in bytes, currently allocated. This value depends on the
EVENT_REASON.

EVENT_REASON.description:
Displays the reason for the OOM event: GLOBAL ALLOCATION LIMIT, PROCESS ALLOCATION LIMIT,
or STATEMENT MEMORY LIMIT.

MEMORY_LIMIT_SIZE.description: Displays the size of the limit in bytes. This value depends on the EVENT_REASON.

TRACEFILE_NAME.description: Displays the OOM trace file name.

TYPE.description: Displays the type of pageaccess.

CHUNK_SIZE.description: Displays the chunk size in bytes.

LOAD_COUNT.description: Displays the number of synchronous loads.

TRIGGER_LOAD_COUNT.description: Displays the number of asynchronous loads.

PROPERTY.description:
Displays the configuration property. The following describes the contents
of the individual lines of the monitor view
(VALUE), as identified byPROPERTY:force_first_password_changeDisplays if a user is forced to change their administrator-given
password before being allowed to work any further. This property is
only applicable to users connecting using their SAP HANA database
user name and password.last_used_passwordsDisplays the number of recently used passwords of a user, which
they cannot reuse.maximum_invalid_connect_attemptsDisplays the maximum number of allowed invalid connect attempts
before a user is locked out.maximum_password_lifetimeDisplays the number of days that a password stays valid.maximum_unused_initial_password_lifetimeDisplays the number of days that an unused administrator-given
password stays valid.NoteIn SAP HANA 1.0 SP 12 and earlier, the parameter name ismaximum_unused_inital_password_lifetime(note the missing 'i' in 'initial'). Use of the previous
spelling is supported, but it is recommended that you update
your configuration to use the correct spelling.maximum_unused_productive_password_lifetimeDisplays the number of days that an unused user-given password
stays valid.minimal_password_lengthDisplays the minimum number of characters required by a valid
password.minimum_password_lifetimeDisplays the minimum number of days before a user-given password
can be changed by that user.password_expire_warning_timeDisplays that warnings about nearly expired passwords are shown at
the configured number of days before expiration.password_layoutDescribes the kind(s) of characters that the password must consist
of.password_lock_timeDisplays the number of minutes the user is locked out after too
many invalid connect attempts.

M_PERFTRACE.description: Displays the state of the current performance trace. The performance trace provides detailed information about query execution.

STATUS.description:
Displays the status of the performance trace: STOPPED, STARTED, or
SAVING.

START_TIME.description: Displays when the performance trace started.

STOP_TIME.description: Displays when the performance trace stopped.

FILE_SIZE.description:
Displays the size of the collected trace files in bytes. This value is
only valid if tracing is stopped and not saved.

REMAINING_SECONDS.description:
Displays the remaining number of seconds until tracing stops
automatically.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the SQL user name filter.

APPLICATION_USER_NAME.description: Displays the application user name filter.

APPLICATION_NAME.description: Displays the application name filter.

PLAN_EXECUTION.description: Indicates whether plan execution details are recorded.

FUNCTION_PROFILER.description:
Displays whether or not the function profiler details are recorded:
TRUE/FALSE.

ROOT_STATEMENT_HASH.description: Displays the root statement hash filter.

M_PERSISTENCE_ENCRYPTION_KEYS.description: Provides information about encryption page keys.

VALID_FROM_SAVEPOINT.description: Displays the valid from savepoint version.

VALID_FROM_TIMESTAMP.description: Displays the valid from timestamp, in microseconds, given in UTC.

IS_ENCRYPTED.description:
Indicates whether or not the persistence encryption is active:
TRUE/FALSE.

ENCRYPTION_ACTIVE.description:
Displays whether or not the encryption is currently active for writing
into persistence: TRUE/FALSE.

ENCRYPTION_ACTIVE_AFTER_NEXT_SAVEPOINT.description:
Displays whether or not the encryption is active for writing into
persistence after the next savepoint: TRUE/FALSE.

KEY_CHANGE_WITH_NEXT_SAVEPOINT.description:
Displays whether or not the next savepoint activates a new key:
TRUE/FALSE.

ROOT_KEY_CHANGE_WITH_NEXT_SAVEPOINT.description:
Displays whether or not the next savepoint activates a new root key:
TRUE/FALSE.

IS_LATEST_ROOT_KEY_VERSION.description:
Displays whether or not the used root key version is the newest one:
TRUE/FALSE.

DATA_CONVERSION_ACTIVE.description:
Displays whether or not the conversion of data to the latest encryption
status or key is active: TRUE/FALSE.

KEY_PAGE_ENTRY_COUNT.description: Displays the number of entries within the key page.

USED_ROOT_KEY_HASH.description: Displays the hash of the root key that this service is using.

CCH_COUNT.description: Displays the number of normal consistent changes in terminated sessions.

MASS_CCH_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of consistent changes for mass operations in
terminated sessions.

LAST_CCH_TIME.description:
Displays the last time spent in normal consistent changes in terminated
sessions in microseconds.

MAX_CCH_TIME.description:
Displays the maximum time spent in normal consistent changes in
terminated sessions in microseconds.

MIN_CCH_TIME.description:
Displays the minimum time spent in normal consistent changes in
terminated sessions in microseconds.

SUM_CCH_TIME.description:
Displays the total time spent in normal consistent changes in terminated
sessions in microseconds.

AVG_CCH_TIME.description:
Displays the average time spent in normal consistent changes in
terminated sessions in microseconds.

LAST_MASS_CCH_TIME.description:
Displays the last time spent in consistent changes for mass operations in
terminated sessions in microseconds.

MAX_MASS_CCH_TIME.description:
Displays the maximum time spent in consistent changes for mass operations
in terminated sessions in microseconds.

MIN_MASS_CCH_TIME.description:
Displays the minimum time spent in consistent changes for mass operations
in terminated sessions in microseconds.

SUM_MASS_CCH_TIME.description:
Displays the total time spent in consistent changes for mass operations
in terminated sessions in microseconds.

AVG_MASS_CCH_TIME.description:
Displays the average time spent in consistent changes for mass operations
in terminated sessions in microseconds.

PREPARE_COMMIT_POS.description:
Displays the newest known log position of the prepare commit. This value
is for the slave only.

MASTER_COMMIT_POS.description:
Displays the newest known log position of the commit record on the
transaction master from the point of view of this node.

INDOUBT_WAITERS.description:
Displays the number of in-doubt waiters for the currently-running COMMIT.
This value is for the master only.

INDOUBT_RESTART_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of open in-doubt transactions before the restart.
This value is for the master only.

INDOUBT_ONLINE_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of open in-doubt transactions since the last restart.
This value is for the master only.

SAVEPOINT_CONFIG_FREQUENCY.description: Displays the configured savepoint frequency in seconds.

SAVEPOINT_ACTIVE_FREQUENCY.description: Displays the currently active savepoint frequency in seconds.

CHECKSUM_ALGORITHM.description:
Displays the currently used checksum algorithm for the modified pages and
log buffers.

M_PERSISTENT_MEMORY_VOLUMES.description: Reports the capacity, usage and metadata of persistent memory volumes.

VOLUME_ID.description: Displays an ID for the persistence volume.

NUMA_NODE_INDEX.description: Displays the logical NUMA node index as in the M_NUMA_NODES view.

PATH.description:
Displays the absolute directory base path of persistent memory volume configured for NUMA
node

STORAGE_MODE.description:
Displays the mode of storage configured for the persistent memory volume on the NUMA
node.

FILESYSTEM_TYPE.description: Displays the filesystem type, for example, ext3, ext4, xfs.

IS_DIRECT_ACCESS_SUPPORTED.description: Displays whether Direct Access semantics are supported by the volume.

TOTAL_SIZE.description: Displays the total physical memory size, in bytes, of the persistent memory volume.

USED_SIZE.description: Displays the used physical memory size, in bytes, of persistent memory volume.

M_PERSISTENT_MEMORY_VOLUME_DATA_FILES.description: Reports metadata statistics about files created by SAP HANA services for data storage on the persistent memory volumes.

VOLUME_ID.description: Displays an ID for the persistence volume.

NUMA_NODE_INDEX.description: Displays the logical NUMA node index as in the M_NUMA_NODES view.

FILE_NAME.description:
Displays the file name of data block file located on persistent memory volume on Numa
node of host (for example,000000fe0000018a-00000051-000001c2-00000001_159.fileblock).

STORAGE_MODE.description:
Displays the mode of storage configured for the persistent memory
volume that stores this data block file.

IS_MAPPED.description:
Indicates whether the data block file is memory mapped into virtual address space: TRUE
or FALSE.

SIZE.description: Displays the size of the data block file in bytes.

M_PERSISTENT_MEMORY_VOLUME_STATISTICS.description: Reports the statistics of physical lifecycle events of blocks managed by SAP HANA services on the persistent memory volumes.

VOLUME_ID.description: Displays an ID for the persistence volume.

NUMA_NODE_INDEX.description: Displays the logical NUMA node index as in the M_NUMA_NODES view.

TOTAL_ACTIVE_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of active blocks from persistent memory volume. This counter is
computed as a sum of loaded or created blocks but excludes
deleted blocks.

TOTAL_ACTIVE_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size, in bytes, of active blocks from persistent memory volume. This
counter is computed as a sum of loaded or created blocks but
excludes deleted blocks.

TOTAL_CREATE_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of newly created (that is, temporary) blocks from the
persistent memory volume.

TOTAL_CREATE_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size, in bytes, of the newly created temporary blocks from the
persistent memory volume.

TOTAL_COMMIT_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of the permanently persisted blocks from the persistent memory
volume.

TOTAL_COMMIT_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size, in bytes, of the permanently persisted blocks from the
persistent memory volume.

TOTAL_DELETE_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of deleted blocks from the persistent memory volume.

TOTAL_DELETE_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size, in bytes, of the deleted blocks from the persistent memory
volume.

TOTAL_DESTROY_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of destroyed blocks (no refcount) from the persistent memory
volume.

TOTAL_DESTROY_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size, in bytes, of the destroyed blocks (no refcount) from the
persistent memory volume.

TOTAL_LOAD_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of loaded/initialized blocks from the persistent memory volume
upon service restart.

TOTAL_LOAD_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size, in bytes, of loaded/initialized blocks from the persistent
memory volume upon service restart.

TOTAL_MAPPED_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of blocks mapped into virtual memory from the persistent memory
volume.

TOTAL_MAPPED_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size, in bytes, of blocks mapped into virtual memory from the
persistent memory volume.

M_PLE_RUNTIME_OBJECTS.description: Lists all the internal cache objects created to support the planning sessions, with details about each one.

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the object type:LOOKUP DICTIONARYTIMETABLE DICTIONARYFISCPERTABLE DICTIONARYCONVERSTION DICTIONARYFOX REFERENCE DATA DICTIONARY

OBJECT_NAME.description:
Displays the object name. This name is a generated, unique name for the runtime object,
derived from the corresponding session group name, session name,
planning command name, and source columns.

CREATE_TIME.description: Displays the creation time.

MEMORY_SIZE.description: Displays the memory size, in bytes.

ENTRY_COUNT.description: Displays the number of entries in the runtime object.

SITE_ID.description: Displays the site ID of the secondary site. This value is -1 on a single instance.

M_PLE_SESSIONS.description: Lists all planning sessions on the system as well as their status and details.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

IS_VALID.description: Displays whether the session is valid: TRUE or FALSE.

SITE_ID.description: Displays the site ID of the secondary site. This value is -1 on a single instance.

PLUGIN_NAME.description:
Displays the subdirectory, containing executables and plugins, where the files of an AFL
area are located. There can be several areas per
subdirectory.

ERROR_TEXT.description: Displays the error message in case a package or AFL cannot be registered.

AREA_NAME.description: Displays the name of an area.

AREA_STATUS.description:
Displays the status of an area: REGISTRATION SUCCESSFUL, REGISTRATION FAILED, or
REGISTRATION SKIPPED.

PACKAGE_NAME.description:
Displays the name of a package, which is an internal representation of an AFL. There can
be several packages per area.

PACKAGE_STATUS.description:
Displays the status of a package: REGISTRATION SUCCESSFUL, REGISTRATION FAILED, or
REGISTRATION SKIPPED.

STATEMENT_HASH.description: Displays the MD5 hash value for the statement string.

START_MVCC_TIMESTAMP.description: Displays the internal MVCC timestamp of the transaction start time.

COMPILED_TIME.description: Displays the compilation timestamp of the statement.

STATEMENT_STATUS.description: Displays the status of the SQL statement.

ALLOCATED_MEMORY_SIZE.description:
Displays the memory peak used for executing this statement. In case of
distributed execution it is a sum of the local peak memories of multiple
servers.

USED_MEMORY_SIZE.description: Deprecated. This value is the same as ALLOCATED_MEMORY_SIZE.

LAST_EXECUTED_TIME.description:
Displays the recently executed time of the statement. This timestamp is
updated when opening cursors and executing DML/DDL but not when fetching
cursor results or closing cursors.

LAST_ACTION_TIME.description:
Displays the recently performed time of action against the statement.
This timestamp is updated when opening cursors, executing DML/DDL,
fetching results, and closing cursors.

AVG_EXECUTION_TIME.description: Displays the average time of statement execution.

MAX_EXECUTION_TIME.description: Displays the maximum time of statement execution.

MIN_EXECUTION_TIME.description: Displays the minimum time of statement execution.

TOTAL_EXECUTION_TIME.description: Displays the sum of statement execution time.

AVG_CURSOR_DURATION.description:
Displays the average time of statement execution including communication
time with clients.

MAX_CURSOR_DURATION.description:
Displays the maximum time of statement execution including communication
time with clients

MIN_CURSOR_DURATION.description:
Displays the minimum time of statement execution including communication
time with clients.

TOTAL_CURSOR_DURATION.description:
Displays the sum of statement execution time including communication time
with clients.

AVG_EXECUTION_MEMORY_SIZE.description: Displays the average memory size in bytes used during each execution.

MAX_EXECUTION_MEMORY_SIZE.description: Displays the maximum memory size in bytes used during each execution.

MIN_EXECUTION_MEMORY_SIZE.description: Displays the minimum memory size in bytes used during each execution.

TOTAL_EXECUTION_MEMORY_SIZE.description: Displays the sum of memory size in bytes used during each execution.

AVG_LOCKWAIT_TIME.description: Displays the average lock wait time for the statement.

MAX_LOCKWAIT_TIME.description: Displays the maximum lock wait time for the statement.

MIN_LOCKWAIT_TIME.description: Displays the minimum lock wait time for the statement.

TOTAL_LOCKWAIT_COUNT.description: Displays the total lock wait count for the statement.

TOTAL_LOCKWAIT_TIME.description: Displays the accumulated lock wait time for the statement.

AVG_PREPARATION_TIME.description: Displays the average time of statement preparation.

MAX_PREPARATION_TIME.description: Displays the maximum time of statement preparation.

MIN_PREPARATION_TIME.description: Displays the minimum time of statement preparation.

TOTAL_PREPARATION_TIME.description: Displays the total time of statement preparation.

TOTAL_PREPARATION_COUNT.description: Displays the total count of statement preparation.

PARENT_STATEMENT_ID.description: Displays the parent prepared statement ID.

STATEMENT_MEMORY_LIMIT.description: Displays the effective statement memory limit.

STATEMENT_THREAD_LIMIT.description: Displays the effective statement thread limit.

TOTAL_STATEMENT_MEMORY_LIMIT.description: Displays the effective total statement memory limit.

TOTAL_STATEMENT_THREAD_LIMIT.description: Displays the effective total statement thread limit.

WORKLOAD_CLASS_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the effective workload class used for the
execution.

M_READWRITELOCKS.description: Provides read and write lock statistics.

STATISTICS_ID.description: Displays the statistics object unique ID.

OWNER_ID.description:
Displays the context ID of the owner context (for exclusive/intent
locks).

EXCLUSIVE_LOCK_COUNT.description: Displays the number of exclusive lock calls.

EXCLUSIVE_WAIT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of blocking exclusive lock calls.

EXCLUSIVE_CAS_COLLISION_COUNT.description: Displays the collision count on atomic operations on exclusive locks.

EXCLUSIVE_COLLISION_RATE.description: Displays the collision rate on exclusive locks percentage.

LAST_EXCLUSIVE_WAIT_TIME.description:
Displays the last time of blocking exclusive lock calls in
microseconds.

MAX_EXCLUSIVE_WAIT_TIME.description:
Displays the maximum time of blocking exclusive lock calls in
microseconds.

MIN_EXCLUSIVE_WAIT_TIME.description:
Displays the minimum time of blocking exclusive lock calls in
microseconds.

SUM_EXCLUSIVE_WAIT_TIME.description:
Displays the total time of blocking exclusive lock calls in
microseconds.

AVG_EXCLUSIVE_WAIT_TIME.description:
Displays the average time of blocking exclusive lock calls in
microseconds.

INTENT_LOCK_COUNT.description: Displays the number of intent lock calls.

INTENT_WAIT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of blocking intent lock calls.

INTENT_CAS_COLLISION_COUNT.description: Displays the collision count on atomic operation on intent lock.

INTENT_TIMEOUT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of timed out intent lock calls.

INTENT_COLLISION_RATE.description: Displays the collision rate on intent locks percentage.

LAST_INTENT_WAIT_TIME.description: Displays the last time of blocking intent lock calls in microseconds.

MAX_INTENT_WAIT_TIME.description:
Displays the maximum time of blocking intent lock calls in
microseconds.

MIN_INTENT_WAIT_TIME.description:
Displays the minimum time of blocking intent lock calls in
microseconds.

SUM_INTENT_WAIT_TIME.description:
Displays the total time of blocking intent lock calls in
microseconds.

AVG_INTENT_WAIT_TIME.description:
Displays the average time of blocking intent lock calls in
microseconds.

SHARED_LOCK_COUNT.description: Displays the number of shared lock calls.

SHARED_WAIT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of blocking shared lock calls.

SHARED_CAS_COLLISION_COUNT.description: Displays the collision count on atomic operation on shared lock.

SHARED_TIMEOUT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of timed out shared lock calls.

SHARED_COLLISION_RATE.description: Displays the collision rate on shared lock percentage.

LAST_SHARED_WAIT_TIME.description: Displays the last time of blocking shared lock calls in microseconds.

MAX_SHARED_WAIT_TIME.description:
Displays the maximum time of blocking shared lock calls in
microseconds.

MIN_SHARED_WAIT_TIME.description:
Displays the minimum time of blocking shared lock calls in
microseconds.

SUM_SHARED_WAIT_TIME.description:
Displays the total time of blocking shared lock calls in
microseconds.

AVG_SHARED_WAIT_TIME.description:
Displays the average time of blocking shared lock calls in
microseconds.

COLLISION_RATE.description: Displays the global collision rate percentage.

CREATE_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of read and write lock creation (for shared
statistics only).

DESTROY_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of read/write lock destructions (for shared
statistics only).

LOCK_OWNER_TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the transaction object ID owning the lock.

LOCK_OWNER_UPDATE_TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the write transaction ID owning the lock.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

M_RECOVERY_PROGRESS.description: Shows the progress of the most recent recoveries of tenant databases. M_RECOVERY_PROGRESS is in the SYS_DATABASES schema of a system database.

BACKUP_ID.description: The unique ID of a recovery.

SERVICE_NAME.description: The name of the service.

SYS_START_TIME.description: The time the recovery was started (local server time)

UTC_START_TIME.description: The time the recovery was started (UTC)

SYS_END_TIME.description: The time the recovery was completed (local server time)

UTC_END_TIME.description: The time the recovery was completed (UTC)

STATE_NAME.description: The current state of the recovery

PHASE_NAME.description:
The name of the current phaseA phase can be the databackup recovery, log backup recovery,
restart, or and add or remove a service (if applicable).

MAX_PHASE.description: The number of phases to pass

CURRENT_PHASE.description: The number of the current phase

SYS_REACHED_TIME.description: Point in time reached (local server time)

MESSAGE.description: Message that provides a possible reason as to why a recovery failed.

MAX_PROGRESS.description: Number of bytes still to be recovered.

M_REMOTE_CONNECTIONS.description: Provides detailed information on remote connections between databases and remote sources. The information includes connection status, adapter name, and adapter properties.

REMOTE_SOURCE_USER_NAME.description: Displays the remote source user name.

START_TIME.description: Displays the connected time.

STATEMENT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of executed statements.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the user name.

LAST_REFRESH_TIME.description:
Displays the last successful completion timestamp of the refresh
operation.

REFRESH_START_TIME.description:
Displays the timestamp of when the refresh operation was
executed.

REFRESH_STATUS.description:
Displays the refresh operation status: STARTED, COMPLETED,RUNNING
(GET OBJECTS), RUNNING (GET OBJECT DETAILS),FAILED, CANCELLED,
or CLEARED.

REFRESH_ERROR_MESSAGE.description:
Displays the exception message that occurred during the refresh
operation.

START_TIME.description: Displays the start time.

SERVICE_NAME.description: Displays the service name.

M_REMOTE_SOURCE_LATENCY_STATUS.description: Provides remote source latency status information.

STATUS.description: Displays the latency ticket status.

M_REMOTE_SOURCE_STATISTICS.description: Returns the remote source operational statistics for monitoring data provisioning components.

SERVICE_NAME.description: Displays the service name.

STATISTIC_NAME.description: Displays the name of the statistic.

M_REMOTE_STATEMENTS.description: Displays detailed information about executed remote queries. This information includes the query status and the number of fetched rows.

TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the transaction ID.

REMOTE_CONNECTION_ID.description: Displays the ID of the remote connection.

START_TIME.description: Displays the statement start time.

FETCHED_RECORD_COUNT.description: Displays the number of fetched records.

FETCHED_SIZE.description: Displays the byte size of fetched records.

REMOTE_DURATION.description:
Displays the duration, in milliseconds, of the total remote request
(open/fetch/close).

USER_NAME.description: Displays the user name.

M_REMOTE_SUBSCRIPTIONS.description: Provides the status and run-time information of a remote subscription.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the remote subscription schema name.

STATE.description:
Displays the event state:CREATEDMAT_START_BEG_MARKER - Materialization started. Waiting for
BEGIN MARKERMAT_START_END_MARKER - Materialization started. Waiting for
end markerMAT_COMP_BEG_MARKER - Materialization completed. Waiting for
begin markerMAT_COMP_END_MARKER - Materialization completed. Waiting for
end markerAUTO_CORRECT_CHANGE_DATAAPPLY_CHANGE_DATA

OPTIMIZED_QUERY_STRING.description:
Displays the optimized query string. If there are multiple
subscriptions interested in the same query result, with the same
internal distribution ID, each subscription can use the same
result.

OPTIMIZED_QUERY_HASH.description: Displays the hash of the optimized query string.

INTERNAL_DISTRIBUTION_ID.description:
Displays the generated integer that identifies if multiple target
tables are interested in the changes from the same source SQL or
virtual table.

OPTIMIZED_QUERY_RESULTSET_TYPE.description: Displays the query result set type:0 - REGULAR1 - CLUSTER2 - POOL

REMOTE_SUBSCRIPTION.description:
Displays an optional subscription name registered by the adapter
in the remote source system.

BEGIN_MARKER.description:
Displays the generated begin marker when the QUEUE command is
called. The begin marker must use the format:
B<remote_source_oid>_<remote_subscription_oid>_<YYYYMMDDHH24MMSSFF7>.

END_MARKER.description:
Displays the generated end marker when the DISTRIBUTE command is
called. The end marker must use the format:
E<remote_source_oid>_<remote_subscription_oid>_<YYYYMMDDHH24MMSSFF7>.

BEGIN_MARKER_TIME.description: Displays the timestamp when the QUEUE request is received.

END_MARKER_TIME.description: Displays the timestamp when the DISTRIBUTE command is called.

LAST_PROCESSED_TRANSACTION_ID.description:
Displays the transaction ID of the last processed
transaction.

LAST_PROCESSED_TRANSACTION_TIME.description: Displays the time when the last transaction was applied.

LAST_PROCESSED_BEGIN_SEQUENCE_ID.description:
Displays the begin record sequence ID of the last processed
transaction.

LAST_PROCESSED_COMMIT_SEQUENCE_ID.description:
Displays the commit record sequence ID of the last processed
transaction.

LAST_RECEIVED_SEQUENCE_ID.description: Displays the last received sequence ID.

LAST_RECEIVED_CUSTOM_ID.description:
Displays the last received custom ID. Custom IDs may be used by
adapters with every changed-data row of a transaction.

LAST_PROCESSED_CUSTOM_ID.description:
Displays the last processed custom ID. Custom IDs may be used by
adapters with every changed-data row of a transaction.

M_REMOTE_SUBSCRIPTION_COMMIT_SEQUENCE_CO.description: Lists all real time data elements such as markers and commit / rollback rows in the remote subscription commit sequence container.

CONTAINER_ID.description: Displays the container ID of the virtual file.

ELEMENT_TYPE.description: Displays the element type. Values are:1 - BEGIN MARKER2 - END MARKER3 - COMMITTED TRANSACTION

SEQUENCE_ID.description: Displays the sequence ID of the row.

ROW_TYPE.description: Displays the internal CDC row type. Values are:2 – commit3 – rollback8 – begin-marker9 – end-marker

TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the remote source transaction ID of the row.

M_REMOTE_SUBSCRIPTION_COMMIT_SEQUENCE_GR.description: Lists all CommitSequece virtual files for a remote source, and the number of entries stored in each virtual file.

CONTAINER_ID.description: Displays the ID of the container of the virtual file.

COMMIT_SEQUENCE_CONTAINER_ID.description: Displays the container ID of the CommitSequence virtual file.

MIN_SEQUENCE_ID.description: Displays the minimum sequence ID of the CommitSequence virtual file.

MAX_SEQUENCE_ID.description: Displays the maximum sequence ID of the CommitSequence virtual file.

ENTRY_COUNT.description: Displays the number of CommitSequence entries in the virtual file.

IS_DELETED.description: Indicates if the container identified by COMMIT_SEQUENCE_CONTAINER_ID is deleted. Values are TRUE or FALSE.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

COMPONENT.description:
Displays the component: DPSERVER, ADAPTER, RECEIVER, or
APPLIER.

STATUS.description: Displays the component status.

MESSAGE.description: Displays an error or warning message.

M_REMOTE_SUBSCRIPTION_DISTRIBUTOR_QUEUE_.description: Lists all real time data elements between begin-marker and end-marker for the remote subscription.

CONTAINER_ID.description: Displays the container ID of this virtual file.

ELEMENT_TYPE.description: Displays the element type. Values are:1 - BEGIN MARKER2 - END MARKER3 - COMMITTED TRANSACTION

SEQUENCE_ID.description: Displays the The sequence ID of the row.

ROW_TYPE.description: Displays the internal CDC row type. Values are:2 – COMMIT3 – ROLLBACK8 – BEGIN MARKER9 – END MARKER

TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the remote source transaction ID of the row.

M_REMOTE_SUBSCRIPTION_LOB_CONTAINERS.description: Lists all lob container IDs for each remote subscription transaction.

CONTAINER_ID.description: Displays the container ID of this virtual file.

TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the remote source transaction ID of the lob.

LOB_CONTAINER_ID.description: Displays the container ID of the lob virtual file.

M_REMOTE_SUBSCRIPTION_ROLLBACK_SAVEPOINT.description: Lists all rollback save points for each remote subscription transaction.

CONTAINER_ID.description: Displays the container ID of this virtual file.

TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the remote source transaction id of the row.

FROM_SEQUENCE_ID.description: Displays the sequence ID of the row to roll back from.

TO_SEQUENCE_ID.description: Displays the sequence ID of the row to roll back to.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

RECEIVED_MESSAGE_SIZE.description: Displays the received message size in bytes.

APPLIED_MESSAGE_SIZE.description: Displays the applied message size in bytes.

M_REMOTE_SUBSCRIPTION_TRANSACTION_CONTAI.description: Lists all real time data rowsets in the remote subscription transaction container.

CONTAINER_ID.description: Displays the container ID of the virtual file.

TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the the remote source transaction ID of the row.

SEQUENCE_ID.description: Displays the the sequence ID of the row.

ROW_TYPE.description: Displays the internal CDC row type. Values are:1 – BEGIN TRANSACTION2 – COMMIT3 – ROLLBACK4 – INSERT5 – DELETE6 – BEFORE-IMAGE7 – AFTER-IMAGE8 – BEGIN-MARKER9 – END-MARKER10 – ROLLBACK-TO-SAVEPOINT11 – REPLACE12 – SCHEMA-CHANGE13 – TRUNCATE-TABLE14 – UPSERT15 – TRUNCATE-REPLACE-TARGET16 – BEGIN-REPLACE-SET17 – END-REPLACE-SET18 – EXTERMINATE-ROW19 – LATENCY-STATISTICS

DIGEST.description: Displays the digest of the row content.

VOLUME_ID.description: Displays the persistent volume ID of the server.

IS_SOURCE_SYSTEM.description:
Indicates whether or not the system has a source table:
TRUE/FALSE.

REMOTE_SOURCE_NAME.description: Displays the remote source name on the replication system.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the replication table.

TABLE_NAME.description: Displays the table name of the replication table.

TABLE_OID.description: Displays the Table OID of the replication table.

TABLE_TYPE.description: Displays the type of replication table: ROW/COLUMN.

SOURCE_REMOTE_SOURCE_NAME.description: Displays the remote source name on the source system.

SOURCE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the source table.

SOURCE_TABLE_NAME.description: Displays the table name of the source table.

SOURCE_TABLE_OID.description: Displays the table OID of a source table.

SOURCE_TABLE_TYPE.description: Displays the source table type: ROW/COLUMN.

PART_ID.description:
Displays the partition ID. Returns the following:For partitioned tables, the part ID is equal to the
sequential number of the partition, starting at 1.In the case of replicated tables, the part ID is 1 for the
original table and subsequent part IDs are assigned to
replica tables.The part ID is 0 for tables that are not partitioned.A part ID value of -1 indicates that a modification of the
table schema is in progress.

REPLICATION_STATUS.description:
Displays the replication status: ENABLING, ENABLED, DISABLED, or
SUSPENDED.

LAST_ENABLE_TIME.description: Displays the timestamp when the table was last enabled.

LAST_DISABLE_TIME.description: Displays the timestamp when the table was last disabled.

LAST_ERROR_CODE.description: Displays the last error code number.

LAST_ERROR_TIME.description: Displays the timestamp when the last error occurred.

INSERT_RECORD_COUNT.description: Displays the number of inserted records.

UPDATE_RECORD_COUNT.description: Displays the number of updated records.

DELETE_RECORD_COUNT.description: Displays the number of deleted records.

INSERT_RETRY_COUNT.description: Displays the number of retries to insert.

UPDATE_RETRY_COUNT.description: Displays the number of retries to update.

DELETE_RETRY_COUNT.description: Displays the number of retries to delete.

M_REORG_ALGORITHMS.description: Provides information about landscape redistribution algorithms.

ALGORITHM_ID.description: Displays the ID of the algorithm.

IS_ENABLED.description:
Displays TRUE when the replication logs are being collected and
FALSE when collecting replication logs is disabled.

LAST_DISABLE_REASON.description:
Displays the latest disable reason: REPLICATION_LOG_SPACE
FULL/USER_COMMAND.

USED_REPLICATION_LOG_SIZE.description:
Displays the used replication log size in the volume in
bytes.

MAX_REPLICATION_LOG_SIZE.description:
Displays the limitation of the replication log size in the volume
in bytes.

M_REPO_TRANSPORT_FILES.description: Provides information about all repository transport files.

FILE_SIZE.description: Displays the file size in bytes.

CACHE_ID.description: Displays the unique ID for each result cache entry.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name.

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the object type.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the user name.

MEMORY_SIZE.description: Displays the size of memory occupied by the result cache entry in bytes.

RECORD_COUNT.description: Displays the number of records in the cache entry.

CREATE_TIME.description: Displays the timestamp the result cache entry is generated and stored.

LAST_REFRESH_TIME.description: Displays the last refresh time of the result cache entry.

LAST_REFRESH_DURATION.description: Displays the time duration of the cache entry preparation in milliseconds.

REFRESH_COUNT.description: Displays the number of refreshments on the cache entry.

LAST_ACCESS_TIME.description: Displays the last time the result cache entry was accessed by a user.

ACCESS_COUNT.description: Displays the number of accesses on the cache entry.

RUNTIME_MISS_COUNT.description:

values.

EVICT_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of eviction counts due to budget limitations.

IS_EVICTED.description: Displays whether or not the cache entry is evicted: TRUE/FALSE.

M_RESULT_CACHE_EXCLUSIONS.description: Provides information about result cache exclusions.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the object name.

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the object type.

REASON.description: Displays the reason why the object cannot use result cache.

EXCLUDE_TIME.description: Displays the timestamp when disabling the result cache was decided.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

KEY_TYPE.description: Displays the key type (data or composite).

INDEX_STATUS.description: Displays the index status: VALID, INVALID, or UNUSABLE.

LEAF_NODE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of leaf nodes.

NONLEAF_NODE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of intermediate nodes.

NODE_SIZE.description: Displays the node size in bytes.

BULKLOAD_FACTOR.description: Displays the fill factor for creating or recovering indexes.

INDEX_SIZE.description:
Displays the memory index size (number of nodes * node size) in
bytes.

ENTRY_COUNT.description: Displays the number of indexed records.

FIXED_LEAF_NODE_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of fixed leaf nodes. FIXED means that the key lengths
of all entries in the node have the same value.

FIXED_NONLEAF_NODE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of fixed non-leaf nodes.

AVG_LEAF_OFFSET_SIZE.description: Displays the average offset size of leaf nodes.

AVG_NONLEAF_OFFSET_SIZE.description: Displays the average offset size of non-leaf nodes.

AVG_LEAF_POINTER_SIZE.description: Displays the average pointer size of leaf nodes.

AVG_NONLEAF_POINTER_SIZE.description: Displays the average pointer size of non-leaf nodes.

LEAF_PARTIAL_KEY_SIZE.description: Displays the partial key length of the leaf node.

NONLEAF_PARTIAL_KEY_SIZE.description: Displays the partial key length of the non-leaf node.

IS_UNIQUE.description: Displays the whether the index is unique: TRUE or FALSE.

SEARCH_COUNT.description: Displays the number of search operations.

DISTINCT_KEY_COUNT.description: Displays the number of distinct keys.

ELIMINATED_DUPLICATE_LEAF_NODE_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of leaf nodes whose duplicate keys are
eliminated.

UNUSED_LEAF_SLOTS_PER_NODE.description: Displays the number of unused slots per leaf node.

ALLOCATED_SIZE.description: Displays the allocated memory size of the module in bytes.

USED_SIZE.description: Displays the used memory size of the module in bytes.

FREE_SIZE.description: Displays the free memory size of the module in bytes

M_RS_TABLES.description: Provides information about row tables, including detailed table sizes and record count.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

RECORD_COUNT.description: Displays the number of records in this table.

ALLOCATED_FIXED_PART_SIZE.description: Displays the allocated memory size in bytes for the fixed-size part.

FIXED_PAGE_HEADER_SIZE.description:
Displays the allocated and used memory size in bytes for the page headers
of the fixed-size part.

FIXED_PAGE_FRAGMENT_SIZE.description: Displays the fragmented memory size in bytes of the fixed-size part.

USED_FIXED_PART_SIZE.description: Displays the used memory size in bytes for the fixed-size part.

FIXED_PART_FRAGMENT_SIZE.description:
Displays the fragmented memory size in bytes of the used fixed-size
part.

FIXED_PART_FREE_SIZE.description:
Displays the free memory size in bytes in the pages of the fixed-size
part.

ALLOCATED_VARIABLE_PART_SIZE.description:
Displays the allocated memory size in bytes for the variable-size
part.

USED_VARIABLE_PART_SIZE.description: Displays the used memory size in bytes for the variable-size part.

VARIABLE_PART_FRAGMENT_SIZE.description:
Displays the fragmented memory size in bytes of the used variable-size
part.

LOAD_STATUS.description:
Displays the loading state of the table: LOADED, NOW_LOADING,
PREPARING_UNLOAD, NOW_UNLOADING, UNLOADED, or NOT_SUPPORTED
