MAX_EXECUTION_CPU_TIME.description: Displays the maximum amount of tracked CPU time.

TOTAL_SERVICE_NETWORK_REQUEST_COUNT.description: Displays the total count of service network requests during plan execution for valid and evicted plans.

AVG_SERVICE_NETWORK_REQUEST_COUNT.description:
Displays the average count of service network requests during
plan execution for valid and evicted plans.

MAX_SERVICE_NETWORK_REQUEST_COUNT.description:
Displays the maximum count of service network requests during
plan execution for valid and evicted plans.

TOTAL_CALLED_THREAD_COUNT.description: Displays the total count of called threads used during plan execution for valid and evicted plans.

AVG_CALLED_THREAD_COUNT.description:
Displays the average count of called threads used during plan
execution for valid and evicted plans.

MAX_CALLED_THREAD_COUNT.description:
Displays the average count of called threads used during plan
execution for valid and evicted plans.

TOTAL_BATCH_EXECUTION_COUNT.description:
Displays a total batch count per one execution for cached DML
plans for valid and evicted plans.

AVG_BATCH_EXECUTION_COUNT.description:
Displays an average batch count per one execution for cached DML
plans for valid and evicted plans.

MIN_BATCH_EXECUTION_COUNT.description:
Displays a minimum batch count per one execution for cached DML
plans for valid and evicted plans.

MAX_BATCH_EXECUTION_COUNT.description:
Displays a maximum batch count per one execution for cached DML
plans for valid and evicted plans.

TOTAL_SERVICE_NETWORK_REQUEST_DURATION.description: Displays the total time of the service network requests during plan execution.

AVG_SERVICE_NETWORK_REQUEST_DURATION.description:
Displays the average time of the service network requests during
plan execution.

MAX_SERVICE_NETWORK_REQUEST_DURATION.description:
Displays the maximum time of the service network requests during
plan execution.

TOTAL_SERVICE_NETWORK_REQUEST_SIZE.description: Displays the total amount of service network requests during plan execution in bytes.

AVG_SERVICE_NETWORK_REQUEST_SIZE.description:
Displays the average data amount of service network requests during plan execution in
bytes.

MAX_SERVICE_NETWORK_REQUEST_SIZE.description:
Displays the maximum amount of service network requests during plan execution in
bytes.

TOTAL_BUFFER_CACHE_IO_READ_SIZE.description: Displays the total size of NSE pages had to be read from disk.

AVG_BUFFER_CACHE_IO_READ_SIZE.description: Displays the average size of NSE pages had to be read from disk.

MIN_BUFFER_CACHE_IO_READ_SIZE.description: Displays the minimum size of NSE pages had to be read from disk.

MAX_BUFFER_CACHE_IO_READ_SIZE.description: Displays the maximum size of NSE pages had to be read from disk.

TOTAL_BUFFER_CACHE_PAGE_HIT_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of times NSE page was found in buffer cache memory.

AVG_BUFFER_CACHE_PAGE_HIT_COUNT.description:
Displays the average number of times page NSE page was found in buffer cache
memory.

MIN_BUFFER_CACHE_PAGE_HIT_COUNT.description:
Displays the minimum number of times NSE page was found in buffer cache
memory.

MAX_BUFFER_CACHE_PAGE_HIT_COUNT.description:
Displays the maximum number of times NSE page was found in buffer cache
memory.

TOTAL_BUFFER_CACHE_PAGE_MISS_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of times NSE page had to be read from disk.

AVG_BUFFER_CACHE_PAGE_MISS_COUNT.description: Displays the average number of times NSE page had to be read from disk.

MIN_BUFFER_CACHE_PAGE_MISS_COUNT.description: Displays the minimum number of times NSE page had to be read from disk.

MAX_BUFFER_CACHE_PAGE_MISS_COUNT.description: Displays the maximum number of times NSE page had to be read from disk.

TOTAL_BUFFER_CACHE_PINNED_MEMORY_SIZE.description: Displays the total size of pinned NSE page memory out of buffer cache.

AVG_BUFFER_CACHE_PINNED_MEMORY_SIZE.description: Displays the average size of pinned NSE page memory out of buffer cache.

MIN_BUFFER_CACHE_PINNED_MEMORY_SIZE.description: Displays the minimum size of pinned NSE page memory out of buffer cache.

MAX_BUFFER_CACHE_PINNED_MEMORY_SIZE.description: Displays the maximum size of pinned NSE page memory out of buffer cache.

M_ST_GEOMETRY_COLUMNS.description: The M_ST_GEOMETRY_COLUMNS system view provides information about the spatial extent of columns containing spatial data, including the schema name, table name, column name, and the minimum and maximum values for x, y, z, and m coordinates.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Specifies the schema name.

MIN_X.description: Specifies the minimum x value of the spatial column data.

MAX_X.description: Specifies the maximum x value of the spatial column data.

MIN_Y.description: Specifies the minimum y value of the spatial column data.

MAX_Y.description: Specifies the maximum y value of the spatial column data.

MIN_Z.description: Specifies the minimum z value of the spatial column data.

MAX_Z.description: Specifies the maximum z value of the spatial column data.

MIN_M.description: Specifies the minimum m value of the spatial column data.

MAX_M.description: Specifies the maximum m value of the spatial column data.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema in which the application is deployed.

APPLICATION_NAME.description: Displays the name of the streaming application.

APPLICATION_TYPE.description:
Displays the application type: PROJECT, HA_PROJECT, or
TOOLKIT_ADAPTER.

APPLICATION_INSTANCE.description: Displays the instance number of the streaming aplication.

APPLICATION_INSTANCE_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of instances that are running or that are
started.

SERVER_ALIAS.description:
Displays the name of the service on which the application is
running.

REQUESTED_STATUS.description:
Displays the status the application is requested to be in by the
client: STOPPED/STARTED_RUNNING.

CURRENT_STATUS.description: Displays the status that the application is currently in:STARTSTARTINGSTARTEDSTARTED_RUNNINGSTOPPINGSTOPPEDSTOPPED_FAILEDSTOPPED_FAILED_START

IS_FAILOVER_ENABLED.description:
Indicates whether or not the project should be started on another
node if the project or node fails: TRUE/FALSE.

FAILURE_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of failures that have occurred in the failure
interval.

FAILURE_INTERVAL.description:
Displays the failure interval, in seconds, in which the
application is shut down if the failure count reaches the max
failures per interval.

MAX_FAILURES_PER_INTERVAL.description:
Displays the number of failures that can occur in the specified
failure interval before the application is shutdown.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema in which the application is deployed.

PROJECT_NAME.description: Displays the name given to the project.

PROJECT_INSTANCE.description: Displays the instance number of the project.

CPU_UTILIZATION.description:
Displays the total CPU usage, as a percentage, by the project
since the last update. These values range from 0 to 100.

CPU_SYSTEM_UTILIZATION.description:
Displays the total system CPU usage, as a percentage, by the
project since the last update. These values range from 0 to
100.

CPU_USER_UTILIZATION.description:
Displays the total user CPU usage, as a percentage, by the
project since the last update. These values range from 0 to
100.

TOTAL_CPU_TIME.description:
Displays the total CPU time, in microseconds, used by the project
since it started.

TOTAL_CPU_SYSTEM_TIME.description:
Displays the total system CPU time, in microseconds, used by the
project since it started.

TOTAL_CPU_USER_TIME.description:
Displays the total user CPU time, in microseconds, used by the
project since it started.

PROJECT_DURATION.description:
Displays the number of microseconds since the project
started.

VIRTUAL_MEMORY_SIZE.description:
Displays the total amount of virtual memory used by the project
in bytes.

RESIDENT_MEMORY_SIZE.description:
Displays the total amount of resident memory used by the project
in bytes.

THREAD_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of threads used by the project at the
time of the update.

MONITORING_INTERVAL.description:
Displays how often stream/client statistics are gathered in
seconds.

IS_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_ENABLED.description:
Indicates if the Active/Active (Read Enabled) high availibility
mode is enabled for the project: TRUE/FALSE.

ACTIVE_ACTIVE_ROLE.description:
Indicates whether the project instance plays the primary or
secondary role in the Active/Active (Read Enabled) high
availibility mode.

LAST_UPDATE_TIME.description:
Displays the last time that the statistics were updated for the
project.

M_STREAMING_PROJECT_ADAPTERS.description: Provides streaming project adapter monitoring information.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema in which the application is deployed.

PROJECT_NAME.description: Displays the name given to the project.

PROJECT_INSTANCE.description: Displays the instance number of the project.

ADAPTER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the adapter.

ADAPTER_TYPE.description:
Displays the adapter type defined in the ATTACH ADAPTER
statement.

STREAM_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the stream on which the adapter is
defined.

IS_INPUT.description:
Indicates whether or not the connection is an input or an output.
This value is TRUE for an input connection and FALSE for an
output connection.

STARTUP_GROUP_NAME.description: Displays the start up group to which the connector belongs.

ADAPTER_STATE.description:
Displays the state of the adapter: READY, INITIAL, CONTINOUS,
IDLE, DONE, or DEAD.

TOTAL_ROW_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of data records recognized in the input
data.

SUCCESSFUL_ROW_COUNT.description: Displays the number of data records successfully processed.

UNSUCCESSFUL_ROW_COUNT.description: Displays the number of data records that experienced errors.

MEMORY_USAGE.description: Displays the total memory used by the adapter, in bytes.

LAST_ERROR_TIME.description: Displays the tast time that an error occurred.

LAST_ERROR_MESSAGE.description:
Displays the complete text of the error message as written to the
log.

LATENCY.description: Displays the latency introduced by the adapter.

M_STREAMING_PROJECT_ADAPTER_STATISTICS.description: Provides streaming project adapter statistics monitoring information.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema in which the application is deployed.

PROJECT_NAME.description: Displays the name given to the project.

PROJECT_INSTANCE.description: Displays the instance number of the project.

ADAPTER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the adapter.

STATISTICS_NAME.description: Displays the name of the adapter statistic.

STATISTICS_VALUE.description:
Displays the value for the statistic. This value is converted to
a string.

LAST_UPDATE_TIME.description:
Displays the last time the statistic was updated for the
adapter.

M_STREAMING_PROJECT_GD_SUBSCRIPTIONS.description: Provides streaming project Guaranteed Delivery (GD) subscription monitoring information.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema in which the application is deployed.

PROJECT_NAME.description: Displays the name given to the project.

PROJECT_INSTANCE.description: Displays the instance number of the project.

GD_KEY.description: Displays the automatically generated key for the GD session.

STREAM_NAME.description: Displays the name of the stream being subscribed to.

USER_NAME.description: Displays the name of the subscribing user.

GD_NAME.description: Displays the name of the guaranteed delivery session.

GD_SEQUENCE_NUMBER.description:
Displays the sequence number of the last event committed from
stream_name in this guaranteed delivery session. A value of 0
indicates that no commits have been issued.

STREAMING_CONNECTION_ID.description:
Displays the unique handle for active external subscribers. For
active internal adapters it is always 0. Inactive subscribers
have a value of -1.

LAST_UPDATE_TIME.description:
Displays the last time the statistic was updated for the GD
subscription.

M_STREAMING_PROJECT_PUBLISHERS.description: Provides streaming project publishers monitoring information.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema in which the application is deployed.

PROJECT_NAME.description: Displays the name given to the project.

PROJECT_INSTANCE.description: Displays the instance number of the project.

STREAMING_CONNECTION_ID.description: Displays the unique handle identifying the connection.

USER_NAME.description:
Displays the user name provided by the client during the
connection establishment. This value is shown once the user is
authenticated.

CLIENT_HOST.description:
Displays the symbolic host name of the client machine, if
available. If not available, the host is the IP address of the
client machine.

CLIENT_IP.description: Displays the IP address of the client machine as a string.

CLIENT_PORT.description:
Displays the TCP port number from which the connection
originates.

CONNECTION_TAG.description:
Displays the user-provided symbolic connection tag name. If this
is not set by the user, then the connection tag is NULL.

TRANSACTION_THROUGHPUT.description:
Displays the client's performance, in transactions per second,
sent by the client since the last update. Envelopes and any
service messages count as transactions.

ROW_THROUGHPUT.description:
Displays the client's performance, in data rows per second, sent
by the client since the last update.

INCREMENTAL_TRANSACTION_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of transactions, envelopes, or messages sent
by the client since the last update.

INCREMENTAL_ROW_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of data rows sent by the client since the
last update.

TOTAL_TRANSACTION_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of transactions, envelopes, or messages
sent by the client.

TOTAL_ROW_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of data rows sent by the client.

CPU_CORE_UTILIZATION.description:
Displays the total CPU usage for the client thread, as a
percentage of a single CPU core.

CPU_SYSTEM_UTILIZATION.description:
Displays the total system CPU time, in microseconds, since the creation of the client
thread.

CPU_USER_UTILIZATION.description:
Displays the total user CPU time, in microseconds, since the
creation of the client thread.

TOTAL_CPU_TIME.description:
Displays the total CPU time, in microseconds, since the creation
of the client.

TOTAL_CPU_SYSTEM_TIME.description:
Displays the total system CPU time, in microseconds, since the
creation of the client thread.

TOTAL_CPU_USER_TIME.description:
Displays the total user CPU time, in microseconds, since the
creation of the client thread.

CONNECT_TIME.description:
Displays the time the server accepts (but does not authenticate)
the connection.

PUBLISHER_DURATION.description:
Displays the duration of lapsed real time, in microseconds, since
the creation of the client thread.

LAST_UPDATE_TIME.description:
Displays the last time the statistics were updated for the
publisher.

M_STREAMING_PROJECT_STREAMS.description: Provides streaming project stream monitoring information.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema in which the application is deployed.

PROJECT_NAME.description: Displays the name given to the project.

PROJECT_INSTANCE.description: Displays the instance number of the project.

STREAM_NAME.description: Displays the name of the stream.

STREAM_TYPE.description:
Displays the type of stream: STREAM, DELTASTREAM, WINDOW, or
METADATA.

VISIBILITY.description:
Displays the visibility of the stream: INPUT, OUTPUT, LOCAL, or
INTERMEDIATE.

TARGET_NAME.description:
Denotes that this stream is an intermediate stream used to
populate this target.

GD_SUPPORT_LEVEL.description:
Indicates whether GD (guaranteed delivery) is enabled for the
stream or window: NOT_SUPPORTED, SUPPORTED, or
SUPPORTED_WITH_CHECKPOINT.

TRANSACTION_THROUGHPUT.description:
Displays the stream's performance, in transactions per second,
since the last update.

ROW_THROUGHPUT.description:
Displays the stream's performance, in rows per second, since the
last update.

INCREMENTAL_TRANSACTION_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of transactions processed by the server since
the last update.

INCREMENTAL_ROW_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of rows processed by the server since the
last update.

QUEUE_SIZE.description: Displays the stream's input queue size in bytes.

STORE_ROW_COUNT.description:
Displays the Number of rows in the store. This is only applicable
for Windows.

SEQUENCE_NUMBER.description:
Displays a sequentially increasing number that represents how
many times the statistics have been updated.

CPU_CORE_UTILIZATION.description:
Displays the total CPU usage for the stream thread, as a
percentage of a single CPU core.

CPU_UTILIZATION.description:
Displays the total CPU usage for the stream, as a percentage of
all CPU cores on the machine.

CPU_SYSTEM_UTILIZATION.description:
Displays the system CPU usage for the stream, as a percentage of
all CPU cores on the machine.

CPU_USER_UTILIZATION.description:
Displays the user CPU usage for the stream, as a percentage of
all CPU cores on the machine.

TOTAL_CPU_TIME.description:
Displays the total CPU time since the creation of the stream, in
microseconds.

TOTAL_CPU_SYSTEM_TIME.description:
Displays the total system CPU time, in microseconds, since the
creation of the client thread.

TOTAL_CPU_USER_TIME.description:
Displays the total user CPU time, in microseconds, since the
creation of the client thread.

LAST_UPDATE_TIME.description:
Displays the last time the statistics were updated for the
stream.

M_STREAMING_PROJECT_SUBSCRIBERS.description: Provides monitoring information regarding streaming project subscribers.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema in which the application is deployed.

PROJECT_NAME.description: Displays the name given to the project.

PROJECT_INSTANCE.description: Displays the instance number of the project.

STREAMING_CONNECTION_ID.description: Displays the unique handle identifying the connection.

STREAM_NAME.description: Displays the name of the stream.

USER_NAME.description:
Displays the user name provided by the client during the
connection establishment. This value is shown once the user is
authenticated.

CLIENT_HOST.description:
Displays the symbolic host name of the client machine, if
available. If not available, the host is the IP address of the
client machine.

CLIENT_IP.description: Displays the IP address of the client machine as a string.

CLIENT_PORT.description:
Displays the TCP port number from which the connection
originates.

CONNECTION_TAG.description:
Displays the user-provided symbolic connection tag name. If this
is not set by the user, then the connection tag is NULL.

IS_SUBSCRIBED.description:
Displays the whether or not the user is subscribed to a stream:
TRUE/FALSE.

TRANSACTION_THROUGHPUT.description:
Displays the client's performance, in transactions per second,
sent by the client since the last update. Envelopes and any
service messages count as transactions.

ROW_THROUGHPUT.description:
Displays the client's performance, in data rows per second, sent
by the client since the last update.

INCREMENTAL_TRANSACTION_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of transactions, envelopes, or messages sent
by the client since the last update.

INCREMENTAL_ROW_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of data rows sent by the client since the
last update.

TOTAL_TRANSACTION_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of transactions, envelopes, or messages
sent by the client.

TOTAL_ROW_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of data rows received by the
client.

TOTAL_ROWS_DROPPED_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of data rows dropped in the gateway
because they were not read quickly enough by the client.

ACCUMULATOR_SIZE.description:
Displays the number of rows collected in the accumulator to be
sent in the next pulse. This value is for pulsed subscriptions
only.

QUEUE_SIZE.description:
Displays the number of rows queued for transmission to the
client.

QUEUE_UTILIZATION.description:
Displays the percentage usage of the queue for transmitting rows
to the client.

WORK_QUEUE_SIZE.description:
Displays the number of rows queued for transmission to the
client. These rows have been transferred from the internal queue
to the socket buffer and can be regrouped by envelopes.

CPU_CORE_UTILIZATION.description:
Displays the total CPU usage for the client thread, as a
percentage of a single CPU core.

CPU_UTILIZATION.description:
Displays the total CPU usage for the client, as a percentage of
all CPU cores on the machine.

CPU_SYSTEM_UTILIZATION.description:
Displays the total systemn CPU time, in microseconds, since the
creation of the client thread.

CPU_USER_UTILIZATION.description:
Displays the total user CPU time, in microseconds, since the
creation of the client thread.

TOTAL_CPU_TIME.description:
Displays the total CPU time since the creation of the client, in
microseconds.

TOTAL_CPU_SYSTEM_TIME.description:
Displays the total system CPU time, in microseconds, since the
creation of the client thread.

TOTAL_CPU_USER_TIME.description:
Displays the total user CPU time, in microseconds, since the
creation of the client thread.

CONNECT_TIME.description:
Displays the time the server accepts (but does not authenticate)
the connection.

SUBSCRIBER_DURATION.description:
Displays the duration of lapsed real time, in microseconds, since
the creation of the client thread.

LAST_UPDATE_TIME.description:
Displays the last time statistics were updated for the
subscriber.

SCHEMA_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the schema where streaming applications are
deployed.

SERVICE_ALIAS.description: Displays the name of the SAP HANA streaming node.

HOST.description: Displays the name of the host.

M_SYSTEM_AVAILABILITY.description: Monitors the availability of the system.

EVENT_TIME.description: Displays the time that this event was originally traced.

TRACE_HOST.description: Displays the host the trace file was read from.

SYSTEM_ACTIVE.description: Displays the system active status: NO, YES, UNKNOWN, STARTING, or STOPPING.

HOST.description: Displays the host that traced the event.

SERVICE_NAME.description: Displays the service name.

TARGET_HOST_CONFIG_ROLES.description: Displays the target host configuration roles.

TARGET_HOST_ACTUAL_ROLES.description: Displays the target host actual roles.

TARGET_STORAGE_CONFIG_PARTITION.description: Displays the target storage configuration partition.

TARGET_STORAGE_ACTUAL_PARTITION.description: Displays the target storage actual partition.

SITE_ID.description: Displays the system replication site ID.

M_SYSTEM_DATA_STATISTICS.description: Lists data statistics generated by the server when you query a column and row store object.

DATA_STATISTICS_TYPE.description: Displays the data statistics object type.

DATA_SOURCE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the data source object.

DATA_SOURCE_OBJECT_NAME.description: Displays the name of the data source object.

DATA_SOURCE_COLUMN_NAMES.description: Lists the column names of the data source.

DATA_SOURCE_STORAGE_TYPE.description: Displays the source storage type of the data source.

DATA_SOURCE_PART_ID.description: Displays the partition ID of the data source.

LAST_REFRESH_TIME.description: Displays the time the data statistics object was generated.

DATA_STATISTICS_CONTENT.description:
Lists the content and properties of the data statistics object as of the last refresh
(JSON format). The content section is empty for SIMPLE; it
contains values and frequencies in a list for TOPK. For SAMPLE,
it contains a list of sample output. The content is similar to
exported data for data statistics objects.The properties section contains properties relevant to the data statistics of the
specified type. The properties section, when present, may
include some of the following properties:BUCKETSDisplays the number of buckets in the data statistics objectCOUNTDisplays the number of rows in the data sourceDISTINCT COUNTDisplays the number of unique values in the data sourceNULL COUNTDisplays the number of NULL values in the data sourceMIN VALUEDisplays the minimum value in the data source in bytesMAX VALUEDisplays the maximum value in the data source in bytesMIN MAX IS VALIDDisplays whether MIN/MAX values are validSAMPLE SIZEDisplays the sample size at build time, expressed as a number

CATEGORY.description: Displays whether the category of the system limit is adaptable.

NAME.description: Displays the name of the system limit.

VALUE.description: Displays the value of the system limit.

TYPE.description: Displays the type of value.

COMMENT.description: Displays any additional comments for system limits.

M_SYSTEM_OVERVIEW.description: Provides an overview of system status including important resource usage information and alerts.

NAME.description: Displays the key name in section.

STATUS.description:
Displays the status value: OK, ERROR, or WARNING. This row is empty for
info items.

VALUE.description: Displays the key value in section.

SECONDARY_SITE_ID.description: Displays the generated site ID of the secondary site.

SECONDARY_SITE_NAME.description: Displays the secondary logical site name.

REPLICATION_MODE.description:
Displays the configured replication mode:SYNC: the synchronous replication that acknowledges when a
buffer has been written to a disk.SYNCMEM: the synchronous replication that acknowledges when
a buffer has arrived in the memory.ASYNC: the asynchronous replication.UNKNOWN: set if the replication mode cannot be determined
(for example, if there is a communication error when getting
status information from a service).

SECONDARY_READ_ACCESS_STATUS.description:
Indicates whether the secondary system is read-enabled and if read access is
activated:NOT CONFIGURED: Displays that an operation mode is used that does not allow read
access.STOPPED: Displays that the secondary is running in operation mode logreplay_readaccess,
but it is currently stopped.VERSION MISMATCH: Displays that the secondary system is running in operation mode
logreplay_readaccess but read access is internally disabled
on the secondary system because it is on a different SAP
HANA version than the primary system.INITIALIZING: Displays that the secondary site is running in operation mode
logreplay_readaccess but read access is not yet completely
initialized. SQL connections to the secondary system fail in
this state.CONSISTENT: Displays that log replay on the secondary site
has reached a global consistent state, but the SQL port is
not open.ACTIVE: Displays that the secondary system is running in operation mode
logreplay_readaccess and is initialized for read access. SQL
connections are possible in this state.

TIER.description: Displays the tier on which the source site is located.

M_SYSTEM_REPLICATION_MVCC_HISTORY.description: Displays the global multi-version concurrency control (MVCC) timestamp history in the secondary site for system replication. The global MVCC timestamp of the secondary site is updated after a chunk of logs from the primary site is replayed on the secondary site.

SECONDARY_SITE_TIME.description: Displays the global MVCC timestamp updated time of the secondary site

PRIMARY_SITE_TIME.description: Displays the global MVCC updated time of the primary site

SECONDARY_SITE_UPDATE_DURATION.description: Displays the global MVCC update duration of the secondary site in milliseconds

M_SYSTEM_REPLICATION_TAKEOVER_HISTORY.description: Provides access to a history of HSR takeover executions.

TAKEOVER_START_TIME.description:
Displays the start time of the takeover command. This value matches tenant takeovers that
are executed within the same system takeover process.

TAKEOVER_END_TIME.description: Displays the end time of the takeover command.

EXECUTION_START_TIME.description: Displays the execution start time for takeover of the transaction domain.

EXECUTION_END_TIME.description: Displays the execution end time for takeover of the transaction domain.

SITE_ID.description: Displays the generated ID of the secondary site at takeover time.

SITE _NAME.description: Displays the logical name provided by the site administrator at takeover time.

MASTER_NAMESERVER_HOST.description: Displays the master nameserver host at takeover time.

VERSION.description: Displays the SAP HANA version for the site that is executing the takeover.

SOURCE_SITE_ID.description: Displays the generated ID of the source site at takeover time.

SOURCE_SITE _NAME.description:
Displays the logical name for the source site provided by the site administrator at
takeover time.

SOURCE_MASTER_NAMESERVER_HOST.description: Displays the source site master nameserver host at takeover time.

SOURCE_VERSION.description: Displays the source site SAP HANA version.

TAKEOVER_TYPE.description: Displays how the system went online:ONLINE: an online takeoverOFFLINE: an offline takeoverTIMETRAVEL: a timetravel takeover

REPLICATION_MODE.description: Displays the replication mode at takeover time.

OPERATION_MODE.description: Displays the operation mode at takeover time.

REPLICATION_STATUS.description: Displays the replication status at takeover time.

LOG_POSITION.description: Displays the master log position, that has been reached by takeover.

LOG_POSITION_TIME.description: Displays the time reached by the takeover.

SHIPPED_LOG_POSITION.description:
Displays the highest master log position that has been shipped before executing
takeover.

SHIPPED_LOG_POSITION_TIME.description: Displays the time of the last shipped log buffer before executing takeover.

COMMENTS.description: Displays a comment for the remote subscription.

M_SYSTEM_REPLICATION_TIMETRAVEL.description: Provides information about the valid time travel range for each service on a secondary site.

START_SNAPSHOT_ID.description:
Displays the snapshot ID of the oldest commit timestamp on which timetravel can
start.

START_TIME.description: Displays the oldest commit timestamp on which timetravel can start.

START_REDO_LOG_POSITION.description: Displays the oldest log position on which timetravel can start.

END_TIME.description: Displays the newest commit timestamp which can be reached via timetravel.

END_REDO_LOG_POSITION.description: Displays the newest log position that can be reached via timetravel.

COORDINATOR_TYPE.description:
Displays the coordinator type: MASTER if it is a transaction master volume type or NONE
if it is not a coordinator volume type.

M_TABLES.description: Provides information on row and column tables, as well as collection tables (JSON Document Store).

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

RECORD_COUNT.description: Displays the number of records in this table.

TABLE_SIZE.description:
Displays the allocated memory size for fixed-size and variable-size part
in bytes.

IS_COLUMN_TABLE.description: Displays whether the table is a column table: TRUE/FALSE.

TABLE_TYPE.description: Displays the type of the table: ROW, COLUMN, or COLLECTION.

IS_PARTITIONED.description: Displays whether the table is partitioned: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_REPLICATED.description: Displays whether the table is replicated: TRUE/FALSE.

HAS_RECORD_COMMIT_TIMESTAMP.description: Displays whether table is tracking commit timestamps: TRUE/FALSE.

M_TABLE_LOB_FILES.description: Provides information about all LOB files that belong to a table.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

PART_ID.description:
Displays the partition ID. Returns the following:For partitioned tables, the part ID is equal to the sequential number
of the partition, starting at 1.In the case of replicated tables, the part ID is 1 for the original
table and subsequent part IDs are assigned to replica tables.The part ID is 0 for tables that are not partitioned.A part ID value of -1 indicates that a modification of the table
schema is in progress.

TABLE_OID.description:
Displays the table OID, same as owner_oid if the table is found; 0
otherwise.

PHYSICAL_SIZE.description: Displays the file size in bytes.

BINARY_SIZE.description: Displays the LOB size in bytes.

CHARACTER_SIZE.description: Displays the number of characters in NCLOB.

PAGE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of pages used for a LOB file.

M_TABLE_LOB_STATISTICS.description: Provides information about the aggregated file and packed LOB statistics per host, port, table, partition, and column.

HOST.description: Displays the name of the host.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name associated with the LOBs.

TABLE_NAME.description: Displays the table name associated with the LOBs.

PART_ID.description:
Returns the table partition ID:For partitioned tables, the part ID is equal to the
sequential number of the partition, starting at 1.For replicated tables, the part ID is 1 for the original
table and subsequent part IDs are assigned to replica
tables.The part ID is 0 for tables that are not partitioned.A part ID value of -1 indicates that a modification of the
table schema is currently in progress.

COLUMN_NAME.description: Displays the column name associated with the LOBs.

LOB_STORAGE_TYPE.description:
Displays that the LOB storage type is one of the following:INPLACESmall LOBs (completely loaded into the main
memory).PACKEDMedium-sized LOBs where the size is between two
thresholds (only loaded into the main memory when
required).FILELarge LOBs (individually loaded into the main memory
on demand).

CONTAINER_ID.description:
Displays the container ID of the packed LOB container; NULL for
file LOBs.

DISK_SIZE.description: Displays the number of bytes used for the LOBs on a disk.

BINARY_SIZE.description:
Displays the binary size in bytes of the LOBs. This value may be
less than the DISK_SIZE due to management information and
paging.

CHARACTER_SIZE.description:
Displays the number of characters in the NCLOBs (only) column.
For packed LOBs, this corresponds to the total number of
characters of all of the LOBs in the container.

LOB_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of associated LOBs.

READ_COUNT.description: Displays the counter for read operations on the LOBs.

MEMORY_SIZE.description:
Displays the size in bytes of the LOB pages that are loaded in
the memory.

MEMORY_PAGE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of LOB pages loaded in the memory.

M_TABLE_LOCATIONS.description: Provides information about tables and their logical location. Physical locations are shown in M_TABLE_PERSISTENCE_LOCATIONS.

HOST.description:
Displays the host where table data is located. This value is empty for
views.

PORT.description:
Displays the port where the table data is located. This value is 0 for
views.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

PART_ID.description:
Returns the table partition ID:For partitioned tables, the part ID is equal to the sequential number
of the partition, starting at 1.For replicated tables, the part ID is 1 for the original table and
subsequent part IDs are assigned to replica tables.The part ID is 0 for tables that are not partitioned.A part ID value of -1 indicates that a modification of the table
schema is currently in progress.

LOCATION.description: Displays the host and port where the table data is located.

LOCK_OWNER_TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the transaction object ID owning the lock.

LOCK_OWNER_UPDATE_TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the write transaction ID owning the lock.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

OBJECT_TYPE.description: Displays the object type.

LOCK_MODE.description: Displays the lock mode: EXCLUSIVE/INTENTIONAL EXCLUSIVE.

M_TABLE_PARTITION_STATISTICS.description: Returns the table partition runtime statistics for column store partition tables only. This view is empty if the partition_statistics_select_enabled property in the indexserver.ini configuration file is disabled.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

PART_ID.description:
Displays the table partition ID:For partitioned tables, the part ID is equal to the
sequential number of the partition, starting at 1.In the case of replicated tables, the part ID is 1 for the
original table and subsequent part IDs are assigned to
replica tables.The part ID is 0 for tables that are not partitioned.A part ID value of -1 indicates that the table schema is currently in being
modified.

SELECT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of times a partition has been selected.

LAST_SELECT_TIME.description: Displays the last time that this partition was selected.

M_TABLE_PARTITIONS.description: Provides information regarding partition-specific memory and disk usage for partitioned tables.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

NODE_ID.description: Displays the ID of the partition node.

PARENT_NODE_ID.description: Displays the ID of the parent node.

PART_ID.description:
Displays the table partition ID:For partitioned tables, the part ID is equal to the
sequential number of the partition, starting at 1.For replicated tables, the part ID is 1 for the original
table and subsequent part IDs are assigned to replica
tables.The part ID is 0 for tables that are not partitioned.A part ID value of -1 indicates that a modification of the
table schema is currently in progress.

LOAD_UNIT.description:
Displays the effective load unit. Valid values are PAGE (when the
partition uses page loadable storage) and COLUMN (when the
partition uses column loadable storage).

STORAGE_TYPE.description:
Displays DEFAULT when a column storage type is used.Displays EXTENDED when an
extended storage type is used.

MEMORY_SIZE_IN_TOTAL.description:
Displays the total memory size in bytes, which is the sum of the
memory in the main, delta, and history parts.

MEMORY_SIZE_IN_MAIN.description:
Displays the current memory consumption in main in bytes. This
value varies depending on the number of loaded attributes and
includes data for open transactions.

MEMORY_SIZE_IN_PAGE_LOADABLE.description:
Displays the total resident paged memory size, in bytes, of the
partition.

MEMORY_SIZE_IN_DELTA.description: Displays the current memory consumption in delta in bytes.

PERSISTENT_MEMORY_SIZE_IN_TOTAL.description:
Displays the current pure persistent memory consumption (in
bytes) for every column store table

DISK_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size of a table partition on a disk in bytes.Column storage displays
the size on the disk per partition. Extended storage
displays the size on the disk for all extended storage
partitions.

DISK_SIZE_IN_PAGE_LOADABLE.description:
Displays the total disk size, in bytes, of page-loadable storage
for this partition.

ESTIMATED_MAX_MEMORY_SIZE_IN_TOTAL.description:
Displays the total estimated maximum memory consumption in bytes
for fully loaded partitions. This value does not include data
for open transactions.

LAST_ESTIMATED_MEMORY_SIZE.description:
Displays the last estimated memory consumption in bytes of a
fully loaded partition.

RAW_RECORD_COUNT_IN_MAIN.description:
Displays the current number of entries in the main part. This
value differs from the number of visible main rows because there
are entries for modified rows that are marked as
invalidated.Displays the last time that the last-estimated memory consumption
was calculated.

RAW_RECORD_COUNT_IN_DELTA.description:
Displays the current number of entries in the delta part. This
value differs from the number of visible delta rows because
there are additional entries, such as deleted rows or updated
rows. This value can contain deleted records.

LOADED.description:
Displays the last time that the last-estimated memory consumptionDisplays how many columns in the table are loaded in memory.
Valuse are: NO, PARTIALLY, or FULL. For a description of each
column, see M_CS_COLUMNS.

IS_REPLICA.description: Displays whether the part is a replica (TRUE/FALSE).

M_TABLE_PERSISTENCE_LOCATIONS.description: Provides information about column store tables and their physical data locations.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

PART_ID.description:
Displays the table partition ID:For partitioned tables, the part ID is equal to the sequential number
of the partition, starting at 1.In the case of replicated tables, the part ID is 1 for the original
table and subsequent part IDs are assigned to replica tables.The part ID is 0 for tables that are not partitioned.A part ID value of -1 indicates that the table schema is currently in
being modified.

IS_HISTORY.description: Displays whether the history is part of a table: TRUE/FALSE.

PERSISTENCE_HOST.description: Displays the host where table data is located.

PERSISTENCE_PORT.description: Displays the port where table data is located.

M_TABLE_PERSISTENCE_LOCATION_STATISTICS.description: Provides persistence storage statistics for tables partitions and services.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

PART_ID.description:
Displays the table partition ID:For partitioned tables, the part ID is equal to the
sequential number of the partition, starting at 1.In the case of replicated tables, the part ID is 1 for the
original table and subsequent part IDs are assigned to
replica tables.The part ID is 0 for tables that are not partitioned.A part ID value of -1 indicates that the table schema is
currently in being modified.

DISK_SIZE.description: Displays the total disk size, in bytes, of all table parts.

PAGE_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of pages of all table parts.

BYTES_WRITTEN.description: Displays the number of bytes written to the table.

BYTES_APPENDED.description: Displays the number of bytes appended to the table.

BYTES_READ.description: Displays the number of bytes read from the table.

BYTESTREAM_WRITTEN.description: Displays the number of bytes written to the table via the streaming interface.

APPEND_COUNT.description: Displays the number of times the table was appended to.

WRITE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of times the table was written to.

OPTIMIZE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of times the table was written to be optimized.

READ_COUNT.description: Displays the number of times the table was read from.

TRUNCATE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of times the table was truncated.

COPY_COUNT.description: Displays the number of times the table was copied.

PAGE_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of pages of all of the table parts.

BYTES_WRITTEN.description: Displays the number of bytes that are written to the table.

BYTES_APPENDED.description: Displays the number of bytes that are appended to the table.

BYTES_READ.description: Displays the number of bytes that are read from the table.

BYTESTREAM_WRITTEN.description:
Displays the number of bytes that are written to the table via a
streaming interface.

APPEND_COUNT.description: Displays the number of times that the table was appended to.

WRITE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of times that the table was written to.

OPTIMIZE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of times that the table was optimized.

READ_COUNT.description: Displays the number of times that the table was read from.

TRUNCATE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of times that the table was truncated.

COPY_COUNT.description: Displays the number of times that the table was copied.

M_TABLE_PERSISTENT_MEMORY_FILES.description: Displays the persistent memory file information for all of the tables in the database.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

PART_ID.description:
Returns the table partition ID:For partitioned tables, the part ID is equal to the
sequential number of the partition, starting at 1.For replicated tables, the part ID is 1 for the original
table and subsequent part IDs are assigned to replica
tables.The part ID is 0 for tables that are not partitioned.A part ID value of -1 indicates that a modification of the
table schema is currently in progress.

COLUMN_FRAGMENT_TYPE.description: Displays the column fragment type: PAGED MAIN, SINGLE MAIN, or DELTA.

FILE_BLOCK_ID.description:
Displays the persistent memory block identifier inside the column
fragment version.

FILE_NAME.description: Displays the persistent memory block file name.

FILE_STATUS.description: Displays the persistent memory file status: ACTIVE/INACTIVE.

M_TABLE_PLACEMENT_LOCATIONS.description: Provides table placement location monitoring information.

LOCATION_NAME.description: Displays the name of the location.

SYSTEM_DEFINED_VOLUME_IDS.description:
Displays the volume IDs, which are received from the
topology.

INCLUDE.description:
Displays the list of volume IDs or synonyms which are added to
the location name.

EXCLUDE.description:
Displays the list of volume IDs or synonyms which are removed
from the location name.

EFFECTIVE_VOLUME_IDS.description: Displays the calculated volume IDs for the location name.

M_TABLE_PRUNING_STATISTICS.description: Provides an interface to access statistics for historical data. This data helps detect unexpectedly heavy historical processing by an application, including disclosure of unqualified historical queries as well as assessing the effectiveness of pruning.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name.

PRUNING_CALLER.description:
Displays the operation that initiated the pruning: SEARCH, OLAP ENGINE, JOIN ENGINE,
TABLE UPDATE, SQL PLAN GENERATION, or SQL PLAN EXECUTION.

PRUNING_TYPE.description: Displays the type of pruning that was initiated: COMPILE TIME, RUNTIME STATIC,RANGE RESTRICTION,or RUNTIME DYNAMIC.

PRUNING_FILTER.description: Displays the predicate used for pruning.

TOTAL_CS_PART_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of column store partitions before pruning.

TOTAL_ES_PART_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of extended storage
partitions before pruning.

PRUNED_CS_PART_COUNT.description: Displays the number of column store partitions after pruning.

PRUNED_CS_PAGE_LOADABLE_PART_COUNT.description: Displays the number of column store partitions using paged attributes after pruning.

PRUNED_ES_PART_COUNT.description:
Displays the number of extended storage partitions
after pruning.

M_TABLE_REPLICAS.description: Provides detailed information on asynchronous/synchronous table replicas.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the replica (replication target).

TABLE_NAME.description: Displays the table name of the replica (replication target).

TABLE_TYPE.description: Displays the replica table type: ROW/COLUMN.

SOURCE_SCHEMA_NAME.description: Displays the schema name of the replication source.

SOURCE_TABLE_NAME.description: Displays the table name of the replication source.

SOURCE_TABLE_TYPE.description: Displays the source table type: ROW/COLUMN.

SOURCE_TABLE_VOLUME_ID.description: Displays the volume ID of the source table.

PART_ID.description:
Displays the table partition ID:For partitioned tables, the part ID is equal to the
sequential number of the partition, starting at 1.In the case of replicated tables, the part ID is 1 for the
original table and subsequent part IDs are assigned to
replica tables.The part ID is 0 for tables that are not partitioned.A part ID value of -1 indicates that the table schema is
currently in being modified.

REPLICATION_STATUS.description: Displays the table replication status: ENABLED, ENABLING, or DISABLED.

LAST_ENABLE_TIME.description: Displays the time of the last replication enablement.

LAST_DISABLE_TIME.description: Displays the time of the last replication disablement.

LAST_ERROR_TIME.description: Displays the time of the last error.

INSERT_RETRY_COUNT.description: Displays the insert statement retry count.

UPDATE_RETRY_COUNT.description: Displays the update statement retry count.

DELETE_RETRY_COUNT.description: Displays the delete statement retry count.

M_TABLE_REPLICATION_VOLUME_HISTORY.description: Displays detailed information on the history of the table replication volume.

SOURCE_VOLUME_ID.description: Displays the volume ID of the source. If value is greater than 2048, it means it is in a remote location. This value is applicable to remote table replication only.

REPLICA_VOLUME_ID.description: Displays the volume ID of replica. If the value is greater than 2048, it means that it is a remote location.

SOURCE_REMOTE_SOURCE_NAME.description:
Displays the remote source name of the source system. This
value only appears if SOURCE_VOLUME_ID or REPLICA_VOLUME_ID is
greater than 2048.

REPLICA_REMOTE_SOURCE_NAME.description: Displays the remote source name of the replica system. This value only appears shown if SOURCE_VOLUME_ID or REPLICA_VOLUME_ID is greater than 2048.

REPLICATION_STATUS_CHANGE_TIME.description: Displays the time when the replication status was changed.

REPLICATION_STATUS.description: Displays the replication status of the replica volume. Values are: DISABLED, ENABLING, ENABLED, ENABLED_BUT_UNAVAILABLE.

REPLICATION_STATUS_CHANGE_REASON.description: Displays the reason for the change in replication status. Values are: EXCEPTION, EXCEPTION_CLEANUP, COMMAND, RESTART, SHUTDOWN, INTERNAL, INITIAL

ERROR_CODE.description:
Displays the error code in the event a replication volume related to the exception is
turned off.

ERROR_MESSAGE.description:
Displays the error message in case the event a replication volume related to the
exception is turned off.

M_TABLE_REPLICATION_VOLUME_STATISTICS.description: Provides detailed information on table replication volume statistics.

SOURCE_REMOTE_SOURCE_NAME.description:
Displays the remote source name of source system. If SOURCE_REMOTE_SOURCE_NAME and
REPLICA_REMOTE_SOURCE_NAME are NULL, it means non-remote table
replication (RTR).

REPLICA_REMOTE_SOURCE_NAME.description: Displays the remote source name of replica system.

LAST_SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME.description:
Displays the last commit time of source system. The value in this column cannot be
reset using the ALTER SYSTEM RESET MONITORING View
statement.

TRANSACTION_LOG_QUEUE_SIZE.description:
Displays the current transaction log queue size. This is the log count in the queue.
The value in this column cannot be reset using the ALTER SYSTEM
RESET MONITORING View statement.

SHIPPED_TRANSACTION_LOG_COUNT.description: Displays the shipped transaction log count.

SHIPPED_TRANSACTION_LOG_SIZE.description: Displays the shipped transaction log size in bytes.

REPLAYED_TRANSACTION_LOG_SIZE.description: Displays the replayed transaction log size in bytes.

REPLAYED_COMMIT_COUNT.description:
Displays the replayed commit count. The count includes the replayed DDL/DML commit
count.

REPLAYED_DDL_COMMIT_COUNT.description:
Displays the replayed DDL commit count. This is applicable to remote table
replication only.

TRANSACTION_REPLAY_ERROR_COUNT.description: Displays the transaction replay error count.

AVG_PRECOMMIT_PROPAGATION_LATENCY.description: Displays the average precommit propagation latency time, in microseconds.

AVG_PROPAGATION_LATENCY.description:
Displays the average commit propagation latency, in microseconds. Propagation latency
is the sum of network latency, dispatch latency, and processing
latency.

AVG_PROCESSING_LATENCY.description: Displays the average processing latency, in microseconds, of the commit log.

TOTAL_DML_WAIT_TIME.description: Displays the accumulated DML wait time, in microseconds.

M_TABLE_REPLICATION_VOLUME_STATISTICS_RE.description: Displays detailed information on values after executing ALTER SYSTEM RESET MONITORING VIEW.

RESET_TIME.description: Displays the time of the last reset.

SOURCE_REMOTE_SOURCE_NAME.description:
Displays the remote source name of source system. If SOURCE_REMOTE_SOURCE_NAME and
REPLICA_REMOTE_SOURCE_NAME are NULL, it means non-remote table
replication (RTR).

REPLICA_REMOTE_SOURCE_NAME.description: Displays the remote source name of replica system.

LAST_SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME.description:
Displays the last commit time of source system. The value in this column cannot be
reset using the ALTER SYSTEM RESET MONITORING View
statement.

TRANSACTION_LOG_QUEUE_SIZE.description:
Displays the current transaction log queue size. This is the log count in the queue.
The value in this column cannot be reset using the ALTER SYSTEM
RESET MONITORING View statement.

SHIPPED_TRANSACTION_LOG_COUNT.description: Displays the shipped transaction log count.

SHIPPED_TRANSACTION_LOG_SIZE.description: Displays the shipped transaction log size in bytes.

REPLAYED_TRANSACTION_LOG_SIZE.description: Displays the replayed transaction log size in bytes.

REPLAYED_COMMIT_COUNT.description:
Displays the replayed commit count. The count includes the
replayed DDL/DML commit count.

REPLAYED_DDL_COMMIT_COUNT.description:
Displays the replayed DDL commit count. This is applicable to
remote table replication only.

TRANSACTION_REPLAY_ERROR_COUNT.description: Displays the transaction replay error count.

AVG_PRECOMMIT_PROPAGATION_LATENCY.description:
Displays the average precommit propagation latency time, in
microseconds.

AVG_PROPAGATION_LATENCY.description:
Displays the average commit propagation latency, in
microseconds. Propagation latency is the sum of network latency,
dispatch latency, and processing latency.

AVG_PROCESSING_LATENCY.description:
Displays the average processing latency, in microseconds, of
the commit log.

TOTAL_DML_WAIT_TIME.description:
Displays the accumulated DML wait time, in
microseconds.

TABLE_OID.description: Displays the table object ID.

blocker transaction or cursor.

number of unconsolidated udivlists).

LAST_MODIFY_TIME.description:
Displays the timestamp when the last INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, or REPLACE statement was
executed.

PART_ID.description:
Displays the table partition ID:For partitioned tables, the part ID is equal to the sequential number
of the partition, starting at 1.In the case of replicated tables, the part ID is 1 for the original
table and subsequent part IDs are assigned to replica tables.The part ID is 0 for tables that are not partitioned.A part ID value of -1 indicates that the table schema is currently in
being modified.

TRUE/FALSE.

COMPLETED.

Displays the total number of task partitions for a task

Displays the number of characters for character types. This value is the

HAS_COLUMN_ALIASES.description: Displays whether the view has a columns alias: TRUE/FALSE.

IS_COLUMN_VIEW.description: Displays whether or not this view is a column view: TRUE/FALSE

VIEW_TYPE.description: Displays the type of view: ROW, OLAP, JOIN, HIERARCHY, or CALC.

IS_TENANT_SHARED.description:
Displays whether the view metadata can be shared across tenants:
TRUE/FALSE.

HAS_STRUCTURED_PRIVILEGE_CHECK.description:

TRUE/FALSE.

M_TEMPORARY_VIEW_COLUMNS.description: Provides information about temporary view columns.

SCALE.description:
Displays the maximum number of digits to the right of the decimal point:
TIME or TIMESTAMP. The decimal digits are defined as the number of digits
to the right of the decimal point in the second's component of the
data.

Displays whether the column is allowed to accept null value:
TRUE/FALSE.

Displays the type of compression: DEFAULT, PREFIXED, SPARSE, CLUSTERED,

MIME_TYPE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the mime type.

MIME_TYPE_DESCRIPTION.description: Displays the description of the mime type.

M_TIMEZONE_ALERTS.description: Provides information about alerts relating to the status of SAP HANA internal timezone conversion.

STATUS.description:
Displays the status to report: TABLES NOT FOUND, TABLES EMPTY, NO
SYSTEM TIMEZONE, SYSTEM TIMEZONE DISABLED, or CONVERSION
MISMATCH.

TIMEZONE_NAME.description:
Displays the name of the timezone to which status message applies
or NULL if the status does not apply to a specific timezone.

MISMATCH_BEGIN.description:
Displays the UTC time at which the first mismatch of the mismatch
period occurred or NULL if no mismatch applies.

MISMATCH_END.description:
Displays the UTC time at which the last mismatch of the mismatch
period occurred or NULL if no mismatch applies.

M_TOPOLOGY_TREE.description: Provides information about SAP HANA nameserver topology content.

PATH.description: Displays the path to the key.

M_TRACEFILES.description: Provides information about all trace files.

FILE_SIZE.description: Displays the file size in bytes.

USED_SIZE.description:
Shows the used disk space. This can help to identify issues caused by a
full disk.

M_TRACEFILE_CONTENTS.description: Provides SAP HANA information from trace files.

OFFSET.description: Displays the file offset in bytes.

CONTENT.description: Displays the file content at the offset.

M_TRACE_CONFIGURATION.description: Provides information about trace configuration statistics.

FILE_NAME_PREFIX.description: Displays the trace file name prefix.

ALERT_FORMATTER.description: Displays the alert trace formatter name.

ALERT_FILE_NAME_PREFIX.description: Displays the alert trace file name prefix.

TRACE_FLUSH_INTERVAL.description: Displays the trace flush interval in seconds.

ALERT_TRACE_LEVEL.description: The trace level for alert traces.

TRACE_BUFFER_SIZE.description: Displays the trace buffer size in bytes.

MAX_TRACE_FILE_SIZE.description: Displays the max trace file size in bytes.

MAX_TRACE_FILE_ID.description: Displays the max trace file ID.

MAX_TRACE_FILES.description: Displays the max trace files to keep.

ALERT_TRACE_BUFFER_SIZE.description: Displays the alert trace buffer size in bytes.

MAX_ALERT_TRACE_FILE_SIZE.description: Displays the max alert trace file size in bytes.

TRACE_COMPRESSION_INTERVAL.description:
Displays the interval, in seconds, to check for trace files that need to
be compressed.

M_TRANSACTIONS.description: Provides information about all transactions created by users or the database.

TRANSACTION_ID.description:
Displays the transaction object ID (this number is reused after a
transaction is closed).

VOLUME_ID.description: Displays the volume ID where the transaction has started.

PRIMARY_TRANSACTION_ID.description:
Displays the primary transaction object ID for the external
transaction.

TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE.description: Displays the transaction sequence number in a transaction.

UPDATE_TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the write transaction ID (this number is ever increasing).

TRANSACTION_STATUS.description:
Displays the transaction status; INACTIVE, ACTIVE, PRECOMMITTED,
ABORTING, PARTIAL_ABORTING, or ACTIVE_PREPARE_COMMIT.

TRANSACTION_TYPE.description:
Displays the transaction type; USER, VERSION GARBAGE COLLECTION, DDL
VERSION GARBAGE COLLECTION, INTERNAL, or EXTERNAL.

START_TIME.description: Displays the transaction start time.

START_MVCC_TIMESTAMP.description: Displays the internal MVCC timestamp of the transaction start time.

END_MVCC_TIMESTAMP.description: Displays the internal MVCC timestamp of the transaction end time.

EXECUTED_STATEMENT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of executed statements in the transaction.

CREATED_VERSION_COUNT.description: Displays the number of created versions in the transaction.

ALLOCATED_VERSION_SIZE.description: Displays the allocated version size in the transaction in bytes.

ACQUIRED_LOCK_COUNT.description: Displays the number of acquired locks in the transaction.

LOCK_WAIT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of lock waits in the transaction.

LOCK_WAIT_TIME.description:
Displays the accumulated lock wait time in the transaction in
seconds.

LOCK_WAIT_TIMEOUT.description:
Displays the number of milliseconds a statement waits for a lock to be
released .

LOG_SIZE.description: Displays the generated log amount in the transaction in byptes.

CURRENT_STATEMENT_SEQUENCE.description: Displays the sequence number of the currently executed statement.

ALLOCATED_MEMORY_SIZE.description: Displays the memory size occupied by the transaction in bytes.

ACQUIRED_METALOCK_INDEX.description: Displays the index of the acquired metalock.

LOG_PARTITION_ID.description: Displays the log partition ID of the transaction.

REDO_LOG_AMOUNT.description:
Displays the size of the redo log amount generated by the transaction in
bytes.

UNDO_LOG_AMOUNT.description:
Displays the size of the undo log amount generated by the transaction in
bytes.

MIN_MVCC_SNAPSHOT_TIMESTAMP.description:
Displays the logical timestamp of the first executed statement in the
transaction.

LAST_COMMIT_ID.description: Displays the last commit ID of the transaction.

ACTIVE_STATEMENT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of opened cursors in the transaction.

ISOLATION_LEVEL.description:
Displays the isolation level of each transaction: READ UNCOMMITTED, READ
COMMITTED, REPEATABLE READ, or SERIALIZABLE.

LOG_FLUSH_ENABLED.description:
Displays whether log flushing is enabled for the transaction
(TRUE/FALSE).

LOGGING_ENABLED.description: Displays whether logging is enabled for the transaction (TRUE/FALSE).

M_TRANS_TOKENS.description: Provides information about all active transaction tokens.

PRIMARY_TRANS_TOKEN_ID.description:
Displays the primary transaction token ID for the shipped transaction token. If the
transaction token is local-only, then this has the same value as
TRANS_TOKEN_ID.

TRANSACTION_ID.description: Displays the associated transaction object ID.

LOGICAL_CONNECTION_ID.description: Displays the associated logical connection ID.

STATEMENT_ID.description: Displays the associated logical statement ID.

MVCC_SNAPSHOT_TIMESTAMP.description: Displays the MVCC timestamp that is held by the transaction token.

MVCC_SNAPSHOT_SCOPE.description: Displays the MVCC snapshot scope: TABLE/GLOBAL.

ES_SNAPSHOT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of extended storage snapshots.

ES_SNAPSHOTS.description:
Displays a list of volume and snapshot IDs for all
extended storage snapshots.

M_UNDO_CLEANUP_FILES.description: Provides information about undo files and cleanup files.

TYPE.description: Displays the file type: UNDO, CLEANUP, or FREE.

RAW_SIZE.description: Displays the raw size in bytes.

NESTED_SESSION_PARENT_ID.description: Displays the nested session parent ID.

DEPENDENT_INDEX.description: Displays the dependent index during redo.

INDOUBT_FLAG.description: Displays the indoubt flag for distributed transaction: TRUE/FALSE.

COMMIT_ID.description:
Displays the commit ID. This value is -1 for non-committed
transactions.

M_VERSION_MEMORY.description: Provides information about memory use of the row-store Multiversion Concurrency Control (MVCC) manager.

ALLOCATED_MEMORY_SIZE.description:
Displays the size of memory allocated for row-store version space in
bytes.

USED_MEMORY_SIZE.description:
Displays the size of memory actually used by row-store versions in
bytes.

RECLAIMED_VERSION_SIZE.description:
Displays the size of memory reclaimed by row-store version garbage
collection in bytes.

FREE_MEMORY_SIZE.description:
Displays the size of memory freed and reusable in row-store version space
in bytes.

M_VOLUMES.description: Provides information about the volumes used by SAP HANA servers.

SERVICE_NAME.description: Displays the service name.

SUBPATH.description: Displays the subpath appended to M_DISKS.PATH.

LIVECACHE_STORE.description: Displays whether the livecache is enabled.

FILE_TYPE.description: Displays the type of file: DATA, LOG, and so on.

USED_SIZE.description: Displays the size of used data within the file in bytes.

TOTAL_SIZE.description: Displays the total file size in bytes.

M_VOLUME_IO_DETAILED_STATISTICS.description: Provides detailed statistics about file access.

TYPE.description: Displays the type of contained files.

MAX_IO_BUFFER_SIZE.description: Displays the maximum I/O buffer size in bytes.

ACTIVE_APPEND_COUNT.description: Displays the number of active appends.

MIN_APPEND_SIZE.description: Displays the minimum size of the appended data in bytes.

AVG_APPEND_SIZE.description: Displays the average size of the appended data in bytes.

MAX_APPEND_SIZE.description: Displays the maximum size of the appended data in bytes.

SUM_APPEND_SIZE.description: Displays the total size of the appended data in bytes.

MIN_APPEND_TIME.description: Displays the minimum time for appends.

AVG_APPEND_TIME.description: Displays the average time for appends.

MAX_APPEND_TIME.description: Displays the maximum time for appends.

SUM_APPEND_TIME.description: Displays the total size of the appended data.

ACTIVE_WRITE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of active writes.

MIN_WRITE_SIZE.description: Displays the minimum size of the written data in bytes.

AVG_WRITE_SIZE.description: Displays the average size of the written data in bytes.

MAX_WRITE_SIZE.description: Displays the maximum size of the written data in bytes.

SUM_WRITE_SIZE.description: Displays the total size of written data.

MIN_WRITE_TIME.description: Displays the minimum time for writes.

AVG_WRITE_TIME.description: Displays the average time for writes.

MAX_WRITE_TIME.description: Displays the maximum time for writes.

SUM_WRITE_TIME.description: Displays the total time for writes.

TRIGGER_ASYNC_WRITE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of trigger asynchronous writes.

ACTIVE_TRIGGER_ASYNC_WRITE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of active trigger asynchronous writes.

MIN_TRIGGER_ASYNC_WRITE_SIZE.description:
Displays the minimum size of the trigger asynchronous write data in
bytes.

AVG_TRIGGER_ASYNC_WRITE_SIZE.description:
Displays the average size of the trigger asynchronous write data in
bytes.

MAX_TRIGGER_ASYNC_WRITE_SIZE.description:
Displays the maximum size of the trigger asynchronous write data in
bytes.

SUM_TRIGGER_ASYNC_WRITE_SIZE.description:
Displays the total size of the trigger asynchronous write data in
bytes.

MIN_TRIGGER_ASYNC_WRITE_TIME.description: Displays the minimum time for trigger asynchronous writes.

AVG_TRIGGER_ASYNC_WRITE_TIME.description: Displays the average time for trigger asynchronous writes.

MAX_TRIGGER_ASYNC_WRITE_TIME.description: Displays the maximum time for trigger asynchronous writes.

SUM_TRIGGER_ASYNC_WRITE_TIME.description: Displays the total time for trigger asynchronous writes.

ACTIVE_READ_COUNT.description: Displays the number of active reads.

MIN_READ_SIZE.description: Displays the minimum size of the read data in bytes.

AVG_READ_SIZE.description: Displays the average size of the read data in bytes.

MAX_READ_SIZE.description: Displays the maximum size of the read data in bytes.

SUM_READ_SIZE.description: Displays the total size of the read data in bytes.

MIN_READ_TIME.description: Displays the minimum time for reads.

AVG_READ_TIME.description: Displays the average time for reads.

MAX_READ_TIME.description: Displays the maximum time for reads.

SUM_READ_TIME.description: Displays the total time for reads.

TRIGGER_ASYNC_READ_COUNT.description: Displays the number of trigger asynchronous reads.

ACTIVE_TRIGGER_ASYNC_READ_COUNT.description: Displays the number of active trigger asynchronous reads.

MIN_TRIGGER_ASYNC_READ_SIZE.description: Displays the minimum size of the trigger asynchronous read data.

AVG_TRIGGER_ASYNC_READ_SIZE.description: Displays the average size of the trigger asynchronous read data.

MAX_TRIGGER_ASYNC_READ_SIZE.description: Displays the maximum size of the trigger asynchronous read data.

SUM_TRIGGER_ASYNC_READ_SIZE.description: Displays the total size of the trigger asynchronous read data.

MIN_TRIGGER_ASYNC_READ_TIME.description: Displays the minimum time for trigger asynchronous reads.

AVG_TRIGGER_ASYNC_READ_TIME.description: Displays the average time for trigger asynchronous reads.

MAX_TRIGGER_ASYNC_READ_TIME.description: Displays the maximum time for trigger asynchronous reads.

SUM_TRIGGER_ASYNC_READ_TIME.description: Displays the total time for trigger asynchronous reads.

TYPE.description: Displays the type of contained files.

MAX_IO_BUFFER_SIZE.description: Displays the maximum I/O buffer size in bytes.

TOTAL_APPEND_COUNT.description: Displays the number of all appends.

FAILED_APPEND_COUNT.description: Displays the number of failed appends.

TOTAL_WRITE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of all writes.

FAILED_WRITE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of failed writes.

SHORT_WRITE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of short writes.

REQUESTS_WITH_SHORT_WRITES_COUNT.description: Displays the number of requests with short writes.

AVG_SHORT_WRITES_PER_REQUEST_COUNT.description:
Displays the average number of short writes per request with short
writes.

MAX_SHORT_WRITES_PER_REQUEST_COUNT.description: Displays the maximum number of short writes per request.

FULL_RETRY_WRITE_COUNT.description: Displays the number of full retry writes.

REQUESTS_WITH_FULL_RETRY_WRITES_COUNT.description: Displays the number of requests with full retry writes.

AVG_FULL_RETRY_WRITES_PER_REQUEST_COUNT.description:
Displays the average number of full retry writes per request with full
retry writes.

MAX_FULL_RETRY_WRITES_PER_REQUEST_COUNT.description: Displays the maximum number of full retry writes per request.

TOTAL_READ_COUNT.description: Displays the number of all reads.

FAILED_READ_COUNT.description: Displays the number of failed reads.

SHORT_READ_COUNT.description: Displays the number of short reads.

REQUESTS_WITH_SHORT_READS_COUNT.description: Displays the number of requests with short reads.

AVG_SHORT_READS_PER_REQUEST_COUNT.description:
Displays the average number of short reads per request with short
reads.

MAX_SHORT_READS_PER_REQUEST_COUNT.description: Displays the maximum number of short reads per request.

FULL_RETRY_READ_COUNT.description: Displays the number of full retry reads.

REQUESTS_WITH_FULL_RETRY_READS_COUNT.description: Displays the number of requests with full retry reads.

AVG_FULL_RETRY_READS_PER_REQUEST_COUNT.description:
Displays the average number of full retry reads per request with full
retry reads.

MAX_FULL_RETRY_READS_PER_REQUEST_COUNT.description: Displays the maximum number of full retry reads per request.

M_VOLUME_IO_TOTAL_STATISTICS.description: Shows information about basic I/O operations on I/O subsystems (paths).

TYPE.description: Displays the type of contained files.

BLOCKED_WRITE_REQUESTS.description: Displays the number of blocked write requests.

MAX_BLOCKED_WRITE_REQUESTS.description: Displays the maximum number of blocked write requests.

TOTAL_READS.description: Displays the number of synchronous reads.

TOTAL_TRIGGER_ASYNC_READS.description: Displays the number of triggered asynchronous reads.

ACTIVE_ASYNC_READS_COUNT.description: Displays the number of active asynchronous reads

TRIGGER_READ_RATIO.description: Displays the trigger-ratio of asynchronous reads.

TOTAL_SHORT_READS.description: Displays the number of reads that read fewer bytes than requested.

TOTAL_FULL_RETRY_READS.description: Displays the number of full retry reads.

TOTAL_FAILED_READS.description: Displays the number of failed reads.

TOTAL_READ_SIZE.description: Displays the size of read data in bytes.

TOTAL_READ_TIME.description: Displays the total read time in microseconds.

TOTAL_WRITES.description: Displays the number of synchronous writes.

TOTAL_TRIGGER_ASYNC_WRITES.description: Displays the number of triggered asynchronous writes.

ACTIVE_ASYNC_WRITES_COUNT.description: Displays the number of active asynchronous writes

TRIGGER_WRITE_RATIO.description: Displays the trigger-ratio of asynchronous writes.

TOTAL_SHORT_WRITES.description: Displays the number of writes that wrote less bytes than requested.

TOTAL_FULL_RETRY_WRITES.description: Displays the number of full retry writes.

TOTAL_FAILED_WRITES.description: Displays the number of failed writes.

TOTAL_WRITE_SIZE.description: Displays the size of written data in bytes.

TOTAL_WRITE_TIME.description: Displays the total write time in microseconds.

TOTAL_IO_TIME.description: Displays the total IO time in microseconds.

CAPTURE_ID.description: Displays the unique ID of the captured workload.

CAPTURE_NAME.description: Displays the user-specified name of the captured workload.

CAPTURE_DESCRIPTION.description: Displays the user-specified description of the captured workload.

CAPTURE_VERSION.description:
Displays the version number of the structure format for the captured workloads or
capturing workload.

START_TIME.description: Displays the start timestamp of the capture.

UTC_START_TIME.description: Displays the UTC start timestamp of the capture.

END_TIME.description: Displays the end timestamp of the captured workload

UTC_END_TIME.description: Displays the UTC end timestamp of the captured workload.

IS_FILTER_APPLIED.description:
Displays the flag that is set to FALSE if the user Displays any non-default value to any
filter parameters.

SYSTEM_ID.description: Displays the system ID in which the capture has been done.

DATABASE_NAME.description: Displays the database name in which the capture has been done.

STATUS.description: Displays the status of the workload captures.

IS_LOADED.description:
Displays the flag that is set to TRUE if the captured data is loaded into the
database.

PROGRESS.description: Displays the current progress of the load.

LEVEL.description: Displays the level of workload captures.

PARAMETERS.description: Displays the applied parameter's key/value pairs.

STATEMENT_DURATION_THRESHOLD.description: Displays the threshold value for the workloads to be captured.

FLUSH_INTERVAL.description: Displays the interval of flushing out the file output stream.

CAPTURE_FILE_NAME.description: Displays the file name of the captured workload.

CAPTURE_SESSION_COUNT.description: Displays the number of current or captured logical sessions.

CAPTURE_STATEMENT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of current or captured statements.

CAPTURE_FETCH_COUNT.description: Displays the number current or captured fetch operations.

CAPTURE_COMMITTED_TRANSACTION_COUNT.description: Displays the number of current or captured committed transactions.

CAPTURE_SIZE.description: Displays the size of the captured workload file.

CAPTURE_FAILED_STATEMENT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of failed current or capture statements.

CAPTURE_FAILED_FETCH_COUNT.description: Displays the number of failed current or capture fetch operations.

ERROR_CODE.description: Displays the error code generated by the system during capturing.

ERROR_MESSAGE.description: Displays the error message generated by system during capturing.

M_WORKLOAD_CLASS_STATISTICS.description: Displays how many resources have been consumed by statements that belong to a specified workload class.

TOTAL_STATEMENT_MEMORY_SIZE.description:
Displays the total peak memory size, in bytes, used by
statements.

TOTAL_STATEMENT_CPU_TIME.description:
Displays the total CPU time, in microseconds, used by
statements.

TOTAL_STATEMENT_ADMIT_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of admitted statements.

TOTAL_STATEMENT_REJECT_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of rejected statements.

TOTAL_STATEMENT_ENQUEUE_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of enqueued statements.

TOTAL_STATEMENT_DEQUEUE_COUNT.description: Displays the total number of dequeued statements for deferred execution.

TOTAL_STATEMENT_TIMEOUT_COUNT.description:
Displays the total number of dequeued statements for timed
out.

CAPTURE_ID.description: Displays the unique ID of the captured workload.

CAPTURE_SYSTEM_ID.description: Displays the system ID in which the capture has been done.

CAPTURE_DATABASE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the database in which the capture has been done.

REPLAY_ID.description: Displays the unique ID of the replayed workload.

REPLAY_NAME.description: Displays the user-specified name of the replayed workload.

REPLAY_DESCRIPTION.description: Displays the user-specified description of the replayed workload.

REPLAY_START_TIME.description: Displays the start timestamp of the replay.

REPLAY_UTC_START_TIME.description: Displays the UTC start timestamp of the replay.

REPLAY_END_TIME.description: Displays the end timestamp of the replayed workload.

REPLAY_UTC_END_TIME.description: Displays the UTC end timestamp of the replayed workload.

REPLAY_HOST.description: Displays the host name in which the replay has been done.

REPLAY_PORT.description: Displays the service port number in which the replay has been done.

REPLAY_SYSTEM_ID.description: Displays the system ID in which the replay has been done.

REPLAY_DATABASE_NAME.description: Displays the name of the database in which the replay has been done.

STATUS.description: Displays the status of workload replays.

PROGRESS.description: Displays a measure of how much the replayer has made its progress.

REPLAY_SESSION_COUNT.description: Displays the number of current or replayed logical sessions.

REPLAY_STATEMENT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of current or replayed statements.

REPLAY_FETCH_COUNT.description: Displays the number of current or replayed fetch operations.

REPLAY_COMMITTED_TRANSACTION_COUNT.description: Displays the number of current or replayed committed transactions.

ERROR_CODE.description: Displays the error code generated by the system during capturing.

ERROR_MESSAGE.description: Displays the error message generated by the system during capturing.

M_WORKLOAD_REPLAY_PREPROCESSES.description: Provides information about preprocesses for captured workloads.

CAPTURE_ID.description: Displays the unique ID of the captured workload.

CAPTURE_NAME.description: Displays the user-specified name of the captured workload.

CAPTURE_DESCRIPTION.description: Displays the user-specified description of the captured workload.

CAPTURE_START_TIME.description: Displays the start timestamp of the captured workload.

CAPTURE_UTC_START_TIME.description: Displays the UTC start timestamp of the captured workload.

CAPTURE_END_TIME.description: Displays the end timestamp of the captured workload.

CAPTURE_UTC_END_TIME.description: Displays the UTC end timestamp of the captured workload.

IS_FILTER_APPLIED.description:
Displays the flag to be set to 'false' if user specified any non-default value to any
filter parameters.

CAPTURE_SYSTEM_ID.description: Displays the system ID, in which the capture has been done.

CAPTURE_DATABASE_NAME.description: Displays the database name, in which the capture has been done.

CAPTURE_VERSION.description:
Displays the version number of the structure format of the captured workloads or
capturing workload.

PREPROCESS_START_TIME.description: Displays the start timestamp of the preprocessing.

PREPROCESS_UTC_START_TIME.description: Displays the UTC start timestamp of the preprocessing.

PREPROCESS_END_TIME.description: Displays the end timestamp of the preprocessing.

PREPROCESS_UTC_END_TIME.description: Displays the UTC end timestamp of the preprocessing.

PREPROCESS_VERSION.description:
Displays the version number of the structure format of the preprocessed workloads or
preprocessing workload.

STATUS.description: Displays the status of workload preprocess.

PROGRESS.description: Displays the current progress of preprocess.

LEVEL.description: Displays the level of workload captures.

PARAMETERS.description: Displays the applied parameter's key/value pairs.

STATEMENT_DURATION_THRESHOLD.description:
Displays the threshold value for the elapsed time of executed statements to be
captured.

FLUSH_INTERVAL.description: Displays the interval of flushing out the file output stream.

CAPTURE_SESSION_COUNT.description: Displays the number of current or captured logical sessions.

CAPTURE_STATEMENT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of current or captured statements.

CAPTURE_FETCH_COUNT.description: Displays the number current or captured fetch operations.

CAPTURE_COMMITTED_TRANSACTION_COUNT.description: Displays the number of current or captured committed transactions.

CAPTURE_FAILED_STATEMENT_COUNT.description: Displays the number of failed capture statements.

Displays the number of failed fetch operations during
capture.

CAPTURE_SIZE.description: Displays the size of captured workload file in bytes.

PREPROCESS_SIZE.description: Displays the total amounts of file sizes generated by workload preprocess in bytes.

ERROR_CODE.description: Displays the error code generated by system during capturing.

ERROR_MESSAGE.description: Displays the error message generated by system during capturing.

M_XS_APPLICATIONS.description: Provides information about applications deployed and running in SAP HANA XS.

APPLICATION_NAME.description: Displays the name of the application.

DELIVERY_UNIT.description:
Displays the name of the delivery unit that this application belongs
to.

VENDOR.description: Displays the vendor of the delivery unit.

VERSION.description: Displays the version information of the delivery unit.

VERSION_SP.description: Displays the SP version information of the delivery unit.

VERSION_PATCH.description: Displays the patch version information of the delivery unit.

M_XS_APPLICATION_ISSUES.description: Lists issues related to applications in SAP HANA XS.

APPLICATION_NAME.description: Displays the name of the application.

ERROR_MESSAGE.description: Displays the textual description of the issue.

M_XS_PUBLIC_URLS.description: Provides a list of URLs under which this database can be reached.

HTTP_URL.description: Displays the public HTTP URL of the XS Engine.

HTTPS_URL.description: Displays the public HTTPS URL of the XS Engine.

PURPOSE.description: Displays the purpose of these URLs.
